name: John Fetterman
subject: How Dr. Oz spent his Fourth of July →
disclaimer_text: paid for by the people, and we’d never have it any other way**
body:
Dr. Oz was schmoozing in New York.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
I hope you had a safe + fun 4th of July weekend with your friends and loved ones. 🇺🇸
Though our holiday weekend cost a *lot* more than it did last year, the Fetterman Fam had a nice day right here in Braddock.
Dr. Oz, on the other hand, was partying it up at a gala in New York, surrounded by celebrities like Ryan Seacrest and Kendall Jenner.
I dare this dude to stay in Pennsylvania for like, one day. 🙄
It’s an icky reminder that ultra-rich GOP Dr. Oz doesn't even have to worry about raising money for his campaign. He’s already self-funding his campaign, plus he has essentially unlimited access to other celebrities + millionaires.
Meanwhile, during holiday weekends, we see a massive slowdown in fundraising, since our donors (aka real people like you, Derek) are rightfully spending time outside + with loved ones.
Don’t get me wrong — this campaign is PROUDLY bought + paid for by the people, and we’d never have it any other way**. But with the stakes this high, we can’t afford to fall behind Dr. Oz.**
[**_Can you please make your first $5 donation today to help make up for the fundraising slow down we saw this past weekend? Every single dollar makes a difference in the fight against Dr. Oz._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-2?refcode=em20220705-6421&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6421_434096_OZuEsQ&akid=6421%2E434096%2EOZuEsQ)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-2?refcode=em20220705-6421&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6421_434096_OZuEsQ&akid=6421%2E434096%2EOZuEsQ)**
Doc Hollywood can have his star-studded parties and weekends in the Hamptons. My priorities just look a *little* different.
With your help, I know that we can win those righteous fights + flip this seat in November.
Thanks for your help,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220705-6421-footer&t=1&refcode2=6421_434096_OZuEsQ&akid=6421%2E434096%2EOZuEsQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: They call me “Brontosaurus-vich”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
‌ |
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/they-call-me-brontosaurus-vich?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| When I was in elementary school, I got bullied every day.

Every. Single. Day.

And not just by students, but by the teachers too.

They’d call me Brontosaurus-vich.

See, my parents _fled communism_ (from Yugoslavia and Croatia) just before I was born...

Which meant English wasn’t my first language.

I spoke with a foreign accent...

Said “does” when I meant to say “do.”
...and had a funny sounding last name to boot.

It was hard, I’m not going to lie.

Worse: My parents didn’t have a lot of money either...

Or a bunch of family in the U.S. who they could lean on for support...

_But they came here anyway..._

Because they wanted to live the American dream...

And to to give their son a better life than they had.

I thank God every day for the sacrifices they made for me... just to live in America.

In America, where I can live free from the brutal _communist regimes_ my parents suffered through.

But that’s why I’m writing to you today...

**_Because as painful as this is for me to say, I fear that we’re losing the America I grew up in._**

Not that I think America is turning into a communist dictatorship... it’s not.

But because when _I_ was a kid, **at least no one told me that America was a terrible country.**

Everyone, and I mean everyone--was proud to be an American back then.

They **believed** that in America you had a DUTY to pursue your dreams...

And a mission to leave this nation better for future generations.

**And that’s why I’m running for the United States Senate...**

Because I believe that this mission continues now...

At a time when our rights to free speech, religion, and even to keep our businesses open are under attack...
I simply refuse to stand on the sidelines and watch it happen...

And if you feel the same way about our great nation...

Then I hope you’ll come out and support me on August 2nd.

Sincerely,
Mark
P.S. It’s pronounced “burn-o-vich” by the way... no hard feelings if you weren’t sure.

---
| | PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE.
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Brnovich for Senate, All rights reserved._

**Brnovich for Senate**
PO Box 497
Phoenix, AZ 85007

body:
Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. |

Fellow American,

There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news.

**We're down.**
Fellow American, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=585adaea77d2412f9e6049c226b313bf&_e=_jZX_ccIzEa12kQLWfEltWcHPtUJ_NZ8OvK1SoWUduyOqjPQhcQTD0rZjU7xfXnhStHv080xC3fr6H_LaIe5OylHHCSyPd7zj0N_SRKWIESR7LHMXITFs9KFBARba_p5kv3Lm8z8I7bCEXBSM8mufxIGNAjAVNcsZDxNlB5_VVLE_pdMU4SBqdyktluQ1PdvTxXQlMMIHD_vbdab6N53k_Hzxsb_BMD5Q9dTf2J6uat63MmRv-ghk2VEgCLFxPg3WgYPxzqQTTpX3JrjzaBNr38BZ0sa7rEzV0LradBpHE1A0JBnwHhnAiKbFaPpcGMIoRd5o4IbVUCj4Wm0gOmnWiSjoOpha_VZZWDHGVvPgxp4PaJP1fg1H_wq5uj8Hiy6WSO27KmApjpQd7nHHC6yFvwRwF4h03sBQ1l3WOEhzPcBCL9IIRK6TAVg8QtRJ4uLgu2O5YYrDFtUJPx5ew84ZkQE7jamcrpHDlMqnaPRqoggLNP4DdTuyZY5hZbOx-GV)

Fellow American, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. _**That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary.**_

We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air.

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4479%2E3611125%2EO0Fm8o ][IMG]

Hey folks—Tim is hitting the road on a trip across the state to
meet with voters, and he couldn’t be more excited.

Tim’s enthusiasm for face-to-face campaigning is infectious, so we want to
keep him on the road as long as possible. That’s why our team set this
$125,000 Voter Contact goal.

Face-to-face conversations are the best way to connect with voters about
the issues that matter most to them, their families, and their
pocketbooks. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16199?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4479%2E3611125%2EO0Fm8o ]So can you chip in

name: heather (via VPP)
subject: Bumping this important petition for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9)._
---
Hey,

Last week, we sent you an important petition calling on the Senate to abolish the filibuster.

But we just checked our records, and your signature is still missing.

Bills to protect reproductive rights, voting rights, and many of our most vital rights are stuck in a legislative gridlock due to Republicans' use of the filibuster. It's clear that if we want to make meaningful progress on these issues, the filibuster must be abolished.

So we're reopening our petition for the next two hours to give you a chance to stand with us and make your voice heard. **[RE-OPENED FOR 12 HOURS]** [**CLICK HERE OR USE THE BUTTON BELOW TO SIGN OUR ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER PETITION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220705_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9) | [**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220705_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9)
---

I've attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks!

Heather

Voter Protection Project

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: MSNBC Developing Report (via VPP)
Subject: Joe Biden's AMAZING call to Democrats
To: Top Democrats

**_BREAKING FROM NPR: Biden backs filibuster carveout for abortion rights_**

**|| URGENT PETITION TO CONGRESS ||**
[**We need 15,000 Democratic signatures to help President Biden and pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the filibuster!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220705_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9) | [**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220705_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9)
---

_We 're thrilled:_ Today, President Biden COMMANDED Senate Democrats to do their job and change the filibuster rules to codify _Roe v. Wade._

[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20220705_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=3588%2E878179%2EVWspK9)

name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: re: Kemp’s fundraising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, did you see
what Politico reported this weekend?

Kemp racing to stay competitive with Abrams in fundraising
“Kemp’s team is expanding its contacts with donors outside of Georgia who can
contribute six-figure checks to his leadership PAC, and it’s paying several
fundraising consultants to get the job done.”

(Politico, 7.3.22)

We’ll have official numbers soon, but here’s what we’ll say for now:
thanks to grassroots supporters like you, momentum is on our side in this
race. But with new reports that Kemp is expanding his fundraising efforts,
we can’t afford to slow down.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220705_B2_politico_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=868%2E1862389%2ENqBK-6 ]Rush a $5 contribution today to make sure we have the
resources to stand up to Brian Kemp and elect Stacey Abrams.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220705_B2_politico_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=868%2E1862389%2ENqBK-6 ]DONATE $5

Kemp has spent his early fundraising advantage flooding the airwaves with
negative ads about Stacey. Our existing voter outreach and advertising
programs have kept us tied in the polls — but with Kemp redoubling his
efforts, there’s no time to pause.

Based on recent reports, Kemp’s fundraising efforts are only going to
speed up from here. If we’re going to counter Kemp’s early, aggressive
spending, we need to reach voters all across the state now, not a week
before Election Day.

To be clear,
Derek: we have a plan to do
just that. But it takes grassroots investments to make that a reality.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220705_B2_politico_S1_T1_AFG_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=868%2E1862389%2ENqBK-6 ]That’s why your grassroots support is so important. Please, if you can,
make your first
$5 contribution today to help us counter Kemp’s
fundraising.

Thanks so much,

Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=868%2E1862389%2ENqBK-6 ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=868%2E1862389%2ENqBK-6

Senator Warnock and the national Democrats have spent over $10 million in ads attacking me since I became the Republican nominee on May 24th. Unfortunately, we haven't had the resources to respond with our own ads to set the record straight.

**Clearly, their attack ads are having an impact.**

Unfortunately, we haven't had the resources to respond with our own ads to set the record straight. Clearly, their attack ads are having an impact. name: Team WISGOP
subject: Independence Day Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july4th_fu_1&n=1)
---
Friend – What a fantastic weekend! All across the State, grassroots activists came out and supported Republican candidates in patriotic parades. The rain and storms could not keep conservatives in Wisconsin from celebrating our nation's birth while supporting their favorite candidates and local county party's. From the Southeast to the Northwest, and everywhere in between, the grassroots of the Republican Party are ready for a red wave in November! Our Congressmen in the 1st (Bryan Steil), 5th (Scott Fitzgerald), 6th (Glenn Grothman), 7th (Tom Tiffany), 8th (Mike Gallagher), and future Congressman from the 3rd (Derrick Van Orden) came out with their supporters and walked dozens of parades across their districts. The Operation Vamos Team was out in full force connecting with the Hispanic communities across the Southeast. As we move toward November, don't be left behind. Join the Red Wave Today! There are so many ways to help elect Republicans in 2022. Whether you want to volunteer or donate, we can help. **The only thing that’s missing is you!** | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july4th_fu_1&n=2 "VOLUNTEER TODAY") [VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=july4th_fu_1&n=2)

| | |
---
---
| | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

---

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: This 4th of July
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
246 years ago our Founding Fathers declared our independence and founded the greatest country on earth. This weekend we celebrated those freedoms that generations of brave Americans have fought to preserve.
Hi Peter,246 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared our independence and founded the greatest country on Earth. This weekend we celebrated those freedoms that generations of Americans have enjoyed, secured by the brave Americans who have fought to preserve them. **I hope you found the time to celebrate our country with friends and family over the weekend.** It was a busy weekend for our team. We marched in the Oak Creek, Franklin, Cudahy, St. Francis, and Kenosha parades.**It was great to see tens of thousands of people proudly wearing Red, White, and Blue and celebrating the U.S.A. across Wisconsin.** Check out some highlights below.**Kenosha** **Oak Creek** **Franklin** **Cudahy** **St. Francis** **Team Steil** Thank you, Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**

name: Steve
subject: Kills more cancer cells than a dose of radiation
body:
[unsubscribe](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn3be8ia2g6cn1pkn43i8o167qb4qpt5vdszrrso58czw1zp29uejon1jr623c2c00qb950lk7i88ugucmmc0oa8u09hqfwkyb92&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| Dear Reader, In 1918, this “**[ _miracle medicine_](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114aje1fy57xre3tavo2jxezu2a50la39yrao6f644jf43fmv26juv9rmnejauo4e3u5qm1qseuie2siy9uz2olbem48sge0j3vl5ur5fg4u2vvsd9jt7qxpvfh16s8ixj2igs17ulpvy25e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)** ” was in every household in America. Valuable enough to get caught in the crossfire during both World Wars... | [](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114aje3ao6kkltrf9u74ojrkafmttrwoa8veecp3ngas1imm9rmx749wz873gv132j9sm97f2pw9sdag4k7inns0ca8lrqjctczz30rnboi0ahmsmeunwmyu72vnty0wwor8z0pdp68ftf9j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
And _powerful_ enough to be studied by the founding members of a massive Big Pharma dynasty...
There was nothing else like it on Earth.
In fact, [**this miracle medicine**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114aje5v28cov6e4gt25e939hvifjhsy2gzj99j0vwr2lad9leq8hb9c04xm0vc1pd0d68q7zkxy5sidzyj5w9inb2pcpl3s2pdn0urtwhzvn71rgn35j6zygn7xede8uddwrwcn7p43pwpv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) was on track to become a game-changer for fighting the cancer epidemic.
But then it just...disappeared.
To this day, it’s not being taught in medical schools—or prescribed in major U.S. cancer centers. But the results of lab studies are impressive.
Big Pharma knows more about this than they’re letting on...and [**_these newly discovered documents_**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114aje7pemtc2i4srrj77wcx2mv6qnohtse1bfsjdm5bjt89c5tiwm9hp0ls6wqlawe227wy9vykg64b6nyqf8oyzsutov95z0gkk0rzsqr1juerpfa0m2adtvhi3jvit73i852h1vlp9nt7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) prove it**...**__
Everything you need to know is [**_right here_**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114aje98uo93yxse0qe8yipi915ugd94i2i66p0gklioh9b9suxw8hm0bjpyox3jlqvok6d0h4anuhoyb0na26ejxgz8n3qh7zkyhurfnj6wvgvqjo8gykbi4ew6r3nwrys80brqhcgz52xb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh).
To your health,
Karen Reddel
_Logical Health Alternatives_
P.S. No one’s talking about this—but this discovery is _already_ changing the lives of cancer patients. [**_See it here_**](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114ajen38q0t6mf3xpzm2817rddhn75qmb0myiwe6bylf2696hb7jsm62fdeuxeim8mzg5jrsbba7www7b0jn598w8dl9zwwen2mf0rl7rk366mqsgfalgd0e18sc938q1evf9dkbjbj0fb4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) before corporate interests make it “disappear” again.

This ad is sent on behalf of OmniVistaHealth, LLC. P.O. Box 913, Frederick, MD 21705, USA. If you would like to unsubscribe from receiving offers from OmniVistaHealth, please [_click here_](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hdal9py6nroh3w41es61459p6ts6ugi9h4spaf21hxw2n1s894yc7vxiodj8h8m0apj9e34nhzv28drr4f1hdz2ifecx5y90ix0cn9uo8gxdgegm7mew2qwlpy69lohkpf9mq5ljbi8xdsx2mq8en5m99hgrcgvd7j1dyc1ig66rllr7o1a8zhfjik148usijmertz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh).

[Privacy Policy](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=241txlezv5naozhhu4st8w6ifk114ajeqeatv89btcdnp93phbpz5oy413psgwaji3c5yrygv4bv20vvn0zaidttccgmrns04wt5pw9zdx43azjthbvhfp58yuy8ob827ekvdidjwg16p7duz3vjs7po6tnmu1oze0iasysl1r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Advertise with us](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=12vr2aek0uqg7ehpe58a7vadu6tzm88wtjx6i5vovsaemyftvgp02y9s0gfr8i44dlzoy02yvt53cqdm4ccmk35l6ispbf25akn4axowntce9n22sthm50egyaksaop5fhseugo6yxswh1uhaqbriv6zbnv6vxsm5bb5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

name: Gov. Kristi Noem
subject: I'm sending this email out to a select group of our most reliable, freedom-loving American Patriots 📧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hear me on this:
Dear Patriot,
**This is Governor Kristi Noem. I have some pressing news for you.** I just got wind that the Democratic National Committee is unleashing a tidal wave of cash to help Liberals in red states. They're striking us in must-win GOP strongholds and I'm worried it's having a major effect...
Republicans and Democrats are virtually TIED in the latest polls.
I'm partnering up with Republican Whip Steve Scalise because this is an emergency -- we just set up a [**rapid-response goal**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60733782:JgQOM0oKN:m:1:3299561967:6A375E0A9ED78BE88CFF8699FC2CABBB:r) of $150,000 before our top GOP allies are completely overwhelmed. **According to the latest intel, the DNC is mobilizing quickly to:**
* Launch anti-Trump ad campaigns across America
* Deploy Liberal field teams to battleground districts
* Train an army of door-knockers to reach new voters
* Organize high-profile fundraisers to prop-up vulnerable Democrats
* Flood the airwaves with false and misleading stories about Republicans

**[Rapid Response Goal: Add Support Now ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60733782:JgQOM0oKN:m:1:3299561967:6A375E0A9ED78BE88CFF8699FC2CABBB:r)**
I'm sending this email out to a select group of our most reliable, freedom-loving American Patriots...
I have a hunch you're not one to give up when the going gets tough -- or when a bunch of Liberals try to buy an election. **That 's why your name is at the top of the list.**
[**Do you have the courage and determination to help stop them? I think so.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60733782:JgQOM0oKN:m:1:3299561967:6A375E0A9ED78BE88CFF8699FC2CABBB:r)
Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60733782:JgQOM0oKN:m:1:3299561967:6A375E0A9ED78BE88CFF8699FC2CABBB:r)
Governor Kristi Noem

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6114%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=lG0TcYFQfVYhAzrZa0mnDg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63213%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRcLq1AjGVaiW%2fCX3X5Wtg&sysid=1)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach--especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63214%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gZvKsmts4uOVWxojk3C2SQ&sysid=1)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63225%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GCrR7JXTZ9ThWdeEDoX7fQ&sysid=1)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63226%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hn9a5mcFEdhDNDN2O9SpBA&sysid=1)
---
| | [Yes](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63227%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BQFKWzNDgSAvJM3%2boxTQ8A&sysid=1)
---
| [No](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63228%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R6s4u256VL7HOAF2b7pnhA&sysid=1)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Watch and share this course on DVD
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcgvbnqvv6a942hj0ue5grb25lo0h6ig4iqhkmvg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb6p3n6drb8pb5csp7co34chqj8d1nmuorcoj669i74ptlc9q76dtmcgpb9opn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbc77mpgmcc9imdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljm8o34cdj66oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za14frr064vg5fdgu3keck56du7mraandnav41jg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq5n8a2u26akjh1eltk3bnn7m4lulobtjd7sds20_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cdh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmi2hg5g6k28vpd2pnf5rncm3batrk479ol7lko_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cdh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z182elr4o54lbc2jgfrklm8qkabc5m42r5dh6feg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cdh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

As a freedom-loving family man, scientist, and life-long investor... it makes me sick to my stomach to know just how much hard-working American taxpayers have been lied to over the past several decades. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5rek6egiluv30l5fcodrvrekbp622t1qm6e9fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cph2bs) And in this **_[free book I want to send to you today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjjlse7l9gvqqtl19dc4r7tldib0ll88nvnobdro_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chg68or6cph2bs)_** , you'll discover why "global warming" may not be the urgent crisis that has been promoted throughout the world for the past 40 years. name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Here is how you can tell if I will keep my promises, once I am elected
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
Look at a man's actions - not just his words
| | | |
---
---
|

Peter,
How do you know if I will keep my promises, once I am elected?
It's simple. See if my words align with my actions.
Back in May, I was one of the top 5 candidates for Michigan governor invited to the June 2nd Detroit Regional Chamber of Commerce's Gubernatorial Debate, at the Mackinac Policy Conference.
I was thrilled and couldn't wait to debate the other candidates, until I realized that the conference had a vaccine passport/negative PCR test requirement.
Therefore, I chose to boycott the debate.
I didn't expect all the candidates to stand with me, but I expected at least one or two candidates to do so.
After all, at a previous debate, each of them promised to fight mask and vaccine mandates, if elected.
To my surprise, no one stood with me.
---
---
John Adams once said:
"Always stand on principle.... even if you stand alone." I stood alone because I could not stomach breaking my promise to fight these mask and vaccine mandates.
I will not betray my supporters and future constituents.
---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELK8LfTNdr17Ij15968JT9PbWIlj_TlR8rX4kpGb-fu_DYwywIV6fPhOONXKIIYW6MxG1oZw_MYXbV6SX37WQ9BxnW8C6s32PcPuUO6Q4gTKQaroTl8Q-CZVpnkO25EH17wDvaGj2Cdsm7S1gTpcksDZUOS0l8pE9dluYgebomrnAyBLnFaWugYTq_loRKmG22Zc2F8VG0J9Bv-30kRNVg==&c=HkugVS-fY0D5KUaRjvPVFadzmCaEAk8SOasdnEqZE_rDeaNG5N03DA==&ch=CDro_pg8UjfUXYcfMzSKddsgLrex18rQLomcrozzQnzhWT7YlbufZg==)
---
Many tried to convince me to attend. Some told me that I could not afford to miss the MASSIVE exposure it would give me. It would be foolish for me to miss the chance to be in front of all those cameras. Others said that vaccine passports or Covid-19 tests were not required for the outdoor event, so what was the big deal?
Although the requirement was waived for the outdoor debate, those who attended the conference absolutely had to show a vaccine passport or provide a negative PCR test. I refused to support "vaccines for thee, but not for me."
---
---
So, yes, I sacrificed the exposure to take a stand for the people of Michigan.
What a missed opportunity for the Republican party!
Peter, When you vote in the primary for the candidate you believe will stand strong - the candidate that is likely to be immune to corruption, remember Mackinac. When you choose the candidate that will act for the people, and not for his own self-interest, remember Mackinac. If you desire someone who shuns elitism and special rules for the elites, remember Mackinac. Thomas Jefferson said,
"If you want something you've never had, you must be willing to do something you've never done." We do not have to keep electing candidates who say they will do one thing and do another, as soon as they're in office. This is how we end up with RINOs.
Why not do something different so we can have a different result? If you elect me for governor, rest assured, I will keep the promises I make to you.
---
|
---
The Primary Election is 5 weeks away!
[Please chip in $10, $20, $50, $100 or more to help get out the vote so that more people will vote Ryan Kelley on August 2.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELK8LfTNdr17Ij15968JT9PbWIlj_TlR8rX4kpGb-fu_DYwywIV6fPhOONXKIIYW6MxG1oZw_MYXbV6SX37WQ9BxnW8C6s32PcPuUO6Q4gTKQaroTl8Q-CZVpnkO25EH17wDvaGj2Cdsm7S1gTpcksDZUOS0l8pE9dluYgebomrnAyBLnFaWugYTq_loRKmG22Zc2F8VG0J9Bv-30kRNVg==&c=HkugVS-fY0D5KUaRjvPVFadzmCaEAk8SOasdnEqZE_rDeaNG5N03DA==&ch=CDro_pg8UjfUXYcfMzSKddsgLrex18rQLomcrozzQnzhWT7YlbufZg==) As always, I am humbled and grateful for your support
---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ELK8LfTNdr17Ij15968JT9PbWIlj_TlR8rX4kpGb-fu_DYwywIV6fPhOONXKIIYW6MxG1oZw_MYXbV6SX37WQ9BxnW8C6s32PcPuUO6Q4gTKQaroTl8Q-CZVpnkO25EH17wDvaGj2Cdsm7S1gTpcksDZUOS0l8pE9dluYgebomrnAyBLnFaWugYTq_loRKmG22Zc2F8VG0J9Bv-30kRNVg==&c=HkugVS-fY0D5KUaRjvPVFadzmCaEAk8SOasdnEqZE_rDeaNG5N03DA==&ch=CDro_pg8UjfUXYcfMzSKddsgLrex18rQLomcrozzQnzhWT7YlbufZg==)
---
To liberty!

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor
---
|
---
PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D. KELLEY
---
| | | | | | | Michigan For Ryan D. Kelley | 6181 Lake Michigan Drive #105, Allendale, MI 49401
---

I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.

Friend, what is going on in Florida?

After a newly released poll showed a **_virtual tie_** between myself and Gov. Ron DeSantis, I thought people would be fired up to keep up the momentum and defeat DeSantis.

I mean, he won last time by less than one percentage point. And if he wins again in Florida in 2022, he’ll be primed for the Republican nomination for president in 2024.

He represents the **_worst_** of Florida politics, and it’s going to take a huge grassroots movement to take him down. **_But right now, our fundraising is stalling and it seems like nobody even cares that this race could come down to less than one percentage point!_**

Team — [**I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $25 or whatever you can afford split between my campaign and Seth Moulton — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47448951/354348532/1927938479?refcode=220706_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIxOWY3Ny0yOGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cwwl5gOWTox0-hfeemE1HlTQ5sXlybjwloVeGzNpzgs=) Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. **And friend, it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal by midnight and set the record straight. Even splitting $25 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.** We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you please split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? I would not ask were it not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47448952/354348533/1927938479?refcode=220706_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIxOWY3Ny0yOGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cwwl5gOWTox0-hfeemE1HlTQ5sXlybjwloVeGzNpzgs=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47448953/354348534/-1534947712?refcode=220706_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIxOWY3Ny0yOGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cwwl5gOWTox0-hfeemE1HlTQ5sXlybjwloVeGzNpzgs=)
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong. But the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be. Thank you, Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47448954/354348535/-1534947712?refcode=220706_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIxOWY3Ny0yOGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cwwl5gOWTox0-hfeemE1HlTQ5sXlybjwloVeGzNpzgs=)

Hello,
My team just wrapped up an emergency fundraising meeting. Chuck Grassley has already started smearing me across the entire state with attack ads, and Mitch McConnell is raising millions more to stop me from turning Iowa blue.
But with less than 48 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, we just checked ActBlue – and our grassroots fundraising has slowed way down. **If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and protect our Democratic Senate majority, I’m counting on a new surge of donations from people like you now.**
The polling shows Grassley has never been more vulnerable, and we’re gaining ground. But Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2020, and it’ll be even closer this year. If we miss our $50,000 fundraising goal now, we will not be able to reach all of Iowa with our counter ads and compete with Mitch’s millions.
**I’m not giving up – but I’m depending on you to maintain our momentum and win. If we turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to protect our majority in the Senate. clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, My team just wrapped up an emergency fundraising meeting. Chuck Grassley has already started smearing me across the entire state with attack ads, and Mitch McConnell is raising millions more to stop me from turning Iowa blue. But with less than 48 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, we just checked ActBlue – and our grassroots fundraising has slowed way down. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and protect our Democratic Senate majority, I’m counting on a new surge of donations from people like you now. The polling shows Grassley has never been more vulnerable, and we’re gaining ground. But Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2020, and it’ll be even closer this year. If we miss our $50,000 fundraising goal now, we will not be able to reach all of Iowa with our counter ads and compete with Mitch’s millions. I’m not giving up – but I’m depending on you to maintain our momentum and win. If we turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to protect our majority in the Senate. So I have to ask:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We couldn’t have gotten this far without grassroots donors like you, but I need your continued help now. I’m so grateful for everything you do, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| Friend, **America is facing some of the most challenging times in our history, and the Iron Ladies need your help to fight back against the insanity of the Democrats!** Hi, I’m Beth Van Duyne, a Congresswoman, America-First patriot, and a founding member of the Iron Ladies. **We formed Iron Ladies to counter the America-destroying insanity that is the foundation of extremist Democrat policies these days.** We know the Socialist Squad hates America. We’ve seen them bend a knee to foreign governments, BLM, and help run a socialist takeover of our nation. Our group of Iron Ladies is made up of six women dedicated to fighting the Democrats’ anti-America agenda and preserving the America we know and love. **I’m proud to be joined by Congresswoman Michelle Fischbach, Congresswoman Mayra Flores, Jen Kiggans, Esther Joy King, and Amanda Adkins to stand in the way of the radicals running Congress.**

I won a seat in 2020 that Biden was taking by more than 19,000 votes. And Michele unseated one of the longest serving Democrats in the country. **We stunned the Left with these victories, and we’re ready for more!** **With Jen Kiggans, Esther Joy King, and Amanda Adkins fighting to defeat Democrats in November, we can help deliver a Republican majority that throws Pelosi out of the Speaker’s chair. With your support, we CAN MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**

In Florida, we will fight back against the Democrats and their woke allies who are attempting to overturn the successes Governor DeSantis has achieved as our great Governor.

The ability to earn a good living, open a business, and make decisions for your own family are under attack from the Left. Under Governor DeSantis’s leadership, the American dream is alive and well in the free state of Florida.

name: American Action News
subject: The might and drama
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbljbv1sa46jpkt02oo31i0h1udejb5teuvrb6f0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdd5mc3jbecb36djbad3gscrj4sb661jm6c756ppn8sr7clge8cbgslqj6t1le1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8rmcc5kmdgmfchjcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zusr28oclff2v7ktida77k3mer42b59b8vv9oq88_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2uf5fgsj04p5doprh7ne9gi0pp3759qnbj9910_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob6c9h2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidolsjr8mu86muj2h5h2khd11v33lb1v6i1883o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob6c9h2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj85a9l9n3ts7k2cunu7j8jvuin20gne0ga19ni0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob6c9h2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: I just endorsed Sarah Palin for Congress

body:
Sarah Palin is the ONLY choice for the people of Alaska | Sarah Palin has my complete and total endorsement...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9iprfc14vbr3tseo71hkk00seb2udip5plsbcv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6dphekp75dj4saqe8p31c9oj2s3he2oe2dpkceqe4sdicor64t1gccpbeorjc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8rmcc5kmdgmfchhcpq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdimep34c9gm9o324no)

Friend,

Sarah Palin has my complete and total endorsement.

Sarah is a true fighter who will always put Alaska and America First. _We need people like her in Congress to fight against the radical Democrats and RINOS who want to ruin our country._

I recently spoke with my father, President Donald J. Trump, and we both agreed that Sarah Palin is the _only candidate_ in this race that the people of Alaska can trust to fight for them. The only problem is, she still needs YOUR support to win, Friend.

I'm reaching out to you now because we need YOU to add your name to her official list of supporters. There is no time to waste - can we count on you?

**[ONE HOUR LEFT to add your name to the list of patriots publicly endorsing Sarah Palin for Congress.>>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjqkl9copimrv3u2jmaipqhkvnpkl99sjae9ss70_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob4s1h2bs)**

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znuhqa6qglibh8gh13md6ei287rtcfvo7g0o5ilg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob4s1h2bs)

Friend, I'm sick and tired of Republican politicians who talk a big game but refuse to put America First once they get into office, and I know you are too. **Sarah Palin is different. She will NEVER stop fighting for you.**

Your support will help put Sarah over the top. My father and I are counting on you to join us and endorse her campaign, Friend.

**[ONLY ONE MORE HOUR to join the movement and endorse Sarah Palin for Congress.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdjjhbv5kane3lim8sv33a2vcmillr3lkm4p2tjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi64ob4s1h2bs)**

Thank you,

* * *
Peter,

Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , it has never been more urgent for the Senate to abolish the filibuster and take action to protect abortion rights.

Banning abortion won't stop abortions. It only makes it harder for people to access _safe abortions._

The filibuster has prevented Congress from passing voting rights legislation. We can't let it stand in our way any longer. [**Add your name to our petition to end the filibuster and codify _Roe_ :**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47454159/354368744/-1229685555?source=email_070622_filibusterroe&utm_campaign=email_070622_filibusterroe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2E2OWRkNC0zMWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6r7azCqZ4THxKa8W6BCAw8_uOAoy2SNOMW9VUEV2MuY=&emci=e9e3151d-75fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3a69dd4-31fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296) **PETITION TO END THE FILIBUSTER AND CODIFY _ROE V. body:
Friend, you need to know this information.

Friend, you need to know this information.

Friend,

I thought you should be the first to know: 30 yr. Career politician Patty Murray IS SPENDING MILLIONS on a smear campaign against me. _She will do**ANYTHING** to get re-elected._

Murray knows a [**RED WAVE IS COMING TO WASHINGTON**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfo7j6ik37qclo44bebfmuha9r9kd3sughn0ps9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs) , and she's desperate to stop it.

Unlike Murray, I am not bought by dark money mega donors-- I don't have millions to fight back against her attacks. I fully rely on grassroots supporters like YOU who are sick and tired of the status quo.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeo06s9jtj56270f8lfd3u6n2o1ejbot39g6obj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)
Patty Murray MUST GO, but I can't do it without your support, Friend.

**It 's only July and I'm being outspent by a 30yr. career politician who has a long record of abandoning middleclass Americans when they need HELP the most.**

[**I need your help TODAY to fight back against her smear campaign.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z605uc5k0qnd2b9ddbpsjlsguorgfslrt0ufeuj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)
**[**RUSH GRASSROOTS SUPPORT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zouuv3ejrmfemhn4b4jqtarch43actd7tc96fcag_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)**
---
**[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zufarh41re6mlsr5gobc8ghqfd988288243tld00_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)**
---

**Sorry Patty, there 's a new mom in town and I will NOT be intimidated.**

See you in November,

Tiffany Smiley

* * *
**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home. Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That 's why I'm running for Senate**
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt7t2g0plussilgsijd5lvqcp4i5knadckp7lur0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)
[**If you agree we need to stand up for our nation 's heroes, will you chip in to help me reach my major upcoming goal? I need your support, Friend!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z099v6btkr08605ouhc9crsk5gota0l3grit78jo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)
**[**MEET MY IMPENDING DEADLINE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z24apdd36fhh3u75htblin7c4083odas7ghtpluo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chi66o32cjh2bs)**

name: Tom Cotton
subject: We’ve been outraised.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738750:JzSP_0oNe:m:1:3299561967:BB050F95B2CAA8398AB2C4E45DD0A172:r)
---
| | |
Patriot,
Democrats outraised us last month -- and they're on track to do so again this month.
We can't let this become a trend.
**They have coastal elites and rich liberals giving them MILLIONS to spend smearing conservative Republicans in battleground states.**
We have grassroots patriots like YOU. It's time to get off the sidelines, because if we don't have the resources to compete, we won't take back the U.S. Senate in November.
[_**I need 1,000 of you reading this email right now to chip in whatever you can. Your support could make or break our chances of winning in November and stopping the madness. >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738750:JzSP_0oNe:m:1:3299561967:BB050F95B2CAA8398AB2C4E45DD0A172:r)
[**BECOME A SENATE DONOR TODAY **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738750:JzSP_0oNe:m:1:3299561967:BB050F95B2CAA8398AB2C4E45DD0A172:r)
There is too much at stake to assume we're going to win in November. Democrats aren't taking their foot off the gas, and neither can we. **So please act now.**
In service,
Tom Cotton | |

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: We cannot afford two more years of radical Leftists in power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
---
| | |
[__**MAJOR ELECTION-YEAR POLL**__](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
[_**TAKE NOW >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
Patriot,
__Our Party desperately needs all hands on deck.__
We've all had to live through the chaos and destruction unleashed by the Biden Administration, and **we HAVE to do everything possible to save our country.**
Democrats are turning our country into a socialist nightmare, and it CANNOT continue. Our nation needs YOU to stand with President Trump and Republicans nationwide by submitting your response to our [_**Official Election Year Poll**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r) as soon as possible.
[_**TAKE POLL NOW >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
I told my team to put me in touch with some of the **most trusted patriots in YOUR state** because YOUR answers will represent every other Trump patriot around you.
Top Senate leadership are heading into a critical strategy session to RESTORE Trump's America First Majority, and I know they are counting on YOUR input to help craft it. Don't keep them waiting.
[_**Please submit your response to our Official Election Year Poll RIGHT NOW to help RESTORE Trump 's Majority in the United States Senate. >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
Thank you, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738805:6hzB_0oNK:m:1:3299561967:7CEC2C642250A196CDACB658EC90DF92:r)
Kellyanne Conway

body:
there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet

Sorry to add another email to your inbox, friend, but **I have big news to share:**
The Miami Times shows me closing the gap with Marco Rubio in this critical Senate race. We're gaining ground – but we're still in the margin of error, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says 2022 could be a red wave.
**I've overcome long odds before. **The daughter of a maid and a janitor, I became the first in my family to go to college. I became Orlando's first woman police chief – and I even prosecuted a corrupt president for his high crimes against our democracy.

**But there's no question that this Senate race is my toughest fight yet – and I need your help to go ALL IN and flip Florida blue. **
The GOP has already raised more than $164 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, flip the Senate and erase all of the critical progress we're making. Rubio himself is breaking GOP fundraising records, raising more than $6 MILLION in just the last few months.
Senate control is on the line in Florida – and the GOP is terrified that we can defeat Marco Rubio. Florida's Senate seat will come down to who has the resources to turn out more voters, which is why I'm personally asking you right now: **Will you rush a donation before midnight tonight to help me keep up my momentum, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Senate majority?**
**[Please, friend, I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to help me compete and win. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: He’s lost family to gun violence. He’ll fight for our safety.
body:
Mandela Barnes for gun sense in the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |

| | | | | Peter, I'm still reeling from July 4th. subject: 538 just ranked our race
body:
Hi, it's John.
So uh Nate Silver’s 538 analysts released their 2022 Senate Election forecast and...
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220706_CGVA_Fetterman [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220706_CGVA_Fetterman]
Their model named us the closest Senate race in the country.
We can’t leave anything up to chance. Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood in and help us pull ahead of Dr. Oz? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220706_CGVA_Fetterman]

Let me first say I’m so grateful for this team. We just had a killer end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising push, all thanks to yinz guys. 🥰
So I hate to come right back to your inbox with another ask. Seriously. But here are three reasons why, as soon I saw Nate’s new forecast, I knew I didn’t have a choice:

me
.
My

is
so

the
limit
basically
does
not
exist.
So if we don’t want Dr. Oz and his buddies Trump + McConnell to tip the scales against us with massive, MAGA-y ad campaigns, we can’t skip a beat with our online fundraising.
Please, if you’re ready to defeat Dr. Oz, flip this seat, and keep the Senate blue, consider splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and CommonGood today so we aren’t outspent. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220706_CGVA_Fetterman]
With your help, I know that we’ll be able to keep up with Dr. Oz and his MAGA money through donations of $5, $25, or whatever yinz can pitch in. It’s how we’ve run this campaign so far, and how it’s going to stay.
Thank you for fighting back today. TBH, I’m really hoping our team will see your name pop up on ActBlue when you make your first-ever (!) donation.
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

subject: Crime rose. Tim Walz froze.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
His leadership has harmed us. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/violence-rose?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

**As crime rose, Tim Walz froze.**

Let me explain. [Click the video](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=84b0ab9d37&e=33b11688c1) thumbnail below to see what I mean:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=94e38c71e9&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Freezing in the moment seems to be a hallmark of Tim Walz's leadership; and for Minnesota to thrive, he cannot be re-elected as governor. He has not earned that.

I am shocked, even after another violent and chaotic weekend, that our state still does not seem prepared to take on the challenge of improving public safety. We are not keeping criminals off the streets and our passive attitude towards crime is creating new offenders every day.

On day ONE, a Jensen/Birk administration [has a plan to improve safety on our streets](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=37d3cd417c&e=33b11688c1). It can be done! It just requires vision, leadership, and political will. [Join our movement!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d8c3a7dac1&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION PROFILES CHAIRWOMAN KELLY LOEFFLER, GREATER GEORGIA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, JULY 6
ICYMI: ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION PROFILES CHAIRWOMAN KELLY LOEFFLER, GREATER GEORGIA (ATLANTA) - In case you missed it, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution released a [profile](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_O9UH5E4sq0-AQTLLKIxIGv5yQNF67uFvcVKZdFn7-yAn1k8nUU8yHq73aV-M8ng2W57fW6K2qq45yJ0O1NlcMM69X-cKqBLSBpJOATqf9bS9DAXg7H2HkdXBeU_qQmXCN1rxJSmrJgKAV0-L-KfRFWi-kBCLGXTM28yATycLxFhHRcvO2yroLDtOAkygT9MLDHJ-s0VtgkB6ITROtD4MtB2MxDf2jhpEC8PilfDNU_sZVkgWYJ50xoinXzQUVY7C7SQ6Rw7aUPd7QqnQORAkNMbqzgNw4bqTN9GPcOrrAc=&c=lsJ1buzmISx0-lyC6wRjRtnEtuuu7Lcee9vzQddnUEjfmomI2P_CRQ==&ch=A0s8RQ3fXhVU8OZcAkQ2MIguZXyv56aulPBumIlb3UrjycK6nyd2cA==) on Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler and Greater Georgia, highlighting the group's efforts over the last 16 months, as well as its important work to register, engage, and mobilize Georgia voters on behalf of the state's conservative movement.
Read the full article [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_O9UH5E4sq0-AQTLLKIxIGv5yQNF67uFvcVKZdFn7-yAn1k8nUU8yHq73aV-M8ng2W57fW6K2qq45yJ0O1NlcMM69X-cKqBLSBpJOATqf9bS9DAXg7H2HkdXBeU_qQmXCN1rxJSmrJgKAV0-L-KfRFWi-kBCLGXTM28yATycLxFhHRcvO2yroLDtOAkygT9MLDHJ-s0VtgkB6ITROtD4MtB2MxDf2jhpEC8PilfDNU_sZVkgWYJ50xoinXzQUVY7C7SQ6Rw7aUPd7QqnQORAkNMbqzgNw4bqTN9GPcOrrAc=&c=lsJ1buzmISx0-lyC6wRjRtnEtuuu7Lcee9vzQddnUEjfmomI2P_CRQ==&ch=A0s8RQ3fXhVU8OZcAkQ2MIguZXyv56aulPBumIlb3UrjycK6nyd2cA==), or view excerpts below:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_O9UH5E4sq0-AQTLLKIxIGv5yQNF67uFvcVKZdFn7-yAn1k8nUU8yHq73aV-M8ng2W57fW6K2qq45yJ0O1NlcMM69X-cKqBLSBpJOATqf9bS9DAXg7H2HkdXBeU_qQmXCN1rxJSmrJgKAV0-L-KfRFWi-kBCLGXTM28yATycLxFhHRcvO2yroLDtOAkygT9MLDHJ-s0VtgkB6ITROtD4MtB2MxDf2jhpEC8PilfDNU_sZVkgWYJ50xoinXzQUVY7C7SQ6Rw7aUPd7QqnQORAkNMbqzgNw4bqTN9GPcOrrAc=&c=lsJ1buzmISx0-lyC6wRjRtnEtuuu7Lcee9vzQddnUEjfmomI2P_CRQ==&ch=A0s8RQ3fXhVU8OZcAkQ2MIguZXyv56aulPBumIlb3UrjycK6nyd2cA==)
---
| Since the day both senators lost their seats in the contentious 2021 runoffs, Loeffler has made it her business to fortify Republicans' chances in future Georgia elections, even when she's not on the ballot.
The biggest piece of that has been launching and plowing millions of her own money into Greater Georgia, her new nonpartisan effort to register and mobilize conservatives in Georgia elections. ...
"I had to stay involved," she said about the time after the January runoffs. "I felt there was a clear need for continuing to serve in some capacity. And we had learned so much in our campaign about what needed to be done in Georgia so that what we ran into never happens again."
"What they ran into," she said, was Democrats' well-financed, highly organized, year-round field operations, overhauled by Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight years ago, which outmanned Republican efforts in 2020 and 2021.
Loeffler took a few weeks off after the election, but by late February had sketched out a plan for Greater Georgia to become a conservatives' answer to Fair Fight.
"As a business person, I looked at (the campaign infrastructure) and said, it's wrong to tear this down and to not dedicate the knowledge that I gained to those who are going to run in the next election, whether it was me or not."
Like any campaign, she fielded polling, gathered data, and led roundtables with voters to get their feedback, including separate roundtables for Black, Latino and Asian voters. She said the data showed thousands of conservative-leaning unregistered voters in Georgia and thousands more registered voters who didn't show up in 2020 -- on top of the conservatives who skipped the runoffs in 2021.
The answer, she said, is a year-round plan to register, listen and mobilize.
"I saw as a candidate that my goal of having a big tent party is hard to achieve if we're being transactional with voters and just showing up during a campaign," she said. ...
"I love the fact that she did not take her ball and go home," said Martha Zoller, the conservative Gainesville radio host. "I love the fact that she is putting her money where her mouth is and she is getting other people to contribute, too. She has put together a professional organization that is helping other organizations."
Eric Tanenblatt, a longtime GOP donor said that Loeffler is "staying above the fray" doing "yeoman's work."
---

name: Jeff Ettinger
subject: We did it - thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Recently, we set a goal of raising $20,000 for our Special Election Victory Fund in time for our final end-of-quarter reporting deadline and I’m thrilled to share with you that not only did we reach our goal—we surpassed it! ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| Hi friend,

Recently, we set a goal of raising $20,000 for our Special Election Victory Fund in time for our final end-of-quarter reporting deadline.

**Well, the numbers just came in, and I’m thrilled to share with you that not only did we reach our goal—we surpassed it!** I wanted to personally reach out to say THANK YOU.

I greatly appreciate you stepping up during this critical moment in our campaign. Because of your support, we are in a stronger position to win and have sent a clear message to the media, voters, and the alt-right extremists that our campaign has the grassroots support to overcome the right-wing megadonor and PAC money in this race.

I know my team and I sent a lot of emails last week, but I hope you understand it’s only because of how essential your support is to our campaign.

Together, we are building a movement powered by you and the people who live, work, and raise families in our district. This is a movement dedicated to protecting our democracy, improving education, lowering the cost of healthcare, and making the American Dream attainable again. It’s a movement strong enough to beat the alt-right super PACs and protect the Democratic majority in the House.

I'm so proud of what we’ve accomplished and can’t wait to continue building our campaign together. **I truly cannot thank you enough for joining me in this fight to move our nation forward.**

Onwards together,
Jeff Ettinger

P.S. If you didn't get a chance to contribute towards our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, [please chip in now to help us continue growing our Special Election Victory Fund and keep our momentum going >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47468184/354407533/1425682023?refcode=07-05-thankyou&ms=ea.814cfa92-40fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTRjZmE5Mi00MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fWxB5Se-naCnBRDQe8KRQNkRRJ4wv8bcrWX0iGVN_dg=) |
| PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
---

name: Greg Stamps
subject: The situation with China
body:
Dear Friend, Nothing has upset the global balance of power and upended the international order quite like the Chinese Communist Party's rise over the past decade.-
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTg3LWZjMDY5NGJjYTUxYzQzNGM5YWNkNDRkMjc5MWM1ZDYzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2NoaW5hLWNoYWxsZW5nZS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaGluYWVib29rJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXYyLUFFX0ZGTzA3MDYyMDIyIn0/kdGYO3IqW3lS3iVOWlRVdA)
---
| | Dear Friend, Nothing has upset the global balance of power and upended the international order quite like the Chinese Communist Party’s rise over the past decade. Its economic and political trajectory—along with its growing military strength—continue to pose challenges to nations around the world. And that includes the United States.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTg3LWZjMDY5NGJjYTUxYzQzNGM5YWNkNDRkMjc5MWM1ZDYzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2NoaW5hLWNoYWxsZW5nZS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaGluYWVib29rJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXYyLUFFX0ZGTzA3MDYyMDIyIn0/o1QW3-ZbbeUf1Afa-KOgBw)
---
| | I’m guessing that you are probably as concerned as I am about this. And for good reason. Even though most countries have not embraced the type of socialist authoritarianism offered by China, its growth still puts the future of democracy and freedom at risk.

That’s why it’s critical that the U.S. and its allies approach China with firm diplomatic efforts and a strong foreign policy. And it’s also why I’m emailing you today.

Our team at the Hoover Institution recently put together a brand-new collection of essays called **_[Countering the China Challenge](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTg3LWZjMDY5NGJjYTUxYzQzNGM5YWNkNDRkMjc5MWM1ZDYzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2NoaW5hLWNoYWxsZW5nZS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaGluYWVib29rJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXYyLUFFX0ZGTzA3MDYyMDIyIn0/scVrs_yNcPgvur5jcACxSQ)_**. And I want to make sure you get your free copy right now! This eBook includes essays from some of the world’s top scholars studying China and the CCP—H.R. McMaster, Michael Auslin, and Matt Pottinger.

In this collection, you’ll discover:
* Specific and critical ways to grapple with Chinese objectives.
* Why resisting Beijing will require a high degree of international cooperation, which Washington must foster.
* How nations in the Indo-Pacific region view China and why many are seeking their own paths between socialism and capitalism.
* Why business leaders around the world—and especially in the U.S.—play an important role in the conflict with China.

Friend, with so many questions about how the U.S. should handle China, I really think you’ll benefit from this collection.

Its economic and political trajectory—along with its growing military strength—continue to pose challenges to nations around the world. And that includes the United States. | | | I’m guessing that you are probably as concerned as I am about this. And for good reason. Even though most countries have not embraced the type of socialist authoritarianism offered by China, its growth still puts the future of democracy and freedom at risk. That’s why it’s critical that the U.S. and its allies approach China with firm diplomatic efforts and a strong foreign policy. And it’s also why I’m emailing you today. Our team at the Hoover Institution recently put together a brand-new collection of essays called . And I want to make sure you get your free copy right now! This eBook includes essays from some of the world’s top scholars studying China and the CCP—H.R. McMaster, Michael Auslin, and Matt Pottinger. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR
body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-july-priorities?utm_ source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf Friend — I hope you had a safe and happy Independence Day weekend with your family and loved ones! Today, the work continues. It’s a new month, Election Day is closer than ever, and we aren’t taking our foot off the gas when it comes to taking back the U.S. Senate. One of the first things we’re doing this month is asking each of my top supporters to fill out a quick survey on the issues. I want to know what issues matter most to you. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-july-priorities?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf You can take the survey HERE —> Unlike the Democrats, who take all of their cues from the woke left and elites, I’m listening to working Kansans and Americans. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-july-priorities?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf Your input is critical to our strategy, so I hope you’ll take this survey now and let me know what matters most to you. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-july-priorities?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-july-priorities?utm _source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf BEGIN SURVEY »   https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer?utm_so urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And that's exactly what I'm doing. But I can't keep up the fight without your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and Democrats across the country are raising millions to keep their power. I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in 2022 depends on patriots like you standing with us. -Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer?utm_so urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022july6hf CHIP IN NOW This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by: Kansans for Marshall PO Box 1588 Great Bend, KS 67530 Unsubscribe PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL To unsubscribe visit: http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=6c5a18789776ef87

body:
Because Republicans continue to do everything they can to make it harder for you to cast your ballot. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47472109/354413638/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjE5NzFiMi00NGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UKDklP1AcaVbtOYb822fU5klr456CkSi0FakA_STXc=&emci=f668544b-adfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f1971b2-44fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

It might feel early, but today is the perfect time to check your voter registration.

Why now? Because Republicans continue to do everything they can to make it harder for you to cast your ballot. In response to record turnout in 2020, Republicans in states across the country are trumpeting The Big Lie and pushing voter restrictions that will disproportionately impact communities of color, seniors, and students.

**Don't let them win. If you want to be a part of changing our future, there's two things you should do today:**
* **[Make sure you're registered to vote at your current address at iwillvote.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47472110/354413639/-1612268846?state=PA&partner=bobcasey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjE5NzFiMi00NGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UKDklP1AcaVbtOYb822fU5klr456CkSi0FakA_STXc=&emci=f668544b-adfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f1971b2-44fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

* **Forward this email to three friends and make sure they're registered too.**

In 2016, millions of Americans missed their chance to vote because they missed a registration deadline, didn't update their registration, or didn't know how to register. If they checked their registration earlier, the Supreme Court might look a lot different today.

You have a voice, and we're asking you to use it.

**Join your neighbors and friends in being a voter:**

**[Take thirty seconds right now to check or update your registration so you can vote in this year's historic election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47472111/354413640/-1612268846?state=PA&partner=bobcasey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjE5NzFiMi00NGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UKDklP1AcaVbtOYb822fU5klr456CkSi0FakA_STXc=&emci=f668544b-adfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f1971b2-44fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

**Then ask three of your friends to do the same.**

Thanks for helping us make history,

Team Casey | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47472112/354413641/-2022397799?refcode=em22_220706_votreg_gotv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220706_votreg_gotv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjE5NzFiMi00NGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UKDklP1AcaVbtOYb822fU5klr456CkSi0FakA_STXc=)
