name: Izzi Levy
subject: quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ][IMG]

Hi there—it’s Izzi, coming to you live from the campaign trail
with Tim!

So far, the energy and enthusiasm that’s met Tim at every stop has been
unbelievable. Ohioans are even more fired up and ready for change than I
realized. Seriously, is it November yet?

But while we have a minute in between stops, I wanted to ask you a quick
question:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Would you chip in to help keep Tim out on the trail talking to voters?
If we don’t hit our $125,000 Voter Contact goal before the end of the
week, we’ll have to cut Tim’s travel short and risk not reaching key
voters we need to defeat JD Vance in the fall.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1019&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1020&amount=30&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]Other Amount

Look, I usually don’t get carsick. But just the thought of giving back the
Senate Majority to right-wing extremists like Mitch McConnell and JD Vance
has me feeling seriously ill.

That’s why trips like the one Tim and I are on right now are so
important—listening to voters and continuing to spread Tim’s message of
cutting workers in on the deal and putting Ohio first is exactly how we’ll
win this race.

Ohio holds the key to Democrats holding Senate control, which is why we
must support Tim’s efforts to stay on the road and reach as many Ohio
voters as possible.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16074?t=1021&amount=25&akid=4476%2E3611125%2EKrxEf2 ]We need to raise $125,000 before the end of the week to do just that.
So, will you chip in toward our Voter Contact goal ASAP and expand our
Democratic Senate majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hi there—it’s Izzi, coming to you live from the campaign trail with Tim! So far, the energy and enthusiasm that’s met Tim at every stop has been unbelievable. Ohioans are even more fired up and ready for change than I realized. Seriously, is it November yet? But while we have a minute in between stops, I wanted to ask you a quick question: [ ]Would you chip in to help keep Tim out on the trail talking to voters? If we don’t hit our $125,000 Voter Contact goal before the end of the week, we’ll have to cut Tim’s travel short and risk not reaching key voters we need to defeat JD Vance in the fall. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. But just the thought of giving back the Senate Majority to right-wing extremists like Mitch McConnell and JD Vance has me feeling seriously ill. That’s why trips like the one Tim and I are on right now are so important—listening to voters and continuing to spread Tim’s message of cutting workers in on the deal and putting Ohio first is exactly how we’ll win this race. Ohio holds the key to Democrats holding Senate control, which is why we must support Tim’s efforts to stay on the road and reach as many Ohio voters as possible. name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement ✅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Patriot,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738823:6qkwe0okN:m:1:3299561967:4FE482D8D761A8CB94BC943611005295:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---

---
| Patriot, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60738824:6qkwe0okN:m:1:3299561967:4FE482D8D761A8CB94BC943611005295:r "Please click here to donate now")**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs44t7sdat2e6k01tnot70lkirg26apdajd5ojj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chh6apb1cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo79ob1m2q7csr1cgr7eplkcgq34tjme9hb7chheur7eohmemp36ojgmpoebc5gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6tj31c5jcgo74d366aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zitghotvd0bui19pucm2jin7mt63jm3md8hkrk00_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chh6apb1cjh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztht6kbbhoa9s7ohnq36uhjnhulutv27jaqp58bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chh6apb1cjh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv6n5rg5kvnnd31dep71vaktknn3g9f16tm2albg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7chh6apb1cjh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: Stitt is putting politics over veterans

---
Peter,

Did you hear about this? Last week Governor Stitt fired the chair and vice-chair of the Oklahoma Veterans Commission, the controlling board of the state's Department of Veterans Affairs.

It's bad enough that he ousted two men who have served this country just days before the July 4th holiday.

But it gets worse: Stitt fired them just days _after_ the state's primary elections -- in which they publicly supported Stitt’s primary opponent.

[**Serving our veterans shouldn't be political at all -- much less subject to some kind of personal loyalty test to the governor. The general election is underway, and we can elect Joy to lead the state without these political games and corruption. Will you pitch in today to help us fire Stitt?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473962/354422171/-1977889686?refcode=em22_220706_Veterans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473963/354422172/-1977889686?refcode=em22_220706_Veterans&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473964/354422173/-1977889686?refcode=em22_220706_Veterans&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=)

In addition to these sudden firings of veteran leaders, Stitt has also been trying to privatize veterans centers across the state. Despite the corruption and self-dealing we've already seen in this administration's connections with private vendors, Stitt wants to hand over one of the most important functions of our government to profit-seeking businesses.

Thousands of veterans across Oklahoma count on our state VA to help them obtain benefits they've earned with their service, to find out about education and employment opportunities, and to provide support for suicide prevention.

When Stitt fired the Veterans Commission chairs, he made clear that political loyalty to him was more important than having a fully functioning team to guide the VA. These former service members deserve our deepest gratitude. Instead Kevin Stitt showed them the door.

[**If you can make a contribution today, you can help us elect a leader who respects our veterans -- and who knows that serving the people of Oklahoma is far more important than supporting any governor's political ambition.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473969/354422178/-1977889686?refcode=em22_220706_Veterans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=)

Thanks,

Team Joy

PS -- Even if you can't donate today, can you help us make sure that people know about this shameful politicization of Oklahoma's veterans services? If you have a moment, will you share the news story on [**Facebook**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473970/354422179/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfor.com%2Fnews%2Foklahoma-legislature%2Faccusations-of-political-retaliation-after-governor-stitt-fires-veterans-commission-chairman-days-after-primary%2F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=&emci=5236ba46-42fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e8de8668-4bfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=13997030) and [**Twitter**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47473971/354422180/343342365?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkfor.com%2Fnews%2Foklahoma-legislature%2Faccusations-of-political-retaliation-after-governor-stitt-fires-veterans-commission-chairman-days-after-primary%2F&text=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=&emci=5236ba46-42fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e8de8668-4bfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=13997030)?

clean_body: | Peter, Did you hear about this? Last week Governor Stitt fired the chair and vice-chair of the Oklahoma Veterans Commission, the controlling board of the state's Department of Veterans Affairs. It's bad enough that he ousted two men who have served this country just days before the July 4th holiday. But it gets worse: Stitt fired them just days after the state's primary elections -- in which they publicly supported Stitt’s primary opponent. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In addition to these sudden firings of veteran leaders, Stitt has also been trying to privatize veterans centers across the state. Despite the corruption and self-dealing we've already seen in this administration's connections with private vendors, Stitt wants to hand over one of the most important functions of our government to profit-seeking businesses. Thousands of veterans across Oklahoma count on our state VA to help them obtain benefits they've earned with their service, to find out about education and employment opportunities, and to provide support for suicide prevention. When Stitt fired the Veterans Commission chairs, he made clear that political loyalty to him was more important than having a fully functioning team to guide the VA. These former service members deserve our deepest gratitude. Instead Kevin Stitt showed them the door. = Thanks, Team Joy PS -- Even if you can't donate today, can you help us make sure that people know about this shameful politicization of Oklahoma's veterans services? If you have a moment, will you share the news story on and ? = ** = ** \(%27refcode%27\%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGRlODY2OC00YmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlZXGGOQDTVNTjcfgCAHJt16c23OOHplFNHaFMP4lwo=) PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOY HOFMEISTER 2022 Friends of Joy Hofmeister 2022 PO Box 54533 Oklahoma City, OK 73154 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Tina
subject: Action on gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Last week, the Trump-dominated Supreme Court issued a ruling that will make it harder for states to protect people from gun violence. Tina immediately condemned their decision, and she is the only candidate for Governor who is committed to addressing the gun violence crisis. As Speaker, she was proud to champion common-sense gun safety legislation that has saved lives. As our next Governor, she knows there is more work to be done. **On the other hand, Tina’s conservative opponents have always sided with the gun lobby and tried to block progress on gun violence prevention.** Betsy Johnson - a proud machine gun owner - spent her time as an elected official voting against gun safety legislation, earning herself a 100% approval rating from the NRA. And Christine Drazan has shown that she will follow the Republican party’s pro-gun playbook every step of the way. Tina has challenged her opponents to a public forum to let voters know how they’ll tackle gun violence in our communities. So far, neither Johnson nor Drazan have agreed to join. [**Enough is enough. Oregonians deserve a Governor who will take real action to save lives from gun violence, not side with the gun lobby. Will you chip in $10 to strengthen our people-powered campaign and stop our conservative opponents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474383/354424361/1320253387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDgxZjIxMS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WaJlGYI4yk611QwRtXEf1ckJsk8C47mt9dJ6Vy_1ZYA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474384/354424362/1320253387?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDgxZjIxMS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WaJlGYI4yk611QwRtXEf1ckJsk8C47mt9dJ6Vy_1ZYA=)

subject: Endorsed By Jmore Living!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m honored to receive the endorsement of JMORE Living, and I’d like to give my warm thanks to Dr. Scott Rifkin for his friendship and trust! As Governor, I’ll be a proud champion and advocate for Maryland’s Jewish communities. I’ll fight back against anti-Semitism by making Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion a foundational element of state government. I’ll make sure all students, regardless of ZIP code, get the high quality education they deserve. And I’ll grow Maryland’s economy with family supporting jobs in industries of the future.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=20.22]
With the primary election right around the corner, our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Will you help us pull ahead even further in this competitive race by chipping in to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to raise an additional $2,265 that will help us print more field literature and yard signs, run more ads, and ultimately secure the votes we need to win this competitive race.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement]
The Washington Post has stated that this election could be the most expensive in our state’s history. It’s absolutely imperative that we continue to meet our grassroots fundraising goals, so that we have the resources to fire on all cylinders in these final, critical weeks before election day.
Any amount you can give is greatly appreciated. I’m proud that the overwhelming majority of our grassroots donations come from supporters right here within Maryland. Thanks to you, we’re leading in endorsements, we’re leading in the polls, and we’re leading in ideas and vision. Together, we’re going to build a people-centered administration that every day will be focused on providing responsive, respectful, and results-oriented service to Marylanders.
In this critical period for our state, our challenges are sweeping. We must rise to the urgency of this moment with equally-sweeping solutions. As Governor, I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our families into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Enough talk. Let’s get it done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
P.S. You can read the full endorsement at this link. [https://jmoreliving.com/2022/06/24/dr-scott-rifkin-vote-for-peter-franchot/]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmoreendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

Peter, shhh we've got a secret, and we can't let Trudy know...
You see, today is Trudy's birthday! **Our team is spending the day celebrating Trudy and all the incredible strengths she will bring to Washington: her integrity, her compassion, and a nurse's heart.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474963/354426536/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk79-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmNkMTFjNS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_nRCtO0dwlYmNTVeq03lCrJrnFG3IvUFibR8nN4xQI=)

name: Letitia James
subject: I was 18 in this picture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
It was 1976. I was in my senior year at Fort Hamilton High School in Brooklyn, and I was scrambling to figure out what direction I wanted my career to go in. I knew that I was lucky to even have the opportunity to decide what I wanted to do next. So many people from my school didn’t have that luxury.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474981/354426641/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk559-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmNkMTFjNS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVqu5sKhMWevkeY0a6sSov4q7i5A2keV7_l-0zfzUgw=)
Peter, that’s me you’re looking at.

It was 1976. I was in my senior year at Fort Hamilton High School in Brooklyn, and I was scrambling to figure out what direction I wanted my career to go in. I knew that I was lucky to even have the opportunity to decide what I wanted to do next. So many people from my school didn’t have that luxury.
But every time I thought about what career I wanted to pursue, I kept coming back to the civil rights marches and protests that I encountered when I was younger. The Civil Rights Movement consumed the better part of my childhood, and it instilled a fiery passion for justice and equality in me from a young age.

As a child, I loved to read. I remember getting lost in the stacks and picking up a book on Justice Thurgood Marshall. It was then, inspired by his story, that I first began to toy with the idea of law school – at a time when so few lawyers were Black or female, let alone both. I knew that having a law degree would be a valuable tool in the fight for justice and equality, so I decided to pursue law school despite the high barriers to entry.
**Back then, I didn’t know that my fight for justice and my interest in law would take me to elected office – and I definitely never pictured myself becoming attorney general of New York. All I knew was that I wanted to help families like my own,_and that’s exactly what I’ve done. _**
Peter, I’ve spent every moment as attorney general fighting to protect the voiceless and vulnerable – but I need your help to continue my work. **I’m up for re-election this November, and I have to defeat my Republican opponent to continue to fight as your attorney general for another four years, so please: **
**[Will you make a donation of $5 or more to my campaign now so I can defeat my GOP opponent, continue to hold the powerful and corrupt accountable, and fight for justice?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474983/354426642/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk559-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmNkMTFjNS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVqu5sKhMWevkeY0a6sSov4q7i5A2keV7_l-0zfzUgw=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47474984/354426644/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk559-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmNkMTFjNS00ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVqu5sKhMWevkeY0a6sSov4q7i5A2keV7_l-0zfzUgw=)
---
Thank you for your support in this fight.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=kBOHJjX7bmWPfs5k8LGsu8vaztHMDIEWX74enmYes1leyWHnkA2zVMR6sfPMVrqoE1g6B%2FCCfI%2FIZcXn4duvEWPxsY30teR7KetAaII14ZS2w4MN6N18OCi4Yf%2BS5YJ%2FtZoo6LEZM9HXmUNiXxCslOcqjchAXzQmHhyFsZliU1vDqdxXN5jdisBBVb3sS6qkHkHYD0ZaGbq8TVWSeRUPN%2FhV%2FNM5Qpdeyms%2FqqTRwOdNS%2FvTgo1DDq3ivugE42ZZiLMLWJ6zj0gsz0UGRgZJRG1gWpW5DFN0Y7Rfq3W%2B435hfkIjNbUQXs0ZbIdBKul%2FajcYCkmW1jEiXflsjE2EVfmt1CJVRr%2FQxXQkmF04bMB%2F2UXKuKGz59i0kY4XhBegekbh1MhfjrvjRne8yfKsfRkaRwJCo4R%2B1IljJXloSd%2BfpQcYcXH1Htr6EiHOLBTy) James for NY

name: AOTL Litigation Update
subject: Friend, have you seen the news out of Louisiana?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
What has happened in Louisiana cannot become a norm across the rest of the nation...
|
---

Friend, have you seen the news out of Louisiana?

The United States Supreme Court has just blocked the implementation of a remedial map that would have allowed Black voters in Louisiana the ability to elect their candidate of choice in two congressional districts. Although nearly a third of the population is Black, Louisiana will only have one out of six majority black districts.

As if partisan gerrymandering wasn’t bad enough, conservative legislatures have gerrymandered maps that disenfranchise voters of color. Louisiana is just one example, Republicans are pushing their manipulated maps until they find the ruling they like in states across the country:
* In Louisiana, a district court judge ruled that these Republican maps violated the VRA and needed a second majority-black district. _The U.S. Supreme Court reinstated it._
* In Alabama, a federal court struck down the Republican Legislature’s congressional map, saying that “black voters have less opportunity than other Alabamians to elect candidates of their choice." _The Supreme Court reinstated this one too._
* In Florida, a circuit court judge ruled that Ron DeSantis’ congressional map violated the constitution because “it diminishes African Americans’ ability to elect candidates of their choice.” _It was the Florida State Supreme Court that let this map slip through._

[**Conservatives will keep creating these unfair, segregated maps to help them win elections. We will continue fighting back against unfair maps, in and out of court, but we need your help. Can we count on your donation to support our cause?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47475492/354428793/253585351?refcode=20220706_AOTL_C_resend_lascotus_redliteXopenersxchi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY2MWYzZjdiLTRlZmQtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UfOmqCtR6Xq7VzlXO6UQM0T8xv8Cz99CAuDAyLCl66o=)

For decades, people of color have been excluded and alienated by the redistricting process. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana continue this trend -- packing and cracking voters of color in districts to marginalize their political influence.

At All On The Line, we want fair and representative maps. Maps that do not value one political party over the other. Maps that do not isolate and marginalize specific communities. Maps that will lead to competitive elections. The Republican drawn maps in Louisiana do none of these things.

[**We need your continued support -- make a donation to support our fight against gerrymandered maps. What has happened in Louisiana cannot become a norm across the rest of the nation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47475499/354428800/253585351?refcode=20220706_AOTL_C_resend_lascotus_redliteXopenersxchi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY2MWYzZjdiLTRlZmQtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UfOmqCtR6Xq7VzlXO6UQM0T8xv8Cz99CAuDAyLCl66o=)

name: Nick Savas, Wade Herring HQ
subject: Following up with our plan...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0706 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0706]
Peter, we’ve got a tough race ahead.
This is the most flippable district in Georgia, but the truth is when we’re up against a 30-year career politician, the odds are against us.
We started building our campaign a year ago knowing that victory this year was going to require a never-before-seen coalition of people passionate about change in the First District.
Now, with four months until November 8th, we’re launching the next phase of our campaign. Here’s our plan to flip the odds in our favor:
1. Expand our field program and meet voters at their doors across the district to discuss the local issues that are important to them.
2. Grow our network of supporters and activate our volunteers – we need our Wade Brigade mobilized throughout 15 counties! ( click here to sign up to volunteer [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VGN6z1lOhkW2EkSFTGs0mw2] )
3. Conduct polling and survey voters to learn more about what matters most to them in this election ( click here to fill out our 2022 Priorities survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2] )
4. Launch our general election print & digital advertising – mail and TV ads are the most effective way to reach a large number of voters ( click here to help fund our ad programs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0706] )
5. Send Wade to Washington!
Don’t get me wrong – this is a hefty agenda and we have plenty of work to do in the next few months. But thanks to supporters like you and the momentum we’ve built during this past year, we know we have a path to victory in November.
If you’re able, please contribute whatever you can today to drive our plan forward for the next four months. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0706]
Let’s flip the First District!
In this together,
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager | Wade Herring for Congress

clean_body: [] Peter, we’ve got a tough race ahead. This is the most flippable district in Georgia, but the truth is when we’re up against a 30-year career politician, the odds are against us. We started building our campaign a year ago knowing that victory this year was going to require a never-before-seen coalition of people passionate about change in the First District. Now, with four months until November 8th, we’re launching the next phase of our campaign. Here’s our plan to flip the odds in our favor: 1. Expand our field program and meet voters at their doors across the district to discuss the local issues that are important to them. 2. Grow our network of supporters and activate our volunteers – we need our Wade Brigade mobilized throughout 15 counties! ( click here to sign up to volunteer [] ) 3. Conduct polling and survey voters to learn more about what matters most to them in this election ( click here to fill out our 2022 Priorities survey [] ) 4. Launch our general election print & digital advertising – mail and TV ads are the most effective way to reach a large number of voters ( click here to help fund our ad programs [] ) 5. Send Wade to Washington! Don’t get me wrong – this is a hefty agenda and we have plenty of work to do in the next few months. subject: re: “Someone you love may need a choice”

body:
We need to spread our message visibly and proudly >> |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47475606/354429272/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlY2VlYi00ZWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0oNWBBa6OR3pgJyeqFYBoKSS8W5r7irTUjNj7W0Wy0=)
Folks — My husband and I believe that a woman’s health care decisions are both personal and private – and best kept between herself and her doctor. A half-century ago, the Supreme Court agreed, establishing in their _Roe v. Wade_ decision that women have a constitutional right to an abortion. Unfortunately, attacks on our autonomy to make these private decisions have escalated over the years. Last month, the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe_ and rolled back these rights, opening the door for the government – rather than patients and their doctors – to determine under what circumstances women must bear children. This decision has subjected women in about half our states to extreme abortion bans or restrictions, threatening women’s health and their lives. While Michael was back in D.C. fighting for new laws to protect women’s freedom, last month I was fueled by frustration and got busy with his team to design some campaign gear to allow us collectively to raise our voices in support of women and their right to be the boss of their reproductive health and, consequently, their lives. Michael and I both understand that the decision to have a child, or not, is deeply personal and that people sometimes find themselves in circumstances that make a pregnancy, or raising a child, untenable. Regardless of why a woman chooses to terminate her pregnancy, the freedom to make that decision is fundamental. We are committed to doing everything we can to ensure that women can continue to control this aspect of their lives... and that means we are fighting, in the Senate and on the streets, to protect the constitutional rights outlined in _Roe v. Wade_. The majority of Americans — and a large majority of Coloradans — believe women should have this fundamental right. But in order to show the strength of our movement, we need to spread our message visibly and proudly. **[That’s why I hope you’ll wear your support for the right to choose and make a purchase from our Reproductive Freedom line today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47475608/354429274/-1704673047?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlY2VlYi00ZWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0oNWBBa6OR3pgJyeqFYBoKSS8W5r7irTUjNj7W0Wy0=&emci=4713eb9d-42fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=246eceeb-4efd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1295540)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47475610/354429276/-1704673047?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDZlY2VlYi00ZWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0oNWBBa6OR3pgJyeqFYBoKSS8W5r7irTUjNj7W0Wy0=&emci=4713eb9d-42fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=246eceeb-4efd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1295540)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Terrorist Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
They are vandalizing churches all over the country. They are screaming and bullying outside the Justices' homes. They are posting their addresses and kids' schools on the internet. They firebombed a crisis pregnancy center in Buffalo. And, of course, one fanatic arrived armed at Justice Brett Kavanaugh's house to assassinate him.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Senate Conservatives Fund.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ)**.
---

---
| |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The media is trying to hide it and Democrats are trying to distract you. **But right now, as you read this, the woke, pro-abortion Left is waging a campaign of political terror against pro-life Americans and the U.S. Supreme Court.**
They are vandalizing churches all over the country. They are screaming and bullying outside the Justices' homes. They are posting their addresses and kids' schools on the internet. They firebombed a crisis pregnancy center in Buffalo. And, of course, one fanatic arrived armed at Justice Brett Kavanaugh's house to assassinate him.
This violence was inevitable as soon as the draft opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was leaked to the press. That was the whole point of the leak. They want pro-abortion extremists to stop the decision _by any means necessary. _
**[Help us fight the real domestic terrorists!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ)**
Meanwhile, in Congress, Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez blocked legislation giving the Justices more security. Despite the **arson** , **attempted murder** , and the **constant escalation of the attacks** , Pelosi said, _" No one is in danger." _
There is only one way to stop them: **Build a Conservative Senate that prevents the woke, socialist Left from ever controlling the Supreme Court again.**
**[Help build a pro-life conservative majority in the Senate!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ)**
For decades, the Court ruled over Americans like medieval aristocrats - unaccountable, unrepresentative, and contemptuous of the people and their values. We fought for 50 years through Congresses and Administrations controlled by both parties and through repeated betrayals by our own leaders. But now we have won - and it's only the beginning.
The Supreme Court overturning _Roe_ will create new opportunities for school choice, immigration, religious freedom, and gutting the Deep State. But as long as the Senate is closely divided - and Senate Republicans stay squishy - the Left will try to undo all we have done.
**[Help elect true conservatives to the Senate today!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ)**
We need to slam the door shut. We need to run the table in 2022 and 2024 - in primaries and general elections. We must support principled, fighting pro-life conservatives and show the abortionists that their violent extremism cannot win.
The Abortion Left has gone from extremism to terrorism. We have to send them from majority to minority in the Senate - to end their reign of terror and rescue America from their threats.
**Only SCF candidates have the courage and the convictions to see this fight through to the end.**
**[To save the unborn, to save our Constitution, and to save our country - donate today!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aB892DubNBTAcc0YZgMU9zWA/JNCSbT3KP763y8QGR3KNgfGQ)**
Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help us stand up to the liberals in both parties. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Makki?=
subject: Join Amanda @ Governor DeSantis Hosted FL-13 Debate
body:
Governor DeSantis Hosts FL-13 Debate! Join Amanda! | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4d7e7297c0&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | | **Join Amanda Makki as she debates her FL-13 Opponents at Governor DeSantis’ Sunshine Summit in Hollywood, FL ! ** Hello Friend!

As you may have heard, Governor DeSantis is hosting four debates on July 23rd and we are so excited that FL-13 will be part of it! Amanda is eager to debate her opponents at the Sunshine Summit in Hollywood, FL and would love to have you in the audience to cheer her on!

**_Tickets_** to the debate can be purchased for $100 online at www.sunshinesummit.org.

_**Roundtrip Transportation**_** ** from St. Petersburg will be provided for a $100 contribution to the Amanda Makki for Congress campaign (See attached flier) - SEATS ARE LIMITED - PLEASE RSVP BY JULY 12th.

Payment can be made online or via check:
[https://secure.winred.com/amanda-makki-for-congress/2022launch](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=627c07fcd8&e=c2296cffff)
or
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=e711e24ddf&e=c2296cffff)
---
Community Conservatives Unite touting the groundswell of Republican support for Amanda Makki in FL-13
| [Amanda, I’ll be joining the Team Makki bus to the Sunshine Summit! ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=87972f6dc0&e=c2296cffff "Amanda, I’ll be joining the Team Makki bus to the Sunshine Summit! ")
---
|
---
|

clean_body: Governor DeSantis Hosts FL-13 Debate! Join Amanda! | | | | | | | | Join Amanda Makki as she debates her FL-13 Opponents at Governor DeSantis’ Sunshine Summit in Hollywood, FL ! Hello Friend! As you may have heard, Governor DeSantis is hosting four debates on July 23rd and we are so excited that FL-13 will be part of it! Amanda is eager to debate her opponents at the Sunshine Summit in Hollywood, FL and would love to have you in the audience to cheer her on! Tickets to the debate can be purchased for $100 online at www.sunshinesummit.org. Roundtrip Transportation from St. Petersburg will be provided for a $100 contribution to the Amanda Makki for Congress campaign (See attached flier) - SEATS ARE LIMITED - PLEASE RSVP BY JULY 12th. Payment can be made online or via check: or Amanda Makki for Congress PO Box 47483 St. Petersburg, FL 33743 | | Community Conservatives Unite touting the groundswell of Republican support for Amanda Makki in FL-13 | "Amanda, I’ll be joining the Team Makki bus to the Sunshine Summit! " | | | Amanda is PROUD to be ENDORSED by 13 Pinellas Mayors! | "Join the Mayors in Showing Your Support for Amanda!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.amandamakki.com | | Copyright © 2022 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi =?utf-8?b?KEphcmVk4oCZcw==?= dog)
subject: Emailing about my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

My name is Obi-Wan Kenobi (Obi for short) and I know what you are thinking and yes I pawed this email about my dad Jared Moskowitz.

I’m really proud of my dad–he’s been endorsed by the Humane Society and has fought for folks in my community since he was a State Representative.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-email-july?refcode=dog [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-email-july?refcode=dog]

When my dad told me and my brothers that he was running for Congress, I didn’t know what that meant. And honestly, I still don’t, but I know that my dad is working very hard at something. I sit on the stairs and wait for him to come home, and I’m very good at it.

But last week, while my dad and I were watching TV (I fell asleep) he told me he was endorsed by an organization that fights for animal welfare and that he will always make sure I’m safe.

If you’re like me and you like eating and running and barking and belly rubs , will you chip in to help my dad’s campaign for Congress right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-email-july?refcode=dog]

Please tell all of your human friends to vote for my dad, Jared Moskowitz!

May the force be with you,

–Obi

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

name: Never Again PAC
subject: 👋 Meet Mike Garcia – then unseat him!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Let’s get Mike the Opportunist out of office ❌ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47455494/354375470/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3MzM1YmViLTMzZmQtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V4wXEyDF1holpB8-H7q9T8e-IcYP21ImM-ik_nQzJ9A=&emci=c055cd44-8bfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=a7335beb-33fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Hey team,

**Are you ready to meet Mike Garcia...then unseat him?**
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47455499/354375475/442748649?refcode=em22_220706_garcia_fndd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220706_garcia_fndd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3MzM1YmViLTMzZmQtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V4wXEyDF1holpB8-H7q9T8e-IcYP21ImM-ik_nQzJ9A=)
Mike Garcia is the Republican currently representing the people of California’s 27th Congressional District. Like every other member of the Treason Caucus, Mike is a hypocrite. Although he claims to be a proud defender of the Constitution, Mike was quick to throw all his supposed principles out the window once Trump started spreading false allegations of election fraud (AKA “The Big Lie”) in the 2020 election.

Following months of Trump’s lies about voter fraud and a conspiracy to steal the election, Mike announced his plan to reject the results. **He would then go on to object to the certification of the states’ electoral college votes, voting to overturn the results of a fair and democratic election based solely on the whims of a wannabe dictator.**

Mike and the Treason Caucus didn’t hesitate to neglect their constitutional duty and the results were disastrous. Their self-interested efforts to please their overlord led to the horrific attack on the Capitol and our democracy. **And just like his “commitment” to the Constitution, Mike’s dedication to overthrowing the election vanished once it was no longer politically convenient for him** – he later begrudgingly acknowledged Joe Biden’s win only after facing backlash for his actions.

When you think about it, it actually starts to make sense — they’re both terrible, divisive leaders who put themselves ahead of the people they’re supposed to serve. Ron DeSantis is trying so hard to emulate everything Trump. But guess what? We’re going to trump DeSantis this November. = = Florida doesn’t need a copycat Trump as governor. Florida needs an honest, dependable leader with a record of service — someone who is actually interested in solving the problems facing hardworking Florida families. Ron DeSantis will NEVER be interested in anything except becoming president. Fortunately, Floridians have caught on to Ron’s game, and the polls show they’re ready for change. Charlie Crist is leading in recent polls and Floridians from across the state are coming together to win this race by donating whatever they can. AND IT’S WORKING: Team Crist almost has enough funds to take on the millionaires and billionaires backing DeSantis. But we still need a few more donations to meet our goal! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, \- Team Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Scott Perry worked to tear down democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Last week, the January 6th Committee dropped some bombs.

Not only did we find out that Trump physically assaulted a secret service agent, he made sure his armed supporters could storm the Capitol. We also heard about elected officials who asked for pardons for the parts they played in the Jan. 6 violence. One name stands out in particular: PA Rep. Scott Perry.

He knew he was guilty of playing a MAJOR role in Trump's attempts to overturn the election. Texts Perry swapped with then-White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, show he actually believed the conspiracy theory he helped push, known as "Italygate." He spread the lie that an Italian defense contractor worked with the CIA to change votes from Biden to Trump using military satellites. It'd be funny if it weren't so dangerous.

People who try to tear down our government should NOT be allowed to run it. If we want to make real change, NOW is the time to act. We have to keep putting pressure on our leaders and mobilizing the progressive movement in PA.

Donate today to bolster our fight against those who seek power to take away ours.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=070622&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=070622&amount=10]

Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=070622]

Together, we can make an impact. Thanks for standing up for democracy and progressive values.

Laura Nevitt
Executive Director
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We must do more on gun safety
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The Senate’s bill is a step in the right direction, but only a step. We must keep pushing for more.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=463%2E5257348%2EYdqTPD)
Derek,
In recent months, we’ve seen a horrifying uptick in gun violence. Mass shootings are happening almost weekly, sometimes daily. We saw yet more terrifying acts of violence unfold at July 4 celebrations over the weekend as parade goers fled for their lives. These events are almost numbing in their alarming frequency.
**Our children should not fear for their lives going to school or attending a parade.**
Congress just _finally_ passed a bipartisan bill closing dangerous loopholes and making it harder for certain individuals to quickly get a gun.
**But I'm going to be honest, it's simply not enough. Not nearly.**
The Senate’s bill is a step in the right direction, but only a step. We must keep pushing for more.
Our children, teachers, friends, and family members are _still_ losing their lives from this scourge — and deadly assault weapons like the AR-15 are _still_ being sold across the country. All because the majority of Senate Republicans value guns more than the lives of our kids.
We can — and must — do more: Universal background checks. Reinstating the federal assault weapons ban. Taking the fight directly to the gun lobby by repealing their blanket legal immunity — the list goes on. These are proven ways to reduce the number of lives lost to shootings in our country, and I refuse to give up and stop fighting until more action is taken.
I know you do, too.
[**Add your name today to stand with me in demanding more congressional action be taken to pass life-saving legislation like banning AR-15s:**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220706-gun-safety.UfILR_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220706_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=463%2E5257348%2EYdqTPD)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20220706-gun-safety.UfILR_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220706_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=463%2E5257348%2EYdqTPD)
---
Thank you for taking a stand with us in the fight for our children and families. It could not be more important.
— Adam Schiff
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=463%2E5257348%2EYdqTPD) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=463%2E5257348%2EYdqTPD)**

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: We can't go on like this
body:
| |
---
Peter, On Monday, a gunman opened fire on the Highland Park, Illinois, 4th of July parade, killing at least six people. To everyone who lost loved ones yesterday, I am so sorry. **** We’re all beyond sick of this. Mass shootings have become commonplace in today’s America. We’ve seen that Americans can’t feel safe at grocery stores, schools, and now neighborhood parades. **** America’s government failed the people of Highland Park on the Fourth of July. A democracy that cannot serve its people and protect families at a community gathering is not functioning properly. **** The upcoming election in November is now crucial for the future of American democracy. We need leaders who represent everyone, not just one segment of the community. Max Miller is running to serve Donald Trump and the far right. I’m running to serve every member of our community. On Monday, our campaign attended the Parma, Ohio 4th of July parade, where we spoke with community members about what they want to see from their leaders. [Our campaign far outperformed Max Miller’s campaign at the parade](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpCHr7mURTnm0URDEjgZmA0qfjoebGesCDayt1gz2-wdfxDbia4G44H7nHauYYoNPmd7OyIqBbgNID_wa94LkTwwzk8kFaSjxRL3xkG0QVgIIWCP-niMWf_L-uIhU63rL_AOusSYCZPnt7oZIq8eyUHEYV-FXv0FscmyQKHCFQdkHkGTRyIi-jwLxZwNzywEH46FgzG2AGap3iACMMXJDiNeBc5cjack0RFfsC_Z6LyovfIGTRpfiCLwnJjUMx9M315YUHR1t5KZvurMimxca4PWIgIehES-R4qZZaAmRWdZ2omh0I_VFdM7bTI4CcE-ow/3ni/8X7FhU3DTjaunYAgEF40Xg/h0/1EACNHL8szbpdrH7QgeQ9FBQiAxc_H52je77agIrKCo) because unlike Max, we’re able to speak to Ohioans from all backgrounds.

---
Our campaign’s mission is to highlight how we can bridge the divide and address the real issues facing our nation. In Congress, I will enact popular, common sense gun reforms that will ensure Americans feel safe in public places. Max Miller won’t do anything that President Trump and the far right don’t approve of. The choice is clear. [Pitch in here to help us win this November. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yD2dA-JW12hGQJn41T96d8vDfhrnM2STVA8JLJGCSB2Nq8ZE_YMx5JJ7zJUgm-UdMuCZJbrvmpxuoPMgh2JpGRPQhmWYHvqVPpVkOo3QuHBJGe7J5g7wNM7ZGvaqxXNjrH7kTrjTv0ZlxgFTSV3hSt4FAKNJ09jUGD2zTVCecZUp2oUdurNEaCDCSMufQwFV4bc1H73JUeIRI2eJkNAhQiHzhaHSdDrkdBEE7Eo_qJnGX0TRkdkxIdGRv-3IB5wvMVEelAQyDv74f6_YjzM2BYRFWFEcTOEfcqrDMhQADWaQ_Z1sCJW4BJwZsNJVR2nLE/3ni/8X7FhU3DTjaunYAgEF40Xg/h2/nPyk0v11R9wQkk0h9hRKp43v_mrMXHx9sq07oHVwgno)

body:
Thanks to you, we hit our quarterly goal and are starting July strong!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47478477/354440644/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220706TY_N_MK_90DO_6_G_N_TESTB_logo_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzNDFhOC01OWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPClZcUBFzO-jc_Q4Jv_urdUzi01NwuJPEgNIp09Xak=) Team, **Your generous support never ceases to amaze me.** I want to start off by thanking you for helping me close the second quarter in a strong position. My team is busy preparing my first quarterly report since the GOP selected a QAnon conspiracy theorist as their nominee, but they tell me **we knocked it out of the park.** Not only did we exceed our original goal of $2,000, but we raised the stakes to $3,500, **and beat that too.** **I am so grateful to have you on this team.** This campaign is a team effort, and the only way we’re going to win is **_together_.** There is no sugarcoating it: the GOP stacked the odds against us with another shameless gerrymander. Now the GOP will send millions of dollars into this race to take back the House, and install a QAnon extremist as Congressman. The tide is high, but we will hold steadfast to our convictions and win this race. We must preserve our progress, and stand together in this fight. I am so grateful to have you beside me in this campaign. Thankfully, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47478478/354440646/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220706TY_N_MK_90DO_6_G_N_TESTB_thumbnail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzNDFhOC01OWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPClZcUBFzO-jc_Q4Jv_urdUzi01NwuJPEgNIp09Xak=) Marcy Kaptur [**_P.S. – July is here, and we need to get rolling on our third-quarter numbers. Can you help me get ahead with a $5 contribution today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47478479/354440647/812264984?refcode=EM_FR_220706TY_N_MK_90DO_6_G_N_TESTB_l1_&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTgzNDFhOC01OWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPClZcUBFzO-jc_Q4Jv_urdUzi01NwuJPEgNIp09Xak=) | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help Marcy by giving monthly?**

clean_body: | | | | Fighting Tyranny | Peter, The Biden Administration is the most tyrannical administration in history. Their radical policies are endangering freedom in America unlike any administration we have seen. From mandating a vaccine just to be able to work and feed your family, to the all-out assault on our 2nd Amendment Rights. Freedom is on the ballot in this election Alaska needs a fighter to defend our freedoms that we hold so dear. That is why Kelly is running for Senate. She’s dedicated her career to fighting for the American people. | This is no time for weakness and compromise. As Ronald Reagan once said “Freedom is never more than one generation from extinction.” Thank you, Team Tshibaka | STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==

I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Let’s get down to work.
body:
We might have come out on top in the primary. We might be one step closer to restoring Law and Order to our state, and Keeping Nevada Safe from single-party rule.
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,
We might have come out on top in the primary. We might be one step closer to restoring Law and Order to our state, and Keeping Nevada Safe from single-party rule.
But here's the thing, Peter, our work is just getting started.
I didn't enter this race just to come out on top in a Primary Election (although we did have to overcome a multi-million dollar effort from Sisolak's D.C. buddies in order to do so)...
I launched this run for Governor to continue doing what I have for the past 30+ years now - that's protecting our Nevada communities and our way of life.
Because simply put, we can't count on Steve Sisolak to get that job done.
He was more focused on expanding his emergency powers than helping struggling Nevada school children. He listens to Gavin Newsom instead of our state's small business owners. And he stands with criminals instead of law enforcement.
When I take his job in Carson City, I'm going to fix that. Just like I proudly stood for our rights and safety as Sheriff, I'm going to do the same as your next Governor.
Because I know that's our only choice - this election is going to decide the future of Nevada for decades to come... And with everything at stake, we can't afford to give anything less than our best effort if we want to get the law enforcement leadership we deserve!
That's where I need the support of folks like you.
You helped power our campaign through the primary - but now, we need to double down on our efforts with the General Election nearly 4 months out.
I hope you'll please keep up the fight... [If we continue to stand together, we can WIN this close race, END single-party rule in Carson City, and above all else, Keep Nevada Safe! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SgT7DCQRBFNgEK3C2RX4ronCWApYp8Gecl0V92wC29iLoR6oFt5o9QKTarEns1jRjXH3NBzrQVtChWTilQEEvKctVBxs5ISS_z51QsRsWMoyeAkD7R5eePuCpr58o1-0HMa0p-tz9TX_KK90qHt2A5b8vLBJBmKyzDKxw3fNLuZfH2ycbWwpIRSFIwsWmtCv5J5AetY3AmmAIRdSDAGLZ69xFyS_rDY7TzVU9ZmbViU=&c=MZCT5e4QFeuzDXkdQaTF0kncKU9z53McR0e5kRdNGlGy1d2WUXXgxQ==&ch=21Uzhl2rmD4H5Dditxd_mXFo80RRHAxSIXmf5HqHOykcintLJ4pfHQ==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Brnovich?=
subject: Priority #1: Secure the Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
‌ |
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/priority-1-secure-the-border?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| As your Attorney General, here’s what I’ve done to curb the flow of crime across our border:
* **Stopped the DHS (Department of Homeland Security) from implementing “Permanent Guidance,”** a policy that HALTS deportations, even for convicted sex offenders and murderers.
* **Prevented the Biden administration from ending Title 42,** a Trump-era policy that reduced immigration to prevent the spread of Covid-19.
* **Sued the DHS for violating the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA),** a policy that requires federal agencies to submit environmental impact statements.

_Let’s break this last one down for a second, because this has got to be one of my favorite things to do in politics:_

Take the extreme left’s policies _that they themselves don’t follow_ (EPA regulations, masks, constantly changing woke-language standards, etc.)... and shove it right back in their faces!

In this case, I sued the DHS for not following the radical left’s own absurd environmental policy standards.
**The DHS wanted to stop border wall construction** , allowing more illegal immigrants to cross our border (while leaving litter all over _our_ beautiful Arizona desert, including in the Coronado National Forest)...

And I wasn’t having it.
The environment is very important to me.
Very. Very. Important.
So I wasn’t about to let the soft-on-crime Democrats get away with damaging it...
**And border wall construction continued.**
Here are some more things I’ve done to fight illegal immigration:
* **Defended the Public Charge Rule,** which requires noncitizens to **prove** that they can provide for _themselves_ financially without depending on _your tax dollars._
* **Sued the DHS for the Biden administration’s “Interim Guidance” policy that effectively ended the enforcement of immigration law,** despite testimony from ICE officials that doing so would harm public safety.
* **Blocked “Blood Wires” sent via Western Union,** a secret network of funding that’s financed drug cartels for decades.

But here's the thing:
Even though I’m proud of the actions I’ve taken as your Attorney General...

_There’s only so much that I can do in my current position._
That’s because it's the federal government’s job to protect our border... not Arizona's.
Unfortunately, the radical left has that job now, too.

And they're not very good at it.
[**That’s precisely what I plan on changing in the United States Senate.**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=fc89d630c1&e=6dcd2506d1)

Because with a Republican majority in the Senate, we can actually enforce our laws that protect our border.

We can also stop the radical left Democrats from implementing extreme immigration reform, too.
These reforms would effectively legalize mass immigration (and grant amnesty to all of the illegal aliens already in our country).

[**If you want to protect our border as much as I do, then click here to join my campaign.**](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=c815ade39b&e=6dcd2506d1)
Sincerely,
Mark

Prevented the Biden administration from ending Title 42, a Trump-era policy that reduced immigration to prevent the spread of Covid-19. Sued the DHS for violating the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA), a policy that requires federal agencies to submit environmental impact statements. Let’s break this last one down for a second, because this has got to be one of my favorite things to do in politics: Take the extreme left’s policies that they themselves don’t follow (EPA regulations, masks, constantly changing woke-language standards, etc.)... and shove it right back in their faces! In this case, I sued the DHS for not following the radical left’s own absurd environmental policy standards. The DHS wanted to stop border wall construction , allowing more illegal immigrants to cross our border (while leaving litter all over our beautiful Arizona desert, including in the Coronado National Forest)... And I wasn’t having it. The environment is very important to me. Very. Very. Important. So I wasn’t about to let the soft-on-crime Democrats get away with damaging it... name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, When I look at where our country stands under Joe Biden, I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t worried.

He’s making a mockery of America and letting terrorists, dictators, and thugs walk all over us.

I fought these people as a Green Beret, and let me tell you, they won’t stop until they destroy America.

With weakness in the White House, we must have a strong Republican majority in Congress who will pick up after Biden’s failures.

clean_body: | | | Peter, When I look at where our country stands under Joe Biden, I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t worried. He’s making a mockery of America and letting terrorists, dictators, and thugs walk all over us. I fought these people as a Green Beret, and let me tell you, they won’t stop until they destroy America. With weakness in the White House, we must have a strong Republican majority in Congress who will pick up after Biden’s failures. We live in the greatest country on Earth, Peter, but we can’t take it for granted. Around the world, our enemies are out to get us, and we can’t afford to have a President who’s asleep at the wheel - or a Congress who lets his failures slide. We MUST take back the House if we’re going to keep America on top, and I’m counting on you to be on my A-team. In Service, | | Col. name: Team DPVA
subject: We need to get serious about November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
VA Dems must DOUBLE what we raised in June

|
---
Hey Derek, We wanted to pass along an update on our fundraising progress for the critical elections this November. Here’s the situation: **The good news:** We had our _**best**_ fundraising month so far this year! **The bad news:** We need to **DOUBLE** what we raised in June to hit our goal for July. That’s right; we now have to raise $50,000 over the next month to hit our goal for July. Derek, **we have to raise $50,000 this month to stay on track for the election this November.** There are so many important issues on the ballot – combating lies of election fraud, fighting climate change, protecting a woman’s right to choose – we can’t afford to sit this one out. **[Will you chip in (whatever you can) to help us meet our July goal and ensure that VA Democrats are prepared to hold the ground on these issues in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47479226/354444240/1963706474?refcode=dpva-em-220706-double&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGEzMmVkOS01ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkUsRnlRZ7hs9WpomIlfBn4Jeu97yq1d4se-AjRfeWI=)** Team DPVA | [****************************](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47479227/354444241/-118115906?refcode=dpva-em-220706-double&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGEzMmVkOS01ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkUsRnlRZ7hs9WpomIlfBn4Jeu97yq1d4se-AjRfeWI=)**********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47479228/354444242/-118115906?amount=10&refcode=dpva-em-220706-double&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGEzMmVkOS01ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkUsRnlRZ7hs9WpomIlfBn4Jeu97yq1d4se-AjRfeWI=)**********

name: Charles Booker
subject: Did you see my op-ed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Last week, I wrote an op-ed about the ongoing investigation of the January
6 insurrection and Rand Paul’s involvement.

I’m sharing it below in case you haven’t read it yet — so you understand
why Rand Paul is unfit to represent Kentucky and why we’re fighting this
election to replace him.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220706.gRaKWf&refcode=em20220706-2190&t=1001&akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP ]I hope that after you’re done reading, you’ll chip in $5
donation to our campaign and join me in this fight to make freedom ring
for the people of Kentucky and our entire country.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220706.gRaKWf&refcode=em20220706-2190&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP ]Contribute $5

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220706.gRaKWf&refcode=em20220706-2190&t=1021&akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP ]Courier Journal logo[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220706.gRaKWf&refcode=em20220706-2190&t=1022&akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP ][IMG]

Charles Booker Opinion Contributor

The recent hearings on the Jan. 6 insurrection make one thing crystal
clear: There are members of Congress, more specifically the Senate, who
violated their oath to protect our democracy. Rand Paul’s one of those
members.

As Rep. Liz Cheney said, there’s no room for debate. The violent mob of
insurrectionists stormed our capitol, beat, tased and degraded capitol
police, and sought to kill the Vice President and members of Congress. If
it were up to senators like Paul, there would be no accountability, which
poses a danger and a threat to our security.

Why did Paul dismiss the harrowing testimony and statements of capitol
police officers who shared their experience during the Jan. 6 attempted
coup –– the day an officer was killed trying to protect him and his
colleagues against a vicious mob? Why does he oppose efforts to invest in
community safety to protect our families?

The insurrection, which was described as “carnage and chaos” by a Capitol
police officer, was a physical manifestation of the weakening of our
democracy. Videos from Jan. 6, 2021, accompanying testimonies, underscore
how important it is for Kentuckians to understand the severity of that day
and the impact it’ll have on our nation for years to come. An
understanding that Paul himself purposely refuses to grasp, as he calls
these hearings a “partisan witch hunt.”

Documents entered into the record reveal that the group that organized the
insurrection printed “Rand Paul...We the people love you” on their plans to
storm capitol buildings. If that’s the surface, it’s fair to ask if
digging deeper would cast an even more damning light on Paul’s involvement
in the events of that day. Paul doesn’t want you to discover he abandoned
and violated his oath to uphold the Constitution and protect our
democracy.

"Thanks to your [expletive], we are under siege." Those are the words from
Greg Jacob, former counsel to Mike Pence, to Trump-allied lawyer John
Eastman. Rand Paul has no problems associating with the same people who
organized that siege. Because to Paul, an allegiance to the corrupt
establishment is stronger than an allegiance to the truth — and the people
of Kentucky who he has continuously failed to represent.

Kentuckians are tired of being deceived, especially by those who say
they’ll fight for us in DC. Paul’s lies weaken our democracy by empowering
those who seek to come to power by corruption and cheating, rather than by
the will of the people of Kentucky and the people of the United States.
Protecting our democracy is more than protecting the right to vote.
Protecting our democracy is going to DC bound to the voters who elected
you. Protecting our democracy is upholding the will of the people of
Kentucky. Paul failed in his duty to protect our democracy — on all
accounts.

If Kentucky is to regain our power in Congress, we must start with
replacing politicians like Rand Paul, who divide us, disrespect us, and
hold us back rather than uniting us and delivering for our commonwealth. I
believe our democracy – and Kentucky – is worth fighting for because I
know there are people in every corner of Kentucky, from the hood to the
holler, whose lives depend on our voice being heard. I believe our race
will decide the fate of democracy. I’ll respectfully uphold my oath, when
elected to the U.S. Senate, to protect democracy.

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220706-2190-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2190_346206_1h6xfP&akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2190%2E346206%2E1h6xfP

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
