name: Team Mathis
subject: We must fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47483765/354465594/-203487409?refcode=em_pet_2022.07.06_b1_tm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI4MDE2Ny03MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRMvyKHbMZvulhxyvTWFxx6y8bjX1SnNJRzf_HmMI7s=) Hi Peter, We want to be clear: Far-right extremists have been steadily going after reproductive freedom for decades. **Now that _Roe v. Wade has been overturned_ , the work to protect access to abortion and reproductive health care is even more critical. ** The time to act is now. [_**Will you add your name today to stand for abortion access and reproductive freedom?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47483766/354465595/-533039953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI4MDE2Ny03MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRMvyKHbMZvulhxyvTWFxx6y8bjX1SnNJRzf_HmMI7s=&emci=961041d8-5efd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e9280167-72fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6566505) The Supreme Court decision stems from years of extreme policy and rhetoric targeting women. Radical right extremists have eagerly awaited this opportunity to enact extreme laws targeting women and doctors. **Extremist Republicans are seeking to ban all abortions without exceptions for rape, incest, or saving the life of a mother. We can’t let that happen. ** Liz’s opponent, Ashley Hinson is no different. Since the Supreme Court decision overturning _Roe,_ Hinson has already introduced legislation that would roll back reproductive rights. As we face the current threat to abortion, we must come together to defend the right to abortion and reproductive care for every American, no matter what state they call home. _**[So we have to ask: Can you add your name and tell Congress to protect access to abortion and reproductive health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47483767/354465596/-533039953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI4MDE2Ny03MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRMvyKHbMZvulhxyvTWFxx6y8bjX1SnNJRzf_HmMI7s=&emci=961041d8-5efd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e9280167-72fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6566505)**_ | [**ADD YOUR NAME»**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47483768/354465597/-533039953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI4MDE2Ny03MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRMvyKHbMZvulhxyvTWFxx6y8bjX1SnNJRzf_HmMI7s=&emci=961041d8-5efd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e9280167-72fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6566505)
---
Thanks,

clean_body: = Hi Peter, We want to be clear: Far-right extremists have been steadily going after reproductive freedom for decades. Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned , the work to protect access to abortion and reproductive health care is even more critical. The time to act is now. The Supreme Court decision stems from years of extreme policy and rhetoric targeting women. Radical right extremists have eagerly awaited this opportunity to enact extreme laws targeting women and doctors. Extremist Republicans are seeking to ban all abortions without exceptions for rape, incest, or saving the life of a mother. We can’t let that happen. Liz’s opponent, Ashley Hinson is no different. Since the Supreme Court decision overturning Roe, Hinson has already introduced legislation that would roll back reproductive rights. As we face the current threat to abortion, we must come together to defend the right to abortion and reproductive care for every American, no matter what state they call home. | Thanks, Team Mathis Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. subject: Center for Arizona Policy Action Endorses Shawnna Bolick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
| | **Center for Arizona Policy Action**
**Endorses Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State**
_July 6, 2022_
---
| | _FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE_
Contact: joanna@theresolute.group
PHOENIX, Ariz., - Center for Arizona Policy Action (CAP Action) just released its endorsement of Representative Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State in the 2022 Republican Primary Election.

“I’ve been proud to work alongside Center for Arizona Policy to empower parents and students with school choice, fight for religious freedom, and defend the preborn. And now, I look forward to working with CAP to secure your legal votes,” said Bolick. “I am grateful for CAP Action’s endorsement and their work on their issues that matter to Arizona families.”

As a State Representative, Bolick has maintained a 100% pro-life, pro-family voting record with Center for Arizona Policy. CAP Action educates Arizona citizens on public policy issues pertaining to the sanctity of life, marriage and family, and religious freedom, and encourages civic engagement. ###

body:
An update for you... |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47483850/354466233/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODFmM2FkNS03MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYyvps41eWfiNoTA6_4LBzVub_qGX0f2PXX_mPeo4xM=)
Hi there, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. The general election is underway. Here’s an early update on the race and what Michael’s opponent has been up to. Michael spent Independence Day marching with his wife Susan and his grassroots campaign team in Greeley and Denver, Colorado. On the other hand, after paying his way to a primary victory, Michael’s opponent spent the holiday weekend at his lake house while his team marched in parades on his behalf. His opponent takes Coloradans for granted, and can pick lavish weekend getaways over meeting voters face-to-face because he can turn to his personal checkbook or the National GOP’s $200-million war chest when grassroots enthusiasm is low. So, while I won’t tell you the sky is falling if you don’t pitch in $10 or $25 today, I can tell you that **I want to blow our fundraising goal out of the water this month.** **Our opponent ignores working Coloradans** because he’ll just be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. We don’t have to outraise National Republicans and their war chest — but if everyone reading this pitches in any amount, we’ll smash our fundraising goal and send a message loud and clear that this won’t be an easy race. Michael is fighting for Coloradans in the Senate where he banned surprise emergency medical bills, passed legislation to improve access to clean water on Tribal Lands, expanded the monthly Child Tax Credit that kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty, and helped pass historic legislation to repair our roads and bridges and create good-paying jobs. This re-election campaign is about building on that work. **[Pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to help us knock our fundraising out of the park this month. clean_body: An update for you... | = Hi there, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. The general election is underway. Here’s an early update on the race and what Michael’s opponent has been up to. Michael spent Independence Day marching with his wife Susan and his grassroots campaign team in Greeley and Denver, Colorado. On the other hand, after paying his way to a primary victory, Michael’s opponent spent the holiday weekend at his lake house while his team marched in parades on his behalf. His opponent takes Coloradans for granted, and can pick lavish weekend getaways over meeting voters face-to-face because he can turn to his personal checkbook or the National GOP’s $200-million war chest when grassroots enthusiasm is low. So, while I won’t tell you the sky is falling if you don’t pitch in $10 or $25 today, I can tell you that I want to blow our fundraising goal out of the water this month. Our opponent ignores working Coloradans because he’ll just be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. We don’t have to outraise National Republicans and their war chest — but if everyone reading this pitches in any amount, we’ll smash our fundraising goal and send a message loud and clear that this won’t be an easy race. Michael is fighting for Coloradans in the Senate where he banned surprise emergency medical bills, passed legislation to improve access to clean water on Tribal Lands, expanded the monthly Child Tax Credit that kept nearly 4 million kids out of poverty, and helped pass historic legislation to repair our roads and bridges and create good-paying jobs. This re-election campaign is about building on that work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: He’s lost family to gun violence. He’ll fight for our safety.
body:
Mandela Barnes for gun sense in the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you taken the opportunity to support Mandela Barnes’ campaign today? Because I'm still reeling from July 4th. America's birthday in a midwest suburb became _mass murder by a lunatic with weapons he should've never had. _A Trump-supporting lunatic acting out his sick fantasies, because Republicans let him shop for weapons like he's at a developing-nation arms bazaar. **Pardon my French: But this must f@cking stop. NOW.** **_The Illinois suburbs extend into Wisconsin, so this feels right to remind you we can elect Lt. Governor Mandela Barnes our next WI Senator, and rid ourselves of Putin-stooge, coup-plotting, anti-vax, anti-abortion and gun-insane Senator Ron Johnson. _** **[Can you give Mandela Barnes, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. Since Mandela isn’t taking any corporate PAC money, your donation of any amount is very important to unseating Ron Johnson and replacing him with a competent, compassionate public servant.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5a4b0f2-82ac-407a-a372-15822c5d8411/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** A blight on our republic for so many reasons, including Johnson's defense of, and love for assault rifles, like the AR-15 used to destroy countless lives in Highland Park, Illinois yesterday. Mandela Barnes will fight for universal background checks, an assault rifle ban, and high capacity magazine ban--so a killer like the one in Highland Park can't keep firing and firing and firing.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: Support Mandela Barnes & retire Ron Johnson!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c3894cc-3b86-4d89-9476-049c9306a8f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I can't get the images out of my head. Highland Park, IL, w/ overturned baby strollers and blood-soaked pavement. A little boy there with his parents, both murdered. His life, in a split second, tragically changed forever. As a father of two young-ish boys, I find myself fighting back tears. _How can we allow this to happen on July 4th in our country? How can we let shameless, empathy-lacking, radical-right-wing Republicans do this to us?_ **_Mandela Barnes has lost family to gun violence. He knows we must stop this. Not tomorrow or next week, but RIGHT. NOW._** **[Can you give Mandela Barnes, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. We can only stop the carnage by electing Mandela Barnes, and ridding ourselves of the scourge of Ron Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6610eb5d-d7e8-4574-86a5-1e648276caf8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for stepping forward to fight this fight. Cliff

clean_body: There has never been a more crucial time to stand up for basic decency and defeat extremists like Stefanik. | = | The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade marked a dark day in our country’s history. And while we took time to reflect on the danger the decision will inflict on people across our nation, Elise Stefanik CELEBRATED. = | = Stefanik voted against codifying Roe and voted to defund Planned Parenthood, and her colleagues have made it clear that the Supreme Court’s decision is just the first step in the GOP’s plan to ban abortion nationwide. What’s more, the Supreme Court explicitly signaled that the right to same-sex marriage and access to contraception could be on the chopping block. subject: What’s on your mind?

body:
Please take our campaign’s priorities survey >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484303/354467736/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjI2YWQwMS03NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlPZwWKmQqaZiLkeDNowhsVAT3Eol-v8wCUTJ9P7PXo=&emci=7b5c18fa-74fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bb26ad01-75fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
A lot of issues are weighing on my mind right now, friends. The conservative-stacked Supreme Court’s ruling to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ has ripped away the reproductive rights of millions of women and undermined the right to privacy. I am working every day to protect reproductive rights at the federal level in the wake of this terrible decision. And the Supreme Court’s decision to narrow the Environmental Protection Agency’s authority to address climate warming pollution puts the health of our planet at extreme risk. Here in New Mexico, our communities are already dealing with the immediate impacts of the climate crisis, from record-breaking wildfires to severe flooding. The Supreme Court ruling only makes matters worse. We can’t afford to wait any longer to act. We also can’t stop building on all the work we’ve already started — including continuing to address gun violence after passing the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ and extending child nutrition waivers to make sure students have access to nutritious school meals during the summer. **I’ve shared what’s on my mind. But our campaign isn’t one-sided. I want to hear what you’re thinking about, too.** [**Will you share what issues matter the most to you and your family? It will only take a few minutes for you to fill out our campaign’s priorities survey, and your responses will give our campaign crucial insight to chart a path forward:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484304/354467737/1537115001?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjI2YWQwMS03NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlPZwWKmQqaZiLkeDNowhsVAT3Eol-v8wCUTJ9P7PXo=&emci=7b5c18fa-74fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bb26ad01-75fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484305/354467738/1537115001?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220706_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjI2YWQwMS03NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlPZwWKmQqaZiLkeDNowhsVAT3Eol-v8wCUTJ9P7PXo=&emci=7b5c18fa-74fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=bb26ad01-75fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: WOOD TV PRESS RELEASE
body:
Ralph Rebandt Supporters are Furious Over WOOD TV's Bias

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woodtv_press_release&n=1)
---
# **PRESS RELEASE**
**Ralph Rebandt Supporters Are Furious over** **WOOD TV’s Bias** Ralph Rebandt supporters sent emails and took to the phones yesterday to call out WOOD TV8 for their bias in leaving out one candidate of the five legitimate contenders remaining on the Republican ticket for Michigan’s next governor. According to WOOD TV, Ralph Rebandt will be left off the stage tonight because he did not meet their 5% polling standard. This arbitrary conclusion raises more questions than answers because Rebandt’s numbers have risen consistently after each debate, while the other candidates have seen a decrease in support. So, what “poll” was used, when was it taken, and what were the parameters used to determine the results? These are just a few of the questions Rebandt supporters want answered. With varying polling results taken by other companies which have put all five of the candidates below the 5% Wood TV polling standard and all within a couple points of each other, the race is wide open. The majority of voters are undecided. The Rebandt campaign reached out to WOOD TV to ask for clarification and is waiting for a response. The questions they would, respectfully, like responses to are:
1. What company was used for the poll that was used to determine the 5% standard required by the WOOD TV parent company, Nexstar Media?
2. When was the poll taken?
3. Who paid for the poll?
4. Why was a poll of only 400 persons used to determine the 5% standard for the candidates when there are 10 million persons living in Michigan?
5. What were the parameters of the poll, and what metrics were used?
6. Was the Michigan GOP part of any discussion or consultation regarding the Republican gubernatorial WOOD TV debate?

*This is an important question, because WOOD TV stated that the MI-GOP agreed to the debate guidelines which drew this response from Candidate Rebandt, “Well, no surprise there, this is the same MI-GOP that left my name _completely_ off their mail-out poll, and off their email list that offered table space for gubernatorial candidates at the MI-GOP Convention. It’s clear that the establishment is stacked against me.” Rebandt added, “I was told that one member of the party said they didn’t want me in office because I would listen to God more than them. It’s hard when you not only have to fight the evil of the left in this race, but the evil that resides in your own party.” Rebandt also noted, “In every poll that’s been taken, there’s been one consistent variable – at least 48%, as a low marker, to 66% as a high marker of Michigan voters are undecided, and in a race where no candidate has reached double digits, and where all candidates are within a few points of one another, it’s just plain poor journalism judgment to leave one candidate off the stage”. When Rebandt, known for his optimism, was asked how not being on this debate stage would affect his race, he smiled and said “We saw yesterday the way people took to the phone lines, and are seeing a mass exodus from other campaigns to ours. People are realizing that we simply can not put up with party politics anymore. Otherwise media, money, and power will continue to determine our elections and we will never see the needed changes in Michigan. I look forward to the other fairer debates coming up in the next few weeks”. Rebandt has been endorsed by Mike Lindell, Abby Johnson, the woman who fought Planned Parenthood and whose story is portrayed in the movie _Unplanned_ , Dr. Randal Baker, the doctor who sued Governor Gretchen Whitmer and won 7-0 at the Michigan Supreme Court unlocking Michigan in October 2020, and Pastor Mark Burns, President Donald Trump’s religious advisor. Also, Representative Thomas Hooker, Fr. Frank Pavone, national Priests for Life director, and groups like the Michigan Chiefs of Police in Southeast Michigan, Veterans in Defense of Freedom, the Michigan Republican Assembly, Montmorency County, Latinos United for America, Michigan Coalition for Freedom, Friends of Conservative Values, Patriots for Freedom, and so many other brave patriots who are fighting everyday battles in our schools, our courts, our cities, our counties, our hospitals, and our work environments. Rebandt posits this looming question to WOOD TV: “Don’t the 19,000 people who signed petitions to put my name on the ballot, the hundreds of circulators who worked for almost a year to gather those signatures, the thousands of our supporters, and the hundreds of thousands who are undecided voters deserve to hear from all the candidates that have legitimately made it onto the ballot?” Rebandt answered the rhetorical question, “There is really only one answer, and I hope WOOD TV gets it right.”

clean_body: Ralph Rebandt Supporters are Furious Over WOOD TV's Bias | PRESS RELEASE Ralph Rebandt Supporters Are Furious over WOOD TV’s Bias Ralph Rebandt supporters sent emails and took to the phones yesterday to call out WOOD TV8 for their bias in leaving out one candidate of the five legitimate contenders remaining on the Republican ticket for Michigan’s next governor. According to WOOD TV, Ralph Rebandt will be left off the stage tonight because he did not meet their 5% polling standard. This arbitrary conclusion raises more questions than answers because Rebandt’s numbers have risen consistently after each debate, while the other candidates have seen a decrease in support. So, what “poll” was used, when was it taken, and what were the parameters used to determine the results? These are just a few of the questions Rebandt supporters want answered. With varying polling results taken by other companies which have put all five of the candidates below the 5% Wood TV polling standard and all within a couple points of each other, the race is wide open. The majority of voters are undecided. The Rebandt campaign reached out to WOOD TV to ask for clarification and is waiting for a response. The questions they would, respectfully, like responses to are: 1. What company was used for the poll that was used to determine the 5% standard required by the WOOD TV parent company, Nexstar Media? 2. When was the poll taken? 3. Who paid for the poll? 4. Why was a poll of only 400 persons used to determine the 5% standard for the candidates when there are 10 million persons living in Michigan? 5. What were the parameters of the poll, and what metrics were used? 6. Was the Michigan GOP part of any discussion or consultation regarding the Republican gubernatorial WOOD TV debate? This is an important question, because WOOD TV stated that the MI-GOP agreed to the debate guidelines which drew this response from Candidate Rebandt, “Well, no surprise there, this is the same MI-GOP that left my name completely off their mail-out poll, and off their email list that offered table space for gubernatorial candidates at the MI-GOP Convention. It’s clear that the establishment is stacked against me.” Rebandt added, “I was told that one member of the party said they didn’t want me in office because I would listen to God more than them. It’s hard when you not only have to fight the evil of the left in this race, but the evil that resides in your own party.” Rebandt also noted, “In every poll that’s been taken, there’s been one consistent variable – at least 48%, as a low marker, to 66% as a high marker of Michigan voters are undecided, and in a race where no candidate has reached double digits, and where all candidates are within a few points of one another, it’s just plain poor journalism judgment to leave one candidate off the stage”. When Rebandt, known for his optimism, was asked how not being on this debate stage would affect his race, he smiled and said “We saw yesterday the way people took to the phone lines, and are seeing a mass exodus from other campaigns to ours. People are realizing that we simply can not put up with party politics anymore. Otherwise media, money, and power will continue to determine our elections and we will never see the needed changes in Michigan. I look forward to the other fairer debates coming up in the next few weeks”. Rebandt has been endorsed by Mike Lindell, Abby Johnson, the woman who fought Planned Parenthood and whose story is portrayed in the movie Unplanned , Dr. Randal Baker, the doctor who sued Governor Gretchen Whitmer and won 7-0 at the Michigan Supreme Court unlocking Michigan in October 2020, and Pastor Mark Burns, President Donald Trump’s religious advisor. Also, Representative Thomas Hooker, Fr. Frank Pavone, national Priests for Life director, and groups like the Michigan Chiefs of Police in Southeast Michigan, Veterans in Defense of Freedom, the Michigan Republican Assembly, Montmorency County, Latinos United for America, Michigan Coalition for Freedom, Friends of Conservative Values, Patriots for Freedom, and so many other brave patriots who are fighting everyday battles in our schools, our courts, our cities, our counties, our hospitals, and our work environments. Rebandt posits this looming question to WOOD TV: “Don’t the 19,000 people who signed petitions to put my name on the ballot, the hundreds of circulators who worked for almost a year to gather those signatures, the thousands of our supporters, and the hundreds of thousands who are undecided voters deserve to hear from all the candidates that have legitimately made it onto the ballot?” Rebandt answered the rhetorical question, “There is really only one answer, and I hope WOOD TV gets it right.” SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN** | "DONATE TODAY" Thank you for your continued support Ralph Rebandt For Governor Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States

Major news, Peter: **Our race was just named as one of the seven closest races that will determine the House majority this November.**

With this race neck-and-neck, the GOP establishment and right-wing special interest groups will begin pouring millions of dollars into this race.
They are going to fight tooth-and-nail to attack and distort Emilia’s message of change so they can ensure a Republican-held Congress that will advance a radical agenda and undermine some of our most basic rights –**including restricting access to abortion nationwide.**

body:
| | | [](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=2ba23296b453427b8e826cb3b95d017f&_e=zeTYHeYrJjwnQPa95qLWWHxdImCSWppLIjQ9lVzHkOWsSapnr2kBm64GJ12XnFuJ9bht8gErN703aSv9g3izD6QKG10x3HBF7baMnTVeXSRH3aqjGyTPFTXbhj7AKG20qMcIRF1SIuLEleuHtMhOI690qvdsAHKAu7SuJmKPfsF3ejDdtR0GE6pxEF-2qwcGatN3r9WmDTQ_s2YoJG0BAdSZaFa_K0HziTr2cIe-XFcrJv28GRMeOs2v1LpAfTG7BCNVqqTxhAh7-gf61nFdOX8FTc2oocSaSsDrwwO34UtmnVtOJoT64OKjdA3ASxDwuTAtnIlbAOfuXCDoYfObWLicxuVk8_i8DqEbFRfEEB1j-_unYy5qLCvVD5DpE1jdNfXZM0uFCIS8QodsNLgcW5f7q-1mY43-vf6Lj2NQIeZcben--jca2NklnAwTQoKgfboJeh1ArCV3LEQ3L2Zo-9W7nsKbZDixQUSYRPAzYFMRjyXDBemHgiarn1SYRRH0) Hey Peter, Education is the great equalizer. Without access to affordable higher education, we are robbing ourselves of the right to pursue happiness. Sarah believes in free two-year college and free four-year college for understaffed career fields such as teachers, nurses, and healthcare professionals. Education is a fundamental piece of lifting one another up and the future of our country, our economy and our planet depend on our ability to take care of one another. To have a forward-thinking nation, we need to develop forward thinkers by cultivating a culture of higher education and critical thought. Sarah is ready to fight for affordable higher education. **[Will you chip into Sarah’s campaign today and join the fight?](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=2ba23296b453427b8e826cb3b95d017f&_e=XqcPn9RSIG8rOqxQxowrFTknos5xb7-JTeBlT4Y_fQcl7RkWidFs0feM6hdqoOr17qjs6Rkncz2QMN22g8FLcdMgx65Bc7oVYBxOLHtJxFA6ec2DSVcMESgqKmPQbhw24_dYwoVO7aF1fCyujRLu-82mXg69nOfATS5KIbzmvAGaWr-eh9mK5s9vO4s3TPDkzXNorKZgtkfaVgbJTkFeaPDOzvDL_KR-Q7WKCqzYl42M70CD25A145Tvm0hoTehJo55uhok1gnBpPUtHiHnwloW6BTik7j0sfaqtbtaci15Kj3BbS8CaU3BGTOSRv3vHVcf9yuK16gW4gye9Wg2xnCh_tiGPGwOMK7llgSW9jbDs1L7rcFrTErKTyXpLYSqeBzofTXnEgDk08m0eWEtKGkPl5y_xwpcM2VHdQk18gpR_KaITxbzK3q5CJUP4IO74Ky7Juuyi0VN0XTjXPk3Mbe2VB1JFSJgvZ7JdHnc2mz8sCHD3a4FEJiqrHXUCXQCx)** [](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=2ba23296b453427b8e826cb3b95d017f&_e=zeTYHeYrJjwnQPa95qLWWHxdImCSWppLIjQ9lVzHkOWsSapnr2kBm64GJ12XnFuJ9bht8gErN703aSv9g3izD6QKG10x3HBF7baMnTVeXSRH3aqjGyTPFTXbhj7AKG20qMcIRF1SIuLEleuHtMhOI690qvdsAHKAu7SuJmKPfsF3ejDdtR0GE6pxEF-2qwcGatN3r9WmDTQ_s2YoJG0BAdSZaFa_K0HziTr2cIe-XFcrJv28GRMeOs2v1LpAfTG7BCNVqqTxhAh7-gf61nFdOX8FTc2oocSaSsDrwwO34Uuzwf4OkDY2kgoxSUDs9OWn8d3eoFRxFmOes6LCKb4fbcjr1FW951qTaMkpw88D8UCeo6WcnYLDCLbtW7YCN2b-qzvsR5FybwsxG9--hufG_1Ag3IlJqRt8OSQww--twIWzn4xFL4lkGzJ8gpyH-ssb3af-k0r9VeQpqT0Jjj4-1Yniitb6u5phC1D7zgWtUVavLR4E0guTSW_Evx_bnRJn) College tuition prices continue to increase at double the rate of inflation. The continual price gouging of America's youth is abhorrent and robs all of us of our future. We should be commending our young people in their pursuit of higher education rather than punishing them with years of debt. We need to invest in our students to invest in our future. It’s time for affordable education. **[Chip into Sarah’s campaign today and let’s make education affordable for the middle class.](http://links.sarahkleehoodny.com/u/click?_t=4042bf8ec2414cd7ba40b5db51a7d947&_m=2ba23296b453427b8e826cb3b95d017f&_e=XqcPn9RSIG8rOqxQxowrFTknos5xb7-JTeBlT4Y_fQcl7RkWidFs0feM6hdqoOr17qjs6Rkncz2QMN22g8FLcdMgx65Bc7oVYBxOLHtJxFA6ec2DSVcMESgqKmPQbhw24_dYwoVO7aF1fCyujRLu-82mXg69nOfATS5KIbzmvAGaWr-eh9mK5s9vO4s3TPDkzXNorKZgtkfaVgbJTkFeaPDOzvDL_KR-Q7WKCqzYl42M70CD25A145Tvm0hoTehJo55uhok1gnBpPUtHiHnwluMZ54HZMpYHgZI4aA7aFxRay5gihC8QOFDDlG0eX9-Xs0aG4PJjoG1A9BUiJI_Mz-J5Fv3fl1TXXg0U29j5rYCpuOdMwtbFliBDmdpQLcciryD5XoEqXw1uJT-SeJRZID1eLvAbzO6vihFgf7LSJuVSetkV-nYaERdymgCxqm7UsBEGQypMG-uEW7kmoSYHWIbIIxjyHpuetAglj_LFTKy6p1FEu5ZMu-PxAH5h2Zlm)** Thank you, Team Hood **** **** Sarah Hood is a mom, wife, leader, problem solver, and Air Force veteran. clean_body: | | | Hey Peter, Education is the great equalizer. Without access to affordable higher education, we are robbing ourselves of the right to pursue happiness. Sarah believes in free two-year college and free four-year college for understaffed career fields such as teachers, nurses, and healthcare professionals. Education is a fundamental piece of lifting one another up and the future of our country, our economy and our planet depend on our ability to take care of one another. To have a forward-thinking nation, we need to develop forward thinkers by cultivating a culture of higher education and critical thought. Sarah is ready to fight for affordable higher education. College tuition prices continue to increase at double the rate of inflation. The continual price gouging of America's youth is abhorrent and robs all of us of our future. We should be commending our young people in their pursuit of higher education rather than punishing them with years of debt. We need to invest in our students to invest in our future. It’s time for affordable education. Thank you, Team Hood ** Sarah Hood is a mom, wife, leader, problem solver, and Air Force veteran. She's running for Congress to fix our sidewalks and roads, fight for a fair economy and greater access to healthcare, and defend the foundations of our democracy that are under attack. **** **** Follow Sarah Online: Paid for by Sarah Klee Hood for NY **

clean_body: America’s birthday is more important than fundraising. | Peter, The Fourth of July has always been sacred to me. It’s a powerful symbol of the freedom that we’re so fortunate to enjoy. In honor of the 4th, we paused all our fundraising efforts over the weekend – but now, just 5 days into the month, we’re pacing $9,335 behind our July budget. And while we were paused, Pelosi, Taddeo, and the Democrats kept right on fundraising. Nothing is sacred to these radicals who want to DESTROY the American dream! We can’t let them take the lead in this toss-up race. I don’t regret pausing over the weekend, Peter. Celebrating America’s birthday with your friends and family is much more important than fundraising. But unless we retake the House majority and get America back on track, it will only be a matter of time before the Fourth of July completely loses its meaning. Another two years of total Democrat control in Washington will mean another two years of oppressive socialist policies.It will spell the end of America as we know it. To save the country we know and love, we MUST win this race. It’s that simple. I hope I can count on you to help us get back on budget. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Team Deluzio
subject: [WATCH] Chris’s TV interview about Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
The fight for our common good includes fighting for reproductive freedom for all of us.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484957/354470440/-454070568?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA4Nzc0NS03N2ZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paDsROycjZgUtOSLm1m2-NJig4vfFyTrX5UdXqGS9fY=) Hi Derek,

Yesterday, Chris spoke with KDKA (Pittsburgh’s CBS affiliate) about how our team is responding in the wake of _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned by a conservative majority of the Supreme Court. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484959/354470443/880151249?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_td_all&amount=15&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA4Nzc0NS03N2ZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paDsROycjZgUtOSLm1m2-NJig4vfFyTrX5UdXqGS9fY=) | [WATCH THE CLIP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484961/354470446/880151249?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_td_all&amount=15&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA4Nzc0NS03N2ZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=paDsROycjZgUtOSLm1m2-NJig4vfFyTrX5UdXqGS9fY=)
---
**We’re hearing from Democrats, Independents, and Republicans across western Pennsylvania who are furious at what the Supreme Court has done in gutting the right to an abortion.**

While people in Beaver and Allegheny Counties mourn the loss of a constitutional right, Chris’s opponent wants to go even further. **In fact, he's called for a constitutional amendment to ban abortions nationwide and has opposed exceptions for victims of rape or incest.**

**Jeremy Shaffer’s views are extreme, dangerous, and wildly out of touch.**

**[Derek, the fight for our common good includes fighting for reproductive freedom for all of us. clean_body: The fight for our common good includes fighting for reproductive freedom for all of us. | = Hi Derek, Yesterday, Chris spoke with KDKA (Pittsburgh’s CBS affiliate) about how our team is responding in the wake of Roe v. Wade being overturned by a conservative majority of the Supreme Court. = | = We’re hearing from Democrats, Independents, and Republicans across western Pennsylvania who are furious at what the Supreme Court has done in gutting the right to an abortion. While people in Beaver and Allegheny Counties mourn the loss of a constitutional right, Chris’s opponent wants to go even further. In fact, he's called for a constitutional amendment to ban abortions nationwide and has opposed exceptions for victims of rape or incest. Jeremy Shaffer’s views are extreme, dangerous, and wildly out of touch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being on our team, Derek. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. | | Too often, I hear folks talking about climate change as a "someday, far away" problem. But let me be blunt: it isn't. Climate change is here _now_ – local, and present tense. **Yet last week's Supreme Court decision paves the way for prioritizing profits over families and corporate polluters over our planet.** We can't wait to address climate change. As we continue to see rising tides and temperatures, now is not the time to roll back efforts to keep all Americans safe. From the destruction of Superstorm Sandy to the unprecedented tornadoes that tore through New Jersey last year, we're seeing the disastrous effects of climate change in real-time right here in our state. It's already started, and _we need to act._ I will keep pushing forward to pass critical climate legislation that will not only make New Jersey communities more resilient to extreme weather events but will create thousands of good-paying jobs. **Above all, I'm committed to fighting climate change so that I can leave my kids and your kids and our grandkids a better – and safer – future. Their generation deserves every opportunity we had growing up; that means we have to leave them a planet that supports those opportunities.** _Andy_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with clean_body: | | | | Too often, I hear folks talking about climate change as a "someday, far away" problem. But let me be blunt: it isn't. Climate change is here now – local, and present tense. Yet last week's Supreme Court decision paves the way for prioritizing profits over families and corporate polluters over our planet. We can't wait to address climate change. As we continue to see rising tides and temperatures, now is not the time to roll back efforts to keep all Americans safe. From the destruction of Superstorm Sandy to the unprecedented tornadoes that tore through New Jersey last year, we're seeing the disastrous effects of climate change in real-time right here in our state. It's already started, and we need to act. I will keep pushing forward to pass critical climate legislation that will not only make New Jersey communities more resilient to extreme weather events but will create thousands of good-paying jobs. Above all, I'm committed to fighting climate change so that I can leave my kids and your kids and our grandkids a better – and safer – future. Their generation deserves every opportunity we had growing up; that means we have to leave them a planet that supports those opportunities. name: BetoORourke.com
subject: NEWS: Beto has cut Abbott's lead again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto can win this race as Abbott's support is underwater.
#
A brand-new poll shows Beto has narrowed Greg Abbott's lead AGAIN:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220706-1.zp687m&refcode=ema20220706-197197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)
Released this morning, polling from The Texas Politics Project at UT Austin finds that Beto has cut Abbott's lead by FIVE points since April. **This is now just a six-point race.**
We've gained this ground thanks to grassroots donors funding every part of our campaign including the incredible work of our organizers in every part of the state. That's why we're asking: **[Can you give $3 right now to help us reach the Texas voters that will decide this election and close the gap with Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220706-1.zp687m&refcode=ema20220706-197197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220706-1.zp687m&refcode=ema20220706-197197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)**
This new poll also confirmed what we've known: Abbott's support is underwater. **A growing majority (59%) of Texans agree that our state is headed in the wrong direction under his failed leadership.**
Abbott is taking Texas down a path of division and cruelty, and voters overwhelmingly oppose his extreme positions. Texans strongly disapprove of Abbott's total ban on abortions and agree with Beto that we need commonsense gun safety measures.
**The bottom line is that Beto can win this race.** But we need the resources to continue spreading the word about Beto's positive, unifying vision for the state of Texas. That's especially true because Greg Abbott's campaign has more than $50 million in the bank to spend against us.
**[Can you donate $3 or more right now to help fuel our organizing efforts on the ground?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220706-1.zp687m&refcode=ema20220706-197197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220706-1.zp687m&refcode=ema20220706-197197&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)**
We are building the largest grassroots campaign this state has ever seen to fire Abbott and get Texas on track — and you're making it all possible.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220706-197197-footer&t=24&refcode2=197197_444211_u6IMq8&akid=197197%2E444211%2Eu6IMq8)**

subject: Official 2022 Republican Advisory Board invitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Enclosed.

subject: No More Lip Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
TELEVISED Debate Tonight + Call to Action for our grassroots warriors | | | _**It's crunch time, patriots.**_

With less than 4 weeks until the Republican Primary, every door knocked, every dollar raised, and every debate victory will make a difference in the outcome of this race.

Tonight is the next GOP Debate - _the first Televised statewide_ \- and **Peter, the gloves are coming off.**

Tune in tonight at 7pm on WoodTV8, WLNS, WJMN Local 3, 9&10 News, ABC 12 or WDIV Detroit, or watch online at [woodtv.com.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4cb1191650&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=04d7773178&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **We the People of Michigan are DONE with lip service from establishment politicians.** Defeating Gretchen Whitmer will require grit and guts, and Peter, _I've been fighting in the trenches alongside you for over two years._

Republicans and conservatives simply cannot afford to nominate an untested candidate - bankrolled by status-quo, establishment special interests - __who has never taken a stand for the citizens of Michigan.__

**Our grassroots movement has always been about taking action to make positive change in Michigan.** We took a stand to end Whitmer's tyranny, restore our students' education, support our small businesses, and protect the integrity of our elections.

**Now, we are taking the fight to liberal prosecutors who __refuse__ to enforce Michigan law protecting the right to life.**

With Roe v. Wade overturned, Michigan law is clear - unborn babies are protected from abortion. Whitmer, Nessel and prosecutors across the state are refusing to follow the law, putting their liberal, pro-abortion agenda above their oath of office.

[**Peter, take action today by calling County Prosecutors and telling them to do their job and protect life!**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7f7848c1ee&e=fe4b890356)

Visit our Action Center to find their contact information 👇🏼👇🏼

---
| [TAKE ACTION](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=b7eae32fbc&e=fe4b890356 "TAKE ACTION")
---
| | As I've said since the beginning, this Republican Primary will be a fist-fight in a phone booth, __and now, we're coming down to the wire.__

To get our message out to as many Michiganders as possible in the next 4 weeks, we must continue to hammer down on grassroots fundraising. [**If you are able, please pitch in just $5 today to help us finish strong.**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=082ed0a525&e=fe4b890356)

**Hope you can tune in to tonight's debate - it's going to be the best one yet!**

The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f15268ddac&e=fe4b890356)
Garrett Soldano
Republican for Governor

_P.S. - join me at an upcoming event in Allegan, Ottawa, Muskegon or Wanyne Counties.__[See my full event schedule and RSVP here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=94e7c56811&e=fe4b890356) _

---
| [DONATE](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=799c65c86a&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE")
---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081

| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

You can [update your preferences](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=4fd11eb3f5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=4fd11eb3f5).

subject: Polls: Voters want Ohio to stay a pro-choice state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
I’m supporting a ballot measure to let Ohioans, not extreme right-wing politicians, decide on our own health care.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47478302/354439617/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGM3MDUwNC01OGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nwR4Ph5CyfcX65Bu1n-UZTYTfe9496N0hKd2UiYb0Y0=)

Team,
Ohio is a pro-choice state: A majority of Ohioans want abortion to stay legal, and want our government to protect the full range of reproductive care.
**But Mike DeWine and the Republican legislature here in Ohio are doing the exact opposite.** Already – less than a day after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ – they’ve implemented a six-week abortion ban with no exception for rape or incest, and they’re pushing hard to criminalize it altogether.
This isn’t what Ohioans want – so when I’m governor, I’ll support a ballot measure to protect abortion access in the Ohio Constitution because we need to let Ohioans, not extreme right-wing politicians, decide on our own health care.

With politicians like Mike DeWine and his friends running the show in Columbus, this amendment is the best way to restore abortion rights in Ohio and ensure that personal decisions like these are being made by people, not politicians.
I’m running for governor because I believe that our elected officials should work for people – and should protect the rights that Ohioans believe in, including the right to the full range of reproductive care.
**[Ohioans are pro-choice – and we deserve the chance to protect abortion rights, not have Mike DeWine and his Republican allies unilaterally decide what care we can access. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Banned from his own daughter’s graduation
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | Friend,
Radical leftist teachers and school districts have gone too far. First, they tried shoving Critical Race Theory and transgender propaganda down our throats. Then, they began holding secret "equality clubs" and convinced children that they might be bisexual or transgender without telling their parents. Now, they're doing everything in their power to completely silence and censor anyone who fights back. **In fact, they're even BANNING parents from attending their own children's graduation ceremonies if they disagree with the woke curriculum being taught.** I'm happy to announce that we're taking legal action to fight back, but we need your help urgently. **[Which is why I'm asking for an emergency donation of $35 or more today to help the Center for American Liberty protect free speech and fight back against the venomous cancel culture that has infiltrated our schools.](http://trk.readactnews.-pFArRzCZw)** Shawn McBreairty is the father of a high school senior in Bangor, Maine who was told that he was not allowed to attend his daughter's graduation ceremony. Why? Because Shawn had the audacity to question the public school's curriculum and speak out against radical school board members. You see, Shawn filed a series of public record requests (FOAA) and complaints about the conduct of school personnel.** ****However, instead of investigating the issues that Shawn was pointing out, the school district filed a lawsuit against Shawn, seeking to silence him and prevent him from ever filing FOAA requests ever again.** And on top of that, the school district informed him that he was not allowed to attend any of his daughter's graduation events. But Shawn hasn't given up - in fact, he's now working with my team to take the fight to the next level. We've filed an Anti-SLAPP motion to dismiss the ridiculous lawsuit against Shawn-because Shawn's speech is CLEARLY protected by the First Amendment. We're fighting hard, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you join the fight for to protect the rights of parents like Shawn today with a gift of $35 or more?](http://trk.readactnews.)** Let me take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm the Founder of the Center for American Liberty and I've dedicated my career to preserving Constitutional liberties like the freedom of speech which are constantly under attack by the radical left. The Constitution clearly protects your ability to criticize public officials and government employees. It doesn't matter if it's the President of the United States or a school board member in your community - no one is above criticism. You and I cannot allow school districts like the Herman School Department in Bangor, Maine, to get away with censoring parents. **Enough is enough.** It's time for all of us to stand with parents like Shawn and let these radical schools know that they will no longer be allowed to silence us or corrupt our kids. There's no time to waste. [**So please, send your urgent gift of $35 or more today and help us defeat this ridiculous lawsuit with our Anti-SLAPP motion today.**](http://trk.readactnews.) Thank you in advance for your support. Onward to victory,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
|
---
| | P.S. One of the FOAA requests that Shawn filed asked specifically about controversial training that a teacher provided to various schools in the area - that request was denied. We can't allow schools to hide their activities from parents! **[Join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or more right now!](http://trk.readactnews.) **
---
[**DONATE**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://trk.readactnews.) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

---

What we need now is the resources to reach every voter across West Michigan and show them that Hillary is the best possible advocate for our communities on the issues that matter most. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thankful for your support, Team Scholten * | | = Paid for by Hillary Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Of course, the simplest way to beat the MAGA crowd at their own game is to win by such a large margin that they cannot cast any doubt on the results of this election. **That is why we are amassing a large grassroots movement to talk to voters across the district.** **[With just two weeks left before ballots drop, we need volunteers like you to knock on doors, make phone calls, and put a sign up in your yard. clean_body: | | | | Peter — I'm a numbers guy, through and through. And the numbers for our campaign are looking great. Over$1.5 million raised. Tied for 1st in the polls. Over200 interns. And now, this : = That's right, Peter: FiveThirtyEight has declared us the presumptive Democratic nominee and named our campaign the odds-on favorite to beat Republican George Devolder-Santos in November after we win our primary on August 23rd. All this momentum wouldn't be possible without our grassroots supporters like you.= = Peter, we've built this campaign around common sense, win-win solutions to everyday problems. We all want safe streets, affordable healthcare (which includes access to abortion and contraceptives!) and an economy that works for everyone. And we want politicians who share those ideals and can deliver in Washington. That's why I'm in this fight, Peter. With your help, our campaign will take the message to Washington that we're fed up with business as usual: partisan squabbles, showboating, and obstructionism. We're ready for action. For service. For solutions. = More to come! | | Hi Peter, About six weeks ago, I wrote to you about our campaign's whirlwind of activity as we launched our general election campaign. Since that email, our country has endured so much, and I know we're all still reeling from the Supreme Court decision in _Dobbs_. Sometimes it can be hard to know how to move forward, but we know that we must. There's so much at stake, for today, and for the future of our country. **So I just want to say thank you, Peter.** You've stood with me in this fight, you've been there for me when it counted, and thanks to donors like you, we had an impressive finish to our second quarter fundraising efforts. We have a lot of work ahead of us, but it's important to pause and be grateful and remind ourselves that our movement is strong, we are committed, we are people-powered and that's why we are going to win in November. _Val_ **[P.S. — Your support has meant the world to me and our campaign. You've stood with me in this fight, you've been there for me when it counted, and thanks to donors like you, we had an impressive finish to our second quarter fundraising efforts. We have a lot of work ahead of us, but it's important to pause and be grateful and remind ourselves that our movement is strong, we are committed, we are people-powered and that's why we are going to win in November. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485792/354474100/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmI2ZmE5NC03Y2ZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8Igpd-YBUP01B-YdPPpc648_GKsEu7SWo0ZkTFALvE=&emci=89ce0a9d-6afd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f6b6fa94-7cfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364) I just wanted to send you a quick message saying thank you, friend. We launched this campaign for Colorado’s 7th Congressional District less than six months ago. And in that time, we’ve earned support far and wide across our community, assembled an amazing on-the-ground staff, and built an incredible grassroots movement that has never let us down. None of it would be possible without your support, friend. And I just want you to know how grateful I am for everything you do — whether that’s volunteering, donating, or simply reading these emails and keeping up with what’s happening on our campaign. We’ve got a big uphill climb in front of us. We’re in the General Election now, this district is a top swing seat, and our right-wing, anti-choice opponent is backed by over $4.4 million in support by GOP super PACs. Because this race is one of a handful that could determine which party controls Congress, everything from the right to choose to marriage equality to climate action could depend on the outcome. I promise you that I am working night and day to deliver a victory — so that we can defend our values and make progress solving the problems that regular people are facing in Colorado and across the country. I truly am grateful to have you with me in this fight. We’re up against a lot here, but we’ve got an incredible team, and we will win if we work together. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I never gave up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bf260b59a4ae42dc99235c284a3042ff&_e=LIgyyuIRyK2XdXK_JIcsf6L_4SG8cxjqrugA08p5I_rsfWy66aNNJvaYvL_esnroCSs3nvNyYIsjhG3c0j9PfXqufuYNMYwpHPfBgu-FWNVID6KMYuOzbklUsvJDHnEzCUk1g_0KX-fdx6O1VGmkwF_EhdND48quMYdm_TAULYEhfOupxPBh5aQiGb9wV9bzrGER7Vf0MHwoWZZJ8G7rExEfdzVlD7TJ14uz7APK3_y6kGkAkduayBlqVbzKmLbw24xbse0HVB1mzTUxp0ZFw1QFks-W3pTEbc5S8atQvjZdJ5_HkmkfzC1hmZ0iSkZp5sDVm_eZNblRgAS7GAmNQm8nGbf94lz-GYHRU2277cHodq08AB8SniTIkAnTRNzu9A7LjyuFZUUGdWmAOKi45wpLLdZk2gIE6dh4aUFmJoo%3D)

Peter, My family escaped communist Vietnam after my father was put on a kill list. And even coming here as a child, I knew that I was a part of something special.

I know what happens when freedoms are taken for granted

I know what happens without the freedoms we have here, and that made me never take America for granted. So I decided to do something to defend the country that gave me everything.

That’s why I attended the Naval Academy and spent my career fighting alongside special operations to keep America safe. _Because without our military, our great country might not exist._

---
[](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bf260b59a4ae42dc99235c284a3042ff&_e=LIgyyuIRyK2XdXK_JIcsf6L_4SG8cxjqrugA08p5I_rsfWy66aNNJvaYvL_esnroCSs3nvNyYIsjhG3c0j9PfXqufuYNMYwpHPfBgu-FWNVID6KMYuOzbklUsvJDHnEzCUk1g_0KX-fdx6O1VGmkwF_EhdND48quMYdm_TAULYEhfOupxPBh5aQiGb9wV9bzrGER7Vf0MHwoWZZJ8G7rE2kiad3A8ERTdLe1HfypS_GPGrk8CGfTzz1TOG1GWsAWah8bp2mJPdwM_MAYVhKzZZ0E0xbEWRuO8B9iS5Aw53nNiLEi0IENPvTI7RHqqxaRS34EQ3nJi3HZvW2QEJrajKpY4kQmE43GRQVxu9YzOtbu9wU58Ip3EM3U1R6Aj6U2YViBUKw6xK5A1zTTtZZzvRDNmDRvRK09ZzW5UCJh5KI%3D)

**I may have hung up my uniform from combat, but that doesn’t mean I’ve stopped doing everything I can to make this country as strong as it can be.**

**Right now, I’m facing one of the most important missions of my life - running for Congress and beating the Democrat incumbent to take back the House.**

Our freedom is on the line with the midterms, and I know you will NEVER take our liberties for granted.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: Legal drug use in CA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7fc106e3f1&e=f9133ea432)
---
| Hi
Just last week, the Assembly passed a bill to create "safe injection sites" for drug users in several California cities.

If you’re unsure of what that means, here it is plain and simple: _**you can now use illegal hard drugs under supervision by the government without consequence. **_

Under the assumption that this will slow down overdoses, Newsom supports this wild bill that directly contradicts our state’s own laws.

Here is the truth - there is no safe way to use illegal drugs. That’s why they are illegal.

Proponents call this a breakthrough public-health measure, but there's no evidence these sites help addicts stop using.

What they are proven to lead to is more drug abuse, along with the crime and homelessness that hard drugs feed and that have become rampant up and down California.

While our crime rate continues to surge out of control (higher than in decades past), why is our Governor signing bills that allow California’s residents to break the law with no consequence?

We have to stop this madness.

We must have new leadership.

\- Senator Brian Dahle.

P.S. This campaign is funded solely by people like you. We need your help! [Go here to get involved and donate. ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=89a1ef0891&e=f9133ea432)

clean_body: | | | | Hi Just last week, the Assembly passed a bill to create "safe injection sites" for drug users in several California cities. If you’re unsure of what that means, here it is plain and simple: you can now use illegal hard drugs under supervision by the government without consequence. Under the assumption that this will slow down overdoses, Newsom supports this wild bill that directly contradicts our state’s own laws. Here is the truth - there is no safe way to use illegal drugs. That’s why they are illegal. Proponents call this a breakthrough public-health measure, but there's no evidence these sites help addicts stop using. What they are proven to lead to is more drug abuse, along with the crime and homelessness that hard drugs feed and that have become rampant up and down California. While our crime rate continues to surge out of control (higher than in decades past), why is our Governor signing bills that allow California’s residents to break the law with no consequence? We have to stop this madness. We must have new leadership. \- Senator Brian Dahle. P.S. This campaign is funded solely by people like you. body:
Peter, this is important.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485971/354474712/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg2MzNkNC03ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcqp_YyybWeUHZuwps5DGvmbSXu31LfNcCviaAvvw58=)
---
Peter, will you take a moment to read this longer (but important) email on an extremely personal topic?

Since COVID-19 began, I’ve been heartbroken to see unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian-American people across our country. And it’s getting worse: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485972/354474713/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg2MzNkNC03ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcqp_YyybWeUHZuwps5DGvmbSXu31LfNcCviaAvvw58=) **It’s why I proudly led the fight to pass the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act which will help document and fight anti-Asian hate crimes.**

[**I won't stop fighting bigotry and racism. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $3 to help me stay in Congress so I can fight for Asian and Asian-American justice in Washington? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485973/354474714/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg2MzNkNC03ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcqp_YyybWeUHZuwps5DGvmbSXu31LfNcCviaAvvw58=) | [500 DONATION GOAL: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485974/354474715/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg2MzNkNC03ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcqp_YyybWeUHZuwps5DGvmbSXu31LfNcCviaAvvw58=)
---
Peter, this fight is personal to me and my family.

During World War II, 120,000 Japanese-Americans were unjustly forced into internment camps -- including my grandparents and parents. Our family still bears the scars of that dark time in our nation’s history.

Today, we see anti-Asian discrimination in different forms. Elderly grandparents, young people, even spa workers have become tragic victims of anti-Asian discrimination.

_I refuse to become blind or complacent to these injustices._

**I’m working to end anti-Asian hatred and discrimination in all its forms.** We can’t ignore the ugly history of anti-Asian racism in our country. We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities.

I just hope you’ll join me...

[**So Peter, I need to ask again: Will you chip in just $3 to help me fight against anti-Asian hate? With your help today, I know we can make a real difference »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47485975/354474716/452722638?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjg2MzNkNC03ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pcqp_YyybWeUHZuwps5DGvmbSXu31LfNcCviaAvvw58=)

clean_body: Peter, this is important. | = Peter, will you take a moment to read this longer (but important) email on an extremely personal topic? Since COVID-19 began, I’ve been heartbroken to see unprecedented levels of violence against Asian and Asian-American people across our country. And it’s getting worse: = It’s why I proudly led the fight to pass the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act which will help document and fight anti-Asian hate crimes. = | = Peter, this fight is personal to me and my family. During World War II, 120,000 Japanese-Americans were unjustly forced into internment camps -- including my grandparents and parents. Our family still bears the scars of that dark time in our nation’s history. Today, we see anti-Asian discrimination in different forms. Elderly grandparents, young people, even spa workers have become tragic victims of anti-Asian discrimination. I refuse to become blind or complacent to these injustices. I’m working to end anti-Asian hatred and discrimination in all its forms. We can’t ignore the ugly history of anti-Asian racism in our country. We must speak out against injustice and demand protection for ALL marginalized communities. I just hope you’ll join me... = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. | Team, today is the first day of early voting for our August 2nd primary!

As we told you before, we’re launching a Latino community primary voter outreach program. Our research shows that 94 percent of Latino voters who vote in a primary, return to vote in a general election. **_If we can boost primary voting, we can boost general election voting as well!_**

After we updated you recently about the program, _a generous donor has stepped up to match all donations to this program up to $10,000._

That means if we can get our grassroots team to donate, we can double our impact and grow this program.

**[Team, we can’t afford to miss out on this opportunity. Can you donate $10 today to help us raise the $10,000 we need to get the matching donation for our outreach program?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xeTPNCTDTcP-rjdGj8BzmteZSEmIKeO5gw8pXjjUf5VoL7jIgGrOYTeyYs8QpWmMjO8KKmx5zPm3Qm3rT7SnsLRkv3LkJN7KaRq0DQBQdElSkJsnDegkHld93kMUb_8VUGDwMQvpNr_NCUm7gyrda_Mfbq7-rImRRnnjIb3pEe6_Funs99Oomef7Dqg05sKRgdfu9kwMl5dmwl8GXeOAcOno-Wrod5mtLFXSbtlEd4kBE1_P0gtPNpfPGReG2vRvGwm1DSlP3Uk0XrZVIIn8eYDqa0rE-OU-7UAwo-hauSdpS8GjE6CUOdO2_KHZH0fPrJNvq4vcArNu5jA_4YlT7NEDbSFgzeLQkbxbuhahWPWvOni0q9zAXudmWl-eXZ10FJJWEQYmzqcTUH1Za9d9_c8KCNWqMILAI_8MS-eUKnHg/3ni/N1eUj47nR4aazgvYJgetIg/h1/xaqb-VARpG1132W9dnwehoMx35u2jWdcVaL55W486B0)** [

The primary is also a good time to put our field and organizing teams to work. Unlike other states, Arizona has a late primary. Once the primary is over, it’ll be a 90-day sprint to the general election.

This is also an opportunity to get our organizers real training on Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts, before the general election.

With early voting already underway and the majority of Arizonans voting early, we need the resources to launch this program today!

clean_body: | | | We need to be ready for November | | | Team, today is the first day of early voting for our August 2nd primary! As we told you before, we’re launching a Latino community primary voter outreach program. Our research shows that 94 percent of Latino voters who vote in a primary, return to vote in a general election. If we can boost primary voting, we can boost general election voting as well! After we updated you recently about the program, a generous donor has stepped up to match all donations to this program up to $10,000. That means if we can get our grassroots team to donate, we can double our impact and grow this program. The primary is also a good time to put our field and organizing teams to work. Unlike other states, Arizona has a late primary. Once the primary is over, it’ll be a 90-day sprint to the general election. This is also an opportunity to get our organizers real training on Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts, before the general election. With early voting already underway and the majority of Arizonans voting early, we need the resources to launch this program today! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s win together, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: Mark Meuser
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
what you might not know is that Alex’s opponent Mark Meuser is also on the ballot twice.
#

Hi there,
You probably already know that Alex is on the ballot twice this November — once to finish the term he was appointed to after Kamala Harris became Vice President, and again for a full 6-year term.
But what you might _not_ know is that Alex’s opponent Mark Meuser is _also_ on the ballot twice. And with such a slim majority in the Senate, **we cannot take any chances.**
Alex’s opponent Mark Meuser:
* Says he supports the right-wing Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ ,

* Is against expanding background checks or limiting the sale of guns in response to mass shootings,

* And has questioned the results of the 2020 election and said Trump was right about voter fraud.

Yes, his views are way out of line with California, but we cannot afford to underestimate him. He's running this race with the full support — and financial resources — of the California GOP.
Just like they spent millions of dollars on the failed right-wing Recall attempt against Governor Newsom, they are willing to spend millions of dollars coming after Alex before Election Day.
So we are asking:
[**Will you please make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? We are running an aggressive campaign all across California because we know how important it is to hold this seat, but we need your support in order to do it.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july22.2BzSSa&refcode=em220706-1-30&t=1&akid=884%2E159979%2EOE31fF)
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july22.2BzSSa&refcode=em220706-1-30&t=2&akid=884%2E159979%2EOE31fF)**
Alex’s fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to stop us.
But as long as we continue to stand together, our grassroots movement is stronger than any special interest or Republican opponent.
So thank you again for your support, it really means a lot to be in this fight together.
Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=884%2E159979%2EOE31fF)

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Reminder: Why Didn't I Get the Right to Life Endorsement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
That's a very good question.
| | | |
---
---
|
Peter,
You might be puzzled by the fact that I did not receive the Right to Life endorsement.
Although RTL has not explained why it chose to endorse this particular candidate, I know that I am 100% pro-life and as governor, I will continue to fight for the rights of the unborn, with everything I have!
Last year, my wife became pregnant.
Some thought that it was the worst time for a new pregnancy. We already had 5 kids, and I already spent long hours on the campaign trail.
However, we welcomed this new life, and every new life, because it is a gift from God.
In March of this year, little Tommy was born!
My wife and I have 6 kids now, and we're just getting started!
When I am governor, I promise that I will fight to remove the scourge of abortion from the State of Michigan.
Please keep our campaign and family in your prayers, and enjoy these awesome pictures of our family!
---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eoN5Mr2swOiraspR2W-f3OG-PhnQvsoQCspTdMWrI37y1C6Ds_c0EpiRpa3CT1466PpZ7o516mLWxcB_wbrGSfA5rVk0o_ygprDiFQxZnviduKzdvMv0gSwMRvXOAAGB8AJ07poSWIR37Cq7ZPNmsfjFDbDBqovQMrpIl3xVOZHxNYtX6XzYIHV3-J-iKSNpZydjE0gtFsrQLHq1QWBqYQt7Bsd4yiLjKl4k6TOk122pawEVRljc5DkQ4ny7_uk7rVTZJCiiCcp-TUMxAdZ6Vg==&c=ITSgIYoLxi6C8Er7h6yyN8ILZnZJGS-tnTqQo0BlllAZuGrfSFIS8A==&ch=9jgckEhI3AgVZcDSd3reRwOMlUKNuq1WCEEgx-1W_aS6tYDwgxOPtw==)
---
To liberty!

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor

name: WI-03 Polling (via Team McGrath)
subject: Do you support codifying abortion rights at the federal level?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Deb needs your response >>>

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47479014/354443496/1332792259?amount=25&refcode=ea.e3a32ed9-5dfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e3a32ed9-5dfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EzMmVkOS01ZGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Up3G2cbH7ca1G0BNRYMMubYVRwYZ-l2eUCyxG_dEulQ=) | _Roe_ has fallen. Reproductive rights are on the line.

Peter, now that we can’t count on the courts to protect our fundamental rights, the task lies with our elected leaders.

Now that the Supreme Court has overturned the constitutional right to access abortion care, our Democratic leaders _must_ codify reproductive rights at the federal level.

Here in Wisconsin, all abortion clinics closed after the Court’s decision because of an archaic, pre-_Roe_ ban from 1849.

Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell proposed a national abortion ban if they take back control in Washington after the next presidential election.

The majority of Americans believe that abortion should be legal. **The only way to restore and secure reproductive freedom is to codify abortion rights _federally_ as soon as possible.**

Deb is a mother of three and knows that the decision of if and when to have children is the most consequential choice a person can make. She will always support women’s right to determine their own reproductive futures.

Peter, do you agree that our elected officials need to act IMMEDIATELY to federally codify reproductive rights? Take Deb’s poll now ⇩

body:
Peter - Earlier today, we sent out an email announcing Derek's new ad, but didn't include the correct link - our apologies! To watch and share Derek's ad on Facebook, **[please go here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/KTRm1FWTZKMTy2T6FX9G0zP1hrDuaEtpWv5ZmX0yOsE=) **Thank you again for supporting our campaign!
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Kilmer
Date: Wed, Jul 6, 2022
Subject: "Are we really to the point where we're going to let mothers die?"
Team, we need your help to ensure that folks across our district see Derek's new ad:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/KTRm1FWTZKMTy2T6FX9G0zP1hrDuaEtpWv5ZmX0yOsE=)
[WATCH AND SHARE OUR VIDEO](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/KTRm1FWTZKMTy2T6FX9G0zP1hrDuaEtpWv5ZmX0yOsE=)
Sharing Derek's message about what's at stake this November is crucial. We need as many voters as possible to understand what we're fighting for and just how important it is that we help Derek continue representing us in Congress.

When _Politico_ first leaked the Supreme Court's draft decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , millions of Americans were rightfully sent into a panic about what the future may hold for their health and even their lives.

Team, unlike many of the Republicans who are going to be on the ballot this November, Derek recognizes that women's reproductive rights are basic human rights. And he doesn't believe that politicians should get between women and their doctors.

Derek is fighting in Congress to ensure that the majority of folks across the country - who believe it's a woman's right to choose - are heard. But he needs your help to win.

**[Will you share Derek's ad and help us make sure that voters in our district know what's at stake this year? We're counting on your support to reach voters with Derek's message before the August primary. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/KTRm1FWTZKMTy2T6FX9G0zP1hrDuaEtpWv5ZmX0yOsE=)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**[P.S. If you'd like to further your support, chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to help us keep the ad on the air for as long as possible.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/EO59hz0BCQcGtcHUBMvfYqXRhy8OK9Lw27oANXf7oW8=?refcode=em22_220706_adrese_engg_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220706_adrese_engg_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}) **

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/AvVAAMMCFol6BaTMC4vqV8adjk9CjGzK_p8pYA0lEb4=/EO59hz0BCQcGtcHUBMvfYqXRhy8OK9Lw27oANXf7oW8=?refcode=em22_220706_adrese_engg_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220706_adrese_engg_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})
