Derek is fighting in Congress to ensure that the majority of folks across the country - who believe it's a woman's right to choose - are heard. But he needs your help to win. = Thank you, Team Kilmer ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. ={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}} Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

Peter,
---
As a first generation American, the Fourth of July has always been special to me.
---
**Every year, it reminds me of how lucky I am to live in the greatest country in the world.**
---
While most Americans celebrated our country on the 4th, Democrats here in Arizona were doing the complete opposite:
---
[](https://links.ciscomaniforaz.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=b792f9b33cdf45fbacaea1f18e376d5d&_e=sg5TXoJ1dwJnglCqDssAlbxq1I8Qc-3TtjOqLuSHsntLDf2qaxKOjqRbwxXAa-FBPkdFexnTnRV-ZSlJFmsfjknCVIgYLMEAz73Y0pjjjnJHILbz-F6SjX7wjtBKelOONLobLeVxBMnVctZcLemjepNKCjCkIyqQWtIHFObu3YYIG6Zb9jmZmiEX4bLF-aUqhXGebUF_n8R8Xerp1ojtCSOYS0VXmeYmdYbrIJQVWbGvdKJ8QAOCCENchmGFJpj2F2su24qFp59pWGO-ij1zTXrnA3VAFJleINc4Ljp9tVOzvh_m7en7uWkzVOQJPRsVzuCR5Q-vVVA_6OoBQRC_06uAegHXwIuwXOuksReUECX_FtRZ63STsxmBIC1mEtY16_42Mf1dIsQhzuxoVfa0-42D1cf-6UUWfpT9W2Fm8qhJZRUPcGklUQgrNlern9fhafJiP_p744-AWmAlE3BvkJg-tVMKeub9-71b2cNzZ1QzZ_8wGkdPka7O3EdkJKxP9UrtNTr7sBASikd3_Y3AFA%3D%3D)
---
I apologize for the profanity, but I want to show you _exactly_ what we’re up against.
---
**These extremists literally hate America, and they’re lining up behind my opponent to try and deliver a victory for their radical, anti-American agenda.**
---
Peter, I love this country. I’ll do everything I can to fight for the values that make it the greatest country in the world and stop the failed Biden-Harris agenda that’s destroying it.
---
But I need your help to win in August and then to defeat my Democrat opponent in November.
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486610/354477284/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTFiODdjYi03ZmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiuVJP2G_TEU3A16LNZC85dRJWRsiErj-fE0x7mnPsY=&emci=779f3066-7ffd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=fe1b87cb-7ffd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
If you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.

clean_body: If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, If you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. name: For top patriots ONLY
subject: You’re invited to join our Republican force!

body:
| | | Peter, You’ve been a top patriot on the ground working to put AMERICA FIRST.

| | | Derek, ****I know what’s at stake as the country currently deals with the record-breaking Biden-Hassan Border Crisis. _Why?_ **Because I’ve been there and seen it first-hand:**___[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTg4NTc3OTUyNzY5NTEzNzkwJmM9dzVrMSZlPTAmYj05OTA3MzA4NDYmZD1mNXY2cjNn.aWTiDhMV9EoVCiGzPrOMDOlEFpr_qbdkuCCY6dTThas)_

| | | __I saw the extent of the damage myself on a recent visit down to Texas, and let me tell you:_what you see on the 5 o’clock news does not do justice to this unparalleled humanitarian crisis._ **We are witnessing drug and human trafficking like we’ve never seen before, and it’s affecting every single state in America!** Look no further than my home state of New Hampshire, where we are tragically averaging hundreds of opioid-related overdose deaths every single year from deadly narcotics that come from right over the Southern Border... Unlike Maggie Hassan, I know that strong Border Security is our way of finally ending this chaos. I won’t let Mexican drug cartels exploit our weak laws like her - I will put my strong Border Security Plan into action, and stop this lawless, far-left approach to immigration before it _kills_ even more Granite Staters! You can help: **_[support my campaign to unseat Maggie Hassan, and together, we can fix this tragedy, stand up for the 603 when Hassan won’t, and protect our country from this anarchy.>>](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTg4NTc3OTUyNzY5NTEzNzkwJmM9dzVrMSZlPTAmYj05OTA3MzA4NTYmZD1pNXc3YzFz.ARymXEsdR1COGV1-VQHB35S1NqkrRqJnyCATEdL4uYo)_**_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTg4NTc3OTUyNzY5NTEzNzkwJmM9dzVrMSZlPTAmYj05OTA3MzA4NjEmZD1rMHM5bzl5.oyFiDCvDJ6_OospOhOYw-_2-cgd05rfpg8x3zvwA26k)_

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I took on the NRA and won
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
There are *a lot* of similarities between Ron DeSantis and Charlie Crist, but one of the biggest is their history with the gun lobby:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra]
Meanwhile, this is what I had to say on the NRA during my 2018 campaign for Agriculture Commissioner:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra]
In 2018, I stood up to the NRA and WON. And to this day, I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who hasn’t taken a single penny from the NRA.
We can win the fight for gun safety, but we’re not going to do it with NRA-backed politicians like Charlie Crist and Ron DeSantis. Will you chip in $20 today to help elect a candidate who’s always stood against the NRA? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=706nra] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=706nra] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=706nra] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=706nra] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=706nra] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra]
The only way to end the NRA’s influence over our state, keep our communities safe, and take meaningful action to combat gun violence is to try something new — just like I did in 2018.
If you’re with me in the fight for common-sense gun safety, click here to chip in $20 and support the ONLY candidate who stood up to the NRA in Florida and WON. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=706nra]
Thank you for being on my team.
— Nikki

subject: New quarter, new things on the horizon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier to Entry PAC
body:
We apologize for the technical error.
| | | [](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=a67008c819&e=007b353608)
---
Hey there - we hope you were able to take some space for yourself over the weekend. Things have been really heavy lately.

But the fight continues. Now, we're off to a fresh start with a brand new quarter, and we're cooking with gas (and rage) over here at Barrier to Entry PAC. We've got some exciting new things in the pipeline that we can't wait to share with you all.

In an effort to remain totally transparent with you, we wanted to let you know that one of our recent organizational updates was switching over to a new email management tool -- **unfortunately, when we made this transfer, some of the subscription status data for our email contacts got mixed up.

** **We apologize if you've previously opted out from our emails and are still receiveing this email due to the technical error.**

**[For your convenience, we've included the opt-out link right here if you've been mistakenly re-added to our list, or if you no longer wish to hear from us. CLICK HERE TO UNSUBSCRIBE >>](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=8f209d3fef&e=007b353608&c=3fd61a902f)**

_(If you're having any issues with the unsubscribe links above or if you'd like us to update your contact info at all, feel free to reply to this email, and we'll make sure to remove you, but please allow a couple of business days to allow the subscription status to take effect.)

_ Our small, scrappy, 100% women-powered team -- including women of color and queer women -- is just made up of the 5 us. So we truly appreciate your patience and understanding.

subject: Will you endorse my campaign for U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
we CAN win this race and flip Florida blue
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486704/354477697/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)

Friend, I'm officially on the ballot in the race that could decide Senate control, and thanks to your grassroots support, my campaign to flip Florida blue has reached historic heights. But the GOP’s multimillion-dollar backers are determined to buy this Senate seat, and we urgently need to show the strength of our grassroots movement. **That's why, with Election Day quickly approaching, I'm asking you to personally endorse my campaign for Senate.**
I’m counting on at least 1,000 members of this incredibly powerful team of grassroots supporters to take a moment now to officially add their names. **[Friend, I know this seems simple, but knowing that I have your support means a great deal to me. Will you add your name now?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486705/354477698/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486706/354477699/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
**TEAM MEMBER:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**ENDORSEMENT:** **SUBMISSION PENDING**
**DEADLINE:** 11:59 p.m. tonight
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486707/354477700/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
In my decades of public service, I’ve never tired in my fight to do good. From my time as a law enforcement officer to serving as your congresswoman, I’ve never relented in my fight to protect and serve Florida’s working families. Now, I'm ready to continue my hard work in the Senate.
But Florida’s last Senate race was won by just **_0.12%_** of the vote, making it the closest Senate race in the nation – and with Rubio and I neck and neck in the polls, this race is shaping up to be just as close. That means that every single endorsement that I receive between now and midnight WILL make a difference.
**Friend, together, we CAN win this race and flip Florida blue. Right now, Rubio is more vulnerable than ever before – and I'm gaining ground. But I need to build up my grassroots team if I have any chance of competing against the GOP dark-money machine dumping millions into Florida. **
**[_So please, if you’re in this fight with me, sign on now to officially endorse my run for Senate, help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486708/354477701/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)**
| | [COMPLETE ENDORSEMENT ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486709/354477702/1686457543?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3696-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMyY2YxMi04MGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14OSkrFQfQv6pEsDKKhzPvmuRrff8mWyTF_wBXleNZk=&emci=b3ad31fe-f9f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=42c2cf12-80fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)

Thank you,

subject: Our nation is at a breaking point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486889/354478431/-1370483914?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220706gunreform_gv_od30s_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjcwYjE0ZC04MWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R228-lK8KSOnx2jK980dvyUSgRAH4qjOYQpPoBegfnA=)

Team, From Buffalo, to Uvalde, to Highland Park and so many more, mass shootings have become a pervasive problem across the United States, no matter the size, wealth, or demographics of the community. New Mexico suffers from one of the highest rates of gun violence in the country, and our nation is at a breaking point. **We can and must do more to protect our children, families, and loved ones.** While I was endorsed by Giffords — the nationwide organization dedicated to saving lives from gun violence founded by courageous former Representative Gabby Giffords — because I’m ready to support common sense reforms to stop the epidemic of gun violence in Congress, my far-right opponent Rep. Yvette Herrell is opposing any and every measure to save lives. **Herrell voted against both the Protecting Our Kids Act** , which would ban the sale and trafficking of high-capacity magazines and promote the use of firearm storage, **and the bipartisan Senate gun safety bill** that closed the boyfriend loophole, provided funding for mental health and school safety, and more. Speaking as a hunter and responsible gun owner, I’m deeply disappointed but not surprised that Herrell opposes bipartisan legislation to keep our children and communities safe. She’s more interested in politics than people — _we deserve better._ **[November is our chance to replace do-nothing Republicans like Herrell with leaders who will support popular, commonsense measures to reduce harm and save lives. clean_body: | = Team, From Buffalo, to Uvalde, to Highland Park and so many more, mass shootings have become a pervasive problem across the United States, no matter the size, wealth, or demographics of the community. New Mexico suffers from one of the highest rates of gun violence in the country, and our nation is at a breaking point. We can and must do more to protect our children, families, and loved ones. While I was endorsed by Giffords — the nationwide organization dedicated to saving lives from gun violence founded by courageous former Representative Gabby Giffords — because I’m ready to support common sense reforms to stop the epidemic of gun violence in Congress, my far-right opponent Rep. Yvette Herrell is opposing any and every measure to save lives. Herrell voted against both the Protecting Our Kids Act , which would ban the sale and trafficking of high-capacity magazines and promote the use of firearm storage, and the bipartisan Senate gun safety bill that closed the boyfriend loophole, provided funding for mental health and school safety, and more. Speaking as a hunter and responsible gun owner, I’m deeply disappointed but not surprised that Herrell opposes bipartisan legislation to keep our children and communities safe. She’s more interested in politics than people — we deserve better. | We need leaders with spines who will take legitimate action to prevent mass shootings and gun violence. With your support, I plan to be that leader for NM-02 in Congress next year. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: BilldeBlasio.com
subject: Blessings
body:
One of the blessings of actually being from the district, is that we already have enough voters to win.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/201?t=1&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)

Friends -
One of the blessings of actually being from the district, is that we already have enough voters to win.
There are A LOT of people in the district who love pre-K for All, NYC-ID, the fact that we actually reduced inequality in New York City, raised the minimum wage and know that no one will work harder for them in Congress than Bill de Blasio.
Our job is to find them, and turn them out.
That means Bill can spend less time fundraising, and more time talking to actual people.
But we do have some fundraising goals to reach in order to get that done. They aren’t as large as some of our other opponents, but they are important.
So please:
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Bill de Blasio’s campaign for Congress today? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220706&t=2&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220706&t=3&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)**
Meanwhile, Bill is out there every day talking to people in the community...
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220706&t=4&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
At the barber shop...
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220706&t=5&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
In parade routes...
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220706&t=6&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
And at iconic NYC delis.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/212?c0=join-bdb.EEwQiK&refcode=em-220706&t=7&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
So please know that your donation is being put to work on behalf of a candidate who will make the most of it.
Someone who is willing to put in the WORK to win this race, and to serve our communities in D.C.
But he can't do it alone.
[**Please use this link to make a contribution to Bill de Blasio’s campaign for Congress in New York’s new 10th Congressional District.**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220706&t=8&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/195?c0=join-bdb.JkhHxu&refcode=em-220706&t=9&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-)**
Thank you,
Bill de Blasio for Congress

De Blasio for Congress
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=10&akid=175%2E39519%2Eu3j_Y-). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

Peter,

**I am proud to have earned the endorsement of the Arizona Education Association (AEA)!!**

_“As the House Democratic Leader, I am proud to have stood shoulder to shoulder with educators, who have been on the front lines in our communities, to fight for increased funding in the classroom and ensure that their work is supported. As Secretary of State, I will continue to fight for our educators and students to have the funding and resources they need to succeed.”_
As a former special education teacher at Percy L. Julian Elementary School in Phoenix and a former AEA member, this endorsement is extremely important to me. I know that our educators are some of the most hardworking professionals in the state. **Earning their trust, respect, and endorsement means a lot to me and a lot to our campaign, and their support is the fuel that will allow us to win this race.**

**Will you join AZ’s beloved educators and support my campaign today?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-JULY22](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xge0pMVtDvl17n3LmhcoY0pPf73Jrky9_3-I8f9sXnnXtfX6N2ZBjmYkM3KkHMvDqazFLHWOl5H8BSc-6RFMCQt0i0vYW-zB3pLgAck8C6N1PtAjT1pR-bojEFT035zzQHs6G6ojbmSZUs60OzBdq3YXN00hgQfA1_c1aRcIFtsFEvUsrO2dE7So2sREumCJg6I1naEpRIlsc3LRqfe2y62IdNk5HOEUsnWfCZKhqc4r6t-gA4hnXdIROOhkYCFK-QY2qsAfRVFeoPPntQY5TP5cr6tbWUtOq_57z5MfCLDb9HvcAN8EEU8gQdOJgskx_YgQNGnm53fmHmVYu3w0m9Cyln35NH_q0HU_o7gsB0eg/3ni/lfe3RqQwQJ6hBlgfWd6kew/h1/2TwkGcW4hRpnl6UcAGkR9ENvfN6VstLNEw3_vB5uQwY)**

As the AZ House Democratic Leader I worked to secure nearly $1 billion in funding for public education in the Arizona State Budget, signed into law last week. **I promise to always advocate for the success of educators and students across the state of AZ.**

I look forward to continuing the fight, together.

As Secretary of State, I will continue to fight for our educators and students to have the funding and resources they need to succeed.” As a former special education teacher at Percy L. Julian Elementary School in Phoenix and a former AEA member, this endorsement is extremely important to me. I know that our educators are some of the most hardworking professionals in the state. name: Charlie Crist
subject: Can you believe this, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486999/354478862/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220706_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzNmYzUyNS04MmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4OLm9x-6MIRbzrXh5Z3UWPRt0suvNQ1uYcx2AEUDK6g=)
---
Friend,

I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and our people during his time as governor, my blood pressure rises. It seems there’s _no end_ to what he’ll do to advance his own political career.

He’s vowed to **eliminate background checks and gun permits** across Florida, putting our children and our families in greater danger.

He signed **the most restrictive anti-choice legislation** in Florida’s history since _Roe v. Wade_ , banning almost all abortions, with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it.

To put an even finer point in this: Now that the Supreme Court has left the right to choose up to the states, DeSantis refuses to say how far he’ll go to take away reproductive freedom. This has huge impacts not only in Florida, but also for millions of women in the South who might soon be traveling here to exercise their rights.

DeSantis is determined to silence _anyone_ who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in _POLITICO_ that **DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy.”** He’s even gone after the Special Olympics for going against his backwards political agenda. Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up.

Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House.

**The good news: a recent _Listener Group_ poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track, I need your grassroots support to help keep up momentum. Will you pitch in right now?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtney=20Geels?=
subject: Did you know?
body:
👂💭🔥 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/27a0ac32ef16/did-you-know?e=20ac8f046f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,

_**DID YOU KNOW?**_ One of the important responsibilities of the Congresswoman elected to the open seat of the North Carolina 4th Congressional District is to sponsor worthy high school seniors for an appointment to one of the four service academies in our nation!
---
|
---
| We are truly blessed to have the United States Military Academy in West Point, New York, the United States Naval Academy in Annapolis, Maryland, the United States Air Force Academy in Colorado Springs, Colorado, and the Merchant Marine Academy in Kings Point, New York.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| These four institutions, funded by taxpayers through our Congress and Senate, are not only institutions of higher education on par with Duke, UNC-Chapel Hill, NC State, and others, but are also considered active military bases! The service academies are “world class” universities, whose graduates become commissioned officers in the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Merchant Marine services. Marine Corps officers come from within the ranks of the Navy. Men and women in the 11th grade are encouraged to visit these institutions before applications are submitted to the respective academies in the 12th grade, to see if this education and service are “right” for them. Selection of students applying from all 50 states and US Territories require excellent grades, physical fitness, and good moral character. The student applicant must also request a recommendation from the sitting Congressperson of the District in which they reside, one of the two Senators of their state, or the Vice-President.

Admission is competitive, and is akin to receiving a full-tuition scholarship, with room and board. This also includes all books, clothing, and travel expenses. Students start their “college experience” with four weeks of standard “boot camp” military service, just like any other enlisted service-woman or man, including strict discipline, exercise, and military training, including weapons and physical combat! During or after this period of time, some incoming students decide that this experience is not right for them. Those students who graduate in four years receive an amazing education, and will serve for a minimum of five years as officers in one of the services.
---
|
---
| My staff and I will be ready to go, from day one in Washington, DC, to assist and sponsor worthy high school seniors for admission to our Academies. We will also be ready to provide support for the parents of these “officers-to-be”.

Thank you, Peter, I am thankful to have your support.

clean_body: 👂💭🔥 | | | | | | | Dear Peter, DID YOU KNOW? One of the important responsibilities of the Congresswoman elected to the open seat of the North Carolina 4th Congressional District is to sponsor worthy high school seniors for an appointment to one of the four service academies in our nation! | | We are truly blessed to have the United States Military Academy in West Point, New York, the United States Naval Academy in Annapolis, Maryland, the United States Air Force Academy in Colorado Springs, Colorado, and the Merchant Marine Academy in Kings Point, New York. | | | These four institutions, funded by taxpayers through our Congress and Senate, are not only institutions of higher education on par with Duke, UNC-Chapel Hill, NC State, and others, but are also considered active military bases! The service academies are “world class” universities, whose graduates become commissioned officers in the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Merchant Marine services. Marine Corps officers come from within the ranks of the Navy. Men and women in the 11th grade are encouraged to visit these institutions before applications are submitted to the respective academies in the 12th grade, to see if this education and service are “right” for them. Selection of students applying from all 50 states and US Territories require excellent grades, physical fitness, and good moral character. The student applicant must also request a recommendation from the sitting Congressperson of the District in which they reside, one of the two Senators of their state, or the Vice-President. Admission is competitive, and is akin to receiving a full-tuition scholarship, with room and board. This also includes all books, clothing, and travel expenses. Students start their “college experience” with four weeks of standard “boot camp” military service, just like any other enlisted service-woman or man, including strict discipline, exercise, and military training, including weapons and physical combat! During or after this period of time, some incoming students decide that this experience is not right for them. Those students who graduate in four years receive an amazing education, and will serve for a minimum of five years as officers in one of the services. | | My staff and I will be ready to go, from day one in Washington, DC, to assist and sponsor worthy high school seniors for admission to our Academies. We will also be ready to provide support for the parents of these “officers-to-be”. Thank you, Peter, I am thankful to have your support. | | | Courtney Geels | "Volunteer" | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for byCourtney Geels for Congress Our mailing address is: Courtney Geels for Congress PO Box 995 Hillsborough, NC 27278 Want to change how you receive these emails? President Trump has a once-in-a-lifetime offer for you... An authentic MAGA HAT THAT WAS HAND-SIGNED by your favorite President: DONALD J. TRUMP. But this isn't just any MAGA Hat... it 's President Trump's favorite MAGA Hat that he personally designed. He told us to reach out, so YOU could have a chance to win it, Friend. This HAND-SIGNED MAGA HAT is an iconic memento and something that we are only offering to a trustworthy Patriot like YOU. Please DO NOT share this offer with anyone. President Trump made it clear that he thinks you're more than deserving of this hand-signed MAGA hat, so we REALLY wantYOU to have it. BUT, you MUST act NOW. President Trump will review the updated entry list in the next 30 minutes. Make sure he sees YOUR NAME, Friend. Thank you, Team Trump NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "MAGAHAT" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between June 1, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on July 31, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) signed Make America Great Again Hat and one (1) certificate of authentication (approximate retail value $40). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC. Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 Thank you for joining Team Trump. Thanks to your generous support, we'll win BACK our Republican Majority in the House AND the Senate. To stay up-to-date on our latest efforts, President Trump needs you to sign up to become an TEXT TRUMP to 88022 to start receiving text messages from President Trump. We are emailing you at dpwillis67@gmail.com to update you on critical information regarding President Trump's efforts to SAVE AMERICA. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We SHATTERED our fundraising goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I wanted to take a minute to thank you for your support.
| | |
---
Hello,

I wanted to take a minute to thank you for your support. It was starting to look like we wouldn’t hit our goal last month, but this grassroots team really stepped up. Thanks to tens of thousands of donations from people like you, we SHATTERED our fundraising goal for this quarter.

Your support means the world to me, and every single dollar helps us fight back against the **over $10 million dollars in attack ads** the GOP has unleashed on me.

**[We’re not going to slow down – but neither will the Republicans. So I’m asking for your support again: Can you please rush $3 or whatever you can to keep our momentum going?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47487404/354480452/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1268-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjEyMjA0NS04NGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-kI0hnUeLSMt9VHiSaQhmUSuyUZpDSuOlS6CQessXM=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

**_A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. **[Pre-order your signed copy today to have it shipped to you once it launches in clean_body: | | | Friend, We wanted to make sure you saw Nikki Haley’s email about getting a free set of “Proud To Be An American” stickers. Show off your love for our country by helping us elect freedom-loving conservatives today and you’ll get a free set of stickers. Sincerely, Stand For America PAC Team | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. To pre-order your signed copy of "If You Want Something Done..." chip in $45 or more. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. body:
What if we said...
| | |
---
Friend —
Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $5 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our emergency fundraising deadline ends at MIDNIGHT tonight?
What if we told you that in 2020 Mark won by 2.4% of the vote, and that a recent poll showed Mark is down by TWO POINTS in Arizona?
What if we told you that’s why the NRSC spent $1,000,000 in attack ads against Mark in just ONE WEEK to defeat us — and that they’ve committed about $1,000,000 more in the coming days?
And what if we told you that we missed our fundraising goals for the last two months in a row?
Time is definitely running out, friend. So, we’re asking:
**[Can you PLEASE make a $5 contribution – split between Mark Kelly and Jacky Rosen – before our emergency fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? We need your help to reach our goals.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47487512/354481016/-1087597766?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1870-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjgzYWJhNS04NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yCUcBE1zCsXSSLbsWXIQil4lPn5DUebnMiEiIZnu3TE=)**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: BREAKING: 🚨 Endorsed By President Trump 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/303829af4c75194b/9a55bb4ee3de0b56c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Did you see the news? President Donald Trump just gave me his Complete & Total Endorsement! I am proud to receive this recognition: **“Congressman Kevin Hern is doing an outstanding job representing Oklahoma’s 1st Congressional District.** **As a successful businessman, Kevin knows how to Grow the Economy, Lower Taxes, and Eliminate Government Waste. Kevin is working hard to Secure the Border, Protect Life, Support our Military and Veterans, and Defend the First and Second Amendments. ** ** ****Kevin is a respected leader in Congress, and he has my Complete and Total Endorsement!”

** **\- President Donald Trump** President Trump’s leadership in the White House brought us the greatest economy in the history of the world - and his appointments to the Supreme Court achieved this week’s historic pro-life victory. I’m proud to have worked with President Trump to unleash America’s energy sector, progress that has been eroded under 18 months of Biden’s failed policies. Biden has allowed millions of illegal immigrants to cross our Southern border with no consequences and his foreign policy failures have embarrassed us on the world stage. **[I’m ready to take back the House & restore President Trump’s America First Agenda - are you with me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/303829af4c75194b/362df87a8c0b663cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Together, we can save President Trump’s legacy! Thank you for your support, Kevin Hern

My name is Ryan Zinke, I am a former Commander at SEAL Team 6, a member of Trump's Cabinet, and I'm on a mission to Drain the Swamp, and restore Trump's vision to Make America Great Again.

Pelosi and her peons know that I'm a threat. That's why they're trying to stop me before I make it to Congress.

It is not easy for me to ask for help. It is not easy for me to plead with strangers for money. But this mission is too important.

Democratic leadership is failing Americans across the country. We must restore Trump's agenda and start serving real Americans again.

That's why I'm begging you for support. If every person reading this message right now chips in just $5, we break a fundraising record and my campaign has what it needs to beat Pelosi's flood of cash and win.

clean_body: | | | | | | I'm devastated Peter. Pelosi has mobilized millions to stop me. My name is Ryan Zinke, I am a former Commander at SEAL Team 6, a member of Trump's Cabinet, and I'm on a mission to Drain the Swamp, and restore Trump's vision to Make America Great Again. Pelosi and her peons know that I'm a threat. That's why they're trying to stop me before I make it to Congress. | | The SEALs made me tough.Tougher than almost any other candidate running for Congress. If Pelosi can bury me with her cash onslaught, she can take out anyone. It is not easy for me to ask for help. It is not easy for me to plead with strangers for money. But this mission is too important. Democratic leadership is failing Americans across the country. We must restore Trump's agenda and start serving real Americans again. That's why I'm begging you for support. If every person reading this message right now chips in just $5, we break a fundraising record and my campaign has what it needs to beat Pelosi's flood of cash and win. | | | | Once I've made it to Congress, you have my words as a former Navy SEAL, I will return this favor 10 times over starting with firing Pelosi. Thank you for your time, Ryan Zinke, Former Commander at SEAL Team 6 Congressional Candidate | | Want to FIRE Pelosi? Text McCarthy to 85681 to help House Republicans take back Congress. A note from Kevin: | | "McCarthy Footer" | As Leader of the House Republicans, I'm committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I'm incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I'm doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left's political games. If you'd like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- "EXPRESS DONATE HERE>>>"** The fight is far from over, and we're only getting started. Kevin McCarthy Leader, House Republicans | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

ICYMI: Mississippi’s single abortion clinic is contesting Roe v. Wade head-on and the judge presiding over the case has issued an 8-page order allowing the near-total abortion ban to go into effect.
She said blocking the law would do "irreparable harm" to the State of Mississippi.
Governor Tate Reeves clearly agrees and continues pressing to ban all abortions. He even sidestepped a question about legalizing abortion in cases of a mother’s endangered health, rape, or incest.
Looking at Congressman Guest’s social media pages, it’s easy to see that he’s siding with Reeves .
Michael Guest’s voting record would look different if this issue focused on the life of women and children. But it’s about racking up political points instead .
Michael Guest hasn’t been able to pass real, actionable legislation that betters the lives of hardworking people in his district. And he hasn’t done anything to improve Mississippi’s awful maternal health ranking. He’s out of touch with the communities he represents.
Mississippi women deserve better. That starts by electing leaders who recognize that a woman has the sole rights to her body. And that any healthcare decisions should be made privately between her and her doctor. Full stop.
Shuwaski will face Michael Guest this November. We must continue scaling up our campaign to meet the moment and reach out to voters and pro-choice supporters. Can we count on you to chip in $25? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20220706_25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20220706_25]
Be sure to check out our website and social media pages to stay up to date with the campaign!

Thanks for your support,
Team Young
Shuwaski Young

Jackson, MS 39205-0151

body:
You need to hear this update...
| **\--- OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS MEMO: REBECCA FOR GOVERNOR ---**
---
Friend — I hope your 4th of July was a special one, filled with family, friends, and celebration. Most of all, I hope you’re as proud as I am to be an American, especially as the Left attempts to shame us for loving our country.
---
That’s why I made it a point for this campaign to pause our fundraising over the holiday weekend.
---
But with this governor’s race still a _1-point_ contest as we kick off the FINAL MONTH before Election Day, the fundraising hit we took while on pause has set us back significantly.
---
_By the time we wrapped this morning’s finance meeting, we were already pacing**$26,410** behind to begin this final stretch._
---
But I promised our finance director Colleen that we could make up this shortfall — because we have something our opponent doesn’t...

Peter, over the summer we've reached record-high gas prices throughout the entire country. It's causing headaches for families across our nation. And what's Biden doing? _NOTHING._ His out-of-control spending policies are digging us into an even bigger hole and it must end NOW. [**STAND WITH RAND: I AGREE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e691603e36ff41fb91be4e73e9cbfdb4&_e=B_BfHWAqBwAcUnLraGGhF4cnjLBEMUNyxSeLnoexXjbbfRQIVz3e7FTMJcdpQYf_K7wdZuGQRktibvyWjxx6svdEZtYBWA6QQx3QQ4bFNzUxxwoN3lZtryomFu5pBR-WldgTC2QUhI6_pYCNZrwPtQhmcZLcJys5OtLEATe6m3CNvrEtmu0UL5XhcwpI475t0WBPyW8vR2kVzfWCYT6aEImHEpH5VgZzELAAC5vqIu3UkSvC3Rq9L8fJmzlqAqLGpZk8uPU415yRI_fa2xqLUaixTzW14BYm5S55zOd28TVJKBzujwgCsyRHCRtu1kjQN75DGAr2VgIwEq1ow5Zlka6MR3DULuE2pVwGvXjlGC7nmNZurX_FQvwiyqgvCKiK8oo_6v6PPE_fIEN3Che1uyeYFnSWkSiTJvQfpNfGr6DCCmUGOfrAQP2o3oBOR1jV) **_The only way we are going to get this country back on track is to CUT federal spending to curb inflation and empower American energy companies to produce more oil._** That's what I'm fighting for in the Senate, Peter, but I could use your help. clean_body: over the summer we've reached record-high gas prices throughout the entire country.| | | Peter, over the summer we've reached record-high gas prices throughout the entire country. It's causing headaches for families across our nation. And what's Biden doing? NOTHING. His out-of-control spending policies are digging us into an even bigger hole and it must end NOW. The only way we are going to get this country back on track is to CUT federal spending to curb inflation and empower American energy companies to produce more oil. That's what I'm fighting for in the Senate, Peter, but I could use your help. Can you chip in now to help me TAKE BACK THE SENATE, end inflation, and cut gas prices? - The way I see it, this administration thinks they can intimidate Americans into accepting their failing, dangerous policies. And the media is helping them do it! They’ll blame high gas prices and inflation on anyone but themselves. But I know exactly who is to blame. And I will not be intimidated by the liberal mob. I will do everything I can to end the reckless spending that is driving the price of goods through the roof and expose the truth about government coverups. Because I know this fight is more important than ever. I hope you'll stand with me by chipping in today: Thank you in advance. In liberty,Rand Paul | | . | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. body:
Enclosed.

Friend,

**With the primary election behind us, we’re officially kicking off our General Election matchup against Young Kim in the 40th District.**

From the start, this campaign has been about listening and being a voice for Orange County families on the issues that matter -- health care, rising costs, price gouging at the pumps, reproductive freedoms, jobs, and so much more. Extremists like Young Kim have legislated based on the whims of Donald Trump and what's trending on _Fox News_ , but last month's primary results proved that Orange County won't fall for the far-right easily.

**Thousands of supporters have already signed on to become official endorsers of my campaign. We’re hoping to kick off the General Election push by adding another 100 from 18326 to that number.

[Now that I’m officially the Democratic nominee, will you add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign against Young Kim? It’s important to know we can count on your support to turn CA-40 blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47488150/354486174/530280872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODcxMjRjNy04OGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBH62MWo94BZ0gR7UqmqiDVk4qcMxtJYSZrMHO2M7GA=&emci=067124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=087124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7344083)**
| [Endorse](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47488151/354486175/530280872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODcxMjRjNy04OGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBH62MWo94BZ0gR7UqmqiDVk4qcMxtJYSZrMHO2M7GA=&emci=067124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=087124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7344083)

After redistricting, Young Kim showed us her true colors when she left behind 80% of her constituents to run in this district. It is clear she cares more about staying in power than serving the community. We can’t allow that to happen.

I’ve served patients in this community for decades. I understand what’s ailing Orange County families, and I’m ready to take a thoughtful, common-sense approach to legislating in Congress. But that’s only possible if thousands of supporters step up to send a message that we can’t be bought by the super PACs backing Kim.

That’s where you come in:

**[Add your name to personally endorse my campaign to unseat Young Kim and bring integrity back to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47488152/354486176/530280872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODcxMjRjNy04OGZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBH62MWo94BZ0gR7UqmqiDVk4qcMxtJYSZrMHO2M7GA=&emci=067124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=087124c7-88fd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=7344083)**

Dr. Asif Mahmood

Team,

There are no words to describe the horrific mass shooting we saw on Independence Day earlier this week in Highland Park, Illinois. Make no mistake: a country where mass shootings are a daily occurrence is not a free country. While we’ve made important progress in enacting common-sense gun reform legislation, it’s never been clearer that the work is far from over.

The bipartisan gun reform package was a good start. But that’s just what it is, a starting point. More action must be taken until mass shootings are a distant memory. We already know the consequences. So let’s push harder, and do even more.

If you agree, can you sign on to our petition demanding even more action on gun reform, team? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1RqpZi0UzEywXhlRhKfFpQ2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1RqpZi0UzEywXhlRhKfFpQ2]

We are sick and tired of waking up to news of mass violence and death. We are encouraged by the work of Congress to respond to these crises, but it’s going to take even more all-encompassing legislation to get to the root of the gun violence epidemic and end it, once and for all.

Buffalo. Uvalde. Highland Park.

No more. Let’s work together and get even more legislation on the agenda, team. Sign on now: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1RqpZi0UzEywXhlRhKfFpQ2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1RqpZi0UzEywXhlRhKfFpQ2]

Thanks, team.

— Team Swalwell

WATCH NOW >>>
| | | Peter,

Did you catch Coach’s recent interview on _FOX & Friends_?

He’s fired up and he’s not holding back – Coach is sick and tired of watching Joe Biden and the Democrats fail the American people and refuse to accept accountability.

**Inflation is at a 41-year high. The cost of gas is at an all-time high. 59 percent of Americans now consider rising prices a crisis in their households.**

_Coach is calling out Joe Biden for his War on American Energy and economic illiteracy!_

[**Tap or click here to watch the interview >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d9d72a5b7212c52f/36bb057c25469135c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

---
When President Trump was in office, inflation was completely under control at 1.4 percent. It’s now at 8.6 percent, with no signs of easing... and Biden is desperately trying to blame the war in Ukraine for this mess, despite the fact that inflation began rising as soon as he took office over a year before this war began. He thinks he can play us for fools.

We need to bring a **RED WAVE** crashing down this fall to get our nation back on track**.**

Coach is all-in to win, and we’re counting on YOU as we ramp up our efforts!

[**Take a few minutes to watch Coach’s _FOX & Friends _interview now**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/d9d72a5b7212c52f/55cee1dbd4508e83c3d6b838967d376c/33013), and forward on this email to let your family and friends know that we’re working hard at Team Tuberville to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY on November 8th.

Peter – I have some good news and some bad...
---
First, the bad: We took a serious hit after pausing our fundraising over the holiday weekend.
---
_**We’re pacing $31,090 behind for our FINAL month of the election, all while Mitch McConnell’s RINOs continue to spend millions through their Super PAC to throw this race to a Soros-funded Democrat.**_
---
But now, for the good: **With just _WEEKS_ to go until Election Day, generous pro-Trump patriots have offered to 700% MATCH YOUR contributions for the next HOUR to help us make up this shortfall.**
---
As a Navy SEAL, I’ll _never_ give up – but now more than ever, I need the help of grassroots Americans like you to continue this fight all the way through Election Day.

clean_body: We’re falling behind. | Peter – I have some good news and some bad... First, the bad: We took a serious hit after pausing our fundraising over the holiday weekend. We’re pacing $31,090 behind for our FINAL month of the election, all while Mitch McConnell’s RINOs continue to spend millions through their Super PAC to throw this race to a Soros-funded Democrat. But now, for the good: With just WEEKS to go until Election Day, generous pro-Trump patriots have offered to 700% MATCH YOUR contributions for the next HOUR to help us make up this shortfall. As a Navy SEAL, I’ll never give up – but now more than ever, I need the help of grassroots Americans like you to continue this fight all the way through Election Day. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Peter,
We are hosting an event on July 11th with a very special guest. Former Secretary of State, current U.S. Senator, and fighter for voter and workers' rights, Sherrod Brown, will be joining me for a virtual event!
It would be an honor if you would attend this event so you can stay up-to-date with everything we are doing on the ground to protect the right to vote in Colorado.
Date: Monday, July 11
Time: 5:00 to 6:00 PM MT
Show your support for the campaign by joining us for this special virtual event!
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenajuly11?refcode=220706-email]
Looking forward to seeing you there.
Jena Griswold
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!

body:

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8471?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220706-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorPerliousHybrid-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220706-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorPerliousHybrid-ETG-sl1&akid=5095%2E9716520%2Ef5D47J)

Team -- When Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked the Supreme Court with _three_ ultra-MAGA justices, they put our most basic constitutional rights in grave danger.

Already they've struck down commonsense gun regulations, blocked action on climate change, and even **overturned _Roe v. Wade_** \-- and now Justice Sotomayor is sounding the alarm!

In a recent dissent, she BLASTED the Court's latest right-wing ruling -- warning that "all of our rights [are] hanging in the balance" -- **but now we need to know if Democrats like YOU are ready to take action. Please, tell us now:** **

**Do you agree we MUST restore balance to the Supreme Court?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8471?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220706-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorPerliousHybrid-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220706-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorPerliousHybrid-ETG-sl1&akid=5095%2E9716520%2Ef5D47J)

name: Delia Ramirez
subject: An update on my primary race
disclaimer_text: paid for by anyone other than YOU and our fellow working people
body:
The support of Working Families Party members and supporters helped carry me across the finish line. | | | Hi Peter, it’s Delia Ramirez. As the daughter of immigrants, a State Representative, and a fierce advocate of working people, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude to share that **I won my highly contested primary election in Illinois’ Third Congressional District.** Despite all the odds, our campaign joined WFP champions across New York and Colorado in victory last week. But I want to be clear about something: **Those primary wins were _our_ victories** — because without the support of the Working Families Party, I may not have made it this far. This isn’t just about me though, Peter: **I’m the sixth Working Families Party candidate to win a Democratic primary challenge for Congress in the 2022 election cycle so far.** The challenges that face our nation require bold action and progressive values. My fellow WFP-endorsed candidates are the movement leaders who are leading the charge in bringing much needed change to elected positions across the country. We aren’t bought and paid for by anyone other than YOU and our fellow working people. **That’s what makes the support provided by WFP so vital to our campaigns — we don’t have shady millionaires and corporate PACs supporting our work.** **[Please, can you make a donation of $6 today to support the important movement building and voter mobilization efforts done by WFP? Their tireless organizing work can only continue through November if folks like you chip in when you can.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUklE3O962waRLF1D5nxkKsNrEjtj9hnsXh2G0q-cxqZ6Bk_MFx4f9aLERZBcOdt11871TN8j8G6kzEkwi19xA5pWNxGE9Xpa0i9sJ9mqydD7yHWnUEDtihm1rm4Vxr6G2BbiijqutGw61h-T-fG5CCEn2j6UpHhjwDuOss2FUUrqgdbxnpsPJTA7fpO8QgQYxdOKyJof5Q02u75ut2Ty89SeQrCqWQeBLEeab5bbin883p8M2xOW5uiLtd1nI-61DUVFeohav0X83wy6ZWRTt_xZLyzSyOAX88HPTWgO8ftr8Cs1WzfHih2Sif4MLlo-S/3ni/nd1WcqQnS-Ossx-_419yxw/h0/RV1xKePeHB74_nUkC62kix73hmcUITA-XUF-L2Fapdw)** **[Contribute $6 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUklE3O962waRLF1D5nxkKsNrEjtj9hnsXh2G0q-cxqZ6Bk_MFx4f9aLERZBcOdt118QXa2WHCGepTu8GXS-uv0QFC3ct4T3Yhl9p7B1uAiahkzkAXYQx2LOrtRDhRHBfHBV97CY-NDvNPjeqdjp983qVazIkH_4K7dN6HFUA8h77DYPcT8NqHE21TyxXH1cY0HzKC4a1U26BbwDiNfY1DsTP9UTlnpjO6Nhz1YbvdPHleDpITJQhE4bFobqcuSBPT0UYRkoj22cUbmtlkTUVpo42YmMj8J6W8vnE-IbjdEb0sq7tjEDX5-4B-qHtnjtAc/3ni/nd1WcqQnS-Ossx-_419yxw/h1/tzj4ke8uSxhQh3nE06Rlh7BsE8z9qOuvNdivFCBRfRw)** Last week proved that when we come together and fight for each other, we can defeat corporate special interests no matter how many millions they throw at us. But we don't have time to rest. There are more WFP champions who have upcoming primaries, including Mandela Barnes in Wisconsin in just over a month from now. Because of supporters like you, WFP had the resources to support my campaign by:
* 300+ volunteer shifts
* 22,000+ phonebank dials from WFP volunteers
* 71 phonebank shifts completed
* 240,000+ texts sent to voters by WFP volunteers
* Running a major TV and digital advertising campaign to introduce voters to my campaign and highlight my opponent’s actual record

**If we’re going to elect more progressive champions across the country, from City Council to the U.S. Senate, we need to support their organizing and mobilization work.[Can you make your first donation of $6 today so WFP can power more champions to victory next month and all the way through to clean_body: The support of Working Families Party members and supporters helped carry me across the finish line. | | | Hi Peter, it’s Delia Ramirez. As the daughter of immigrants, a State Representative, and a fierce advocate of working people, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude to share that I won my highly contested primary election in Illinois’ Third Congressional District. Despite all the odds, our campaign joined WFP champions across New York and Colorado in victory last week. But I want to be clear about something: Those primary wins were our victories — because without the support of the Working Families Party, I may not have made it this far. This isn’t just about me though, Peter: I’m the sixth Working Families Party candidate to win a Democratic primary challenge for Congress in the 2022 election cycle so far. The challenges that face our nation require bold action and progressive values. My fellow WFP-endorsed candidates are the movement leaders who are leading the charge in bringing much needed change to elected positions across the country. We aren’t bought and paid for by anyone other than YOU and our fellow working people. That’s what makes the support provided by WFP so vital to our campaigns — we don’t have shady millionaires and corporate PACs supporting our work. Last week proved that when we come together and fight for each other, we can defeat corporate special interests no matter how many millions they throw at us. But we don't have time to rest. There are more WFP champions who have upcoming primaries, including Mandela Barnes in Wisconsin in just over a month from now. Because of supporters like you, WFP had the resources to support my campaign by: 300+ volunteer shifts 22,000+ phonebank dials from WFP volunteers 71 phonebank shifts completed 240,000+ texts sent to voters by WFP volunteers Running a major TV and digital advertising campaign to introduce voters to my campaign and highlight my opponent’s actual record If we’re going to elect more progressive champions across the country, from City Council to the U.S. Senate, we need to support their organizing and mobilization work. In solidarity, Delia Ramirez Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show D.C. Schools Pushed Racial Segregation in Employee ‘Affinity Spaces’
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 194 pages of records from District of Columbia Public Schools (DCPS) which show DC officials pushed segregated “Affinity Spaces” on the basis of race and sexual identity.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | July 07, 2022
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtc2Nob29scy1wdXNoZWQtc2VncmVnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---
# [Judicial Watch: Records Show D.C. Schools Pushed Racial Segregation in Employee ‘Affinity Spaces’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtc2Nob29scy1wdXNoZWQtc2VncmVnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
A DCPS memo details events to be held in June 2021 and is titled “Proposed Engagement in Response to Recent Racial Incidents” begins: “These are troubling times. I imagine that we all are struggling to make sense of the murder of George Floyd and the continued racial violence and racism that people of color, but black people specifically, endure at the hands of the police, other systems and individuals.”

A table of proposed events in the memo includes an “Affinity Group Brown Bag” that is described as a “Moderated space for CO [Central Office] staff to reflect, connect, feel, share, strategize in smaller, affinity (Black, White, Latinx, Asian) space: Focus on self-awareness, identity and cultural awareness.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27633&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtc2Nob29scy1wdXNoZWQtc2VncmVnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
|
---
| |
---
### [U.S. Devotes $195 Mil to “Redress the Legacy of Harm” in Racist Transportation Infrastructure ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27635&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFjaXN0LXRyYW5zcG9ydGF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Judicial Watch In the Biden administration’s latest racial equity project, American taxpayers will spend $195 million to help connect minority communities that are cut off from economic opportunities by racist transportation infrastructure. The costly plan is known as Reconnecting Communities Pilot (RCP) and it is part of the Department of Transportation’s (DOT) “Equity Strategy Goal to reduce inequities” across the nation’s transportation systems and the communities they effect. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27635&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFjaXN0LXRyYW5zcG9ydGF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---
### [DC public schools hosts racially segregated ‘affinity groups’ for staff ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27632&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcHVibGljLXNjaG9vbHMtaG9zdHMtcmFjaWFsbHktc2VncmVnYXRlZC1hZmZpbml0eS1ncm91cHMtZm9yLXN0YWZmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Fox News According to documents obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request and provided to Fox News Digital, DCPS has hosted a number of affinity groups for school staff at least once a month, including those for employees who identify as Asian American Pacific Islander, Black/African American, Hispanic/Latinx, Indigenous/Native American, LGBTQIA+, multi-racial, or White. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27632&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcHVibGljLXNjaG9vbHMtaG9zdHMtcmFjaWFsbHktc2VncmVnYXRlZC1hZmZpbml0eS1ncm91cHMtZm9yLXN0YWZmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---
### [North Carolina Migrant Shelter Quietly Opens after HHS Denies Plan to Congress ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59320&L=27603&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmMtbWlncmFudC1zaGVsdGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Judicial Watch A year after Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Xavier Becerra denied in a congressional hearing the Biden administration’s plan to open a North Carolina facility for illegal immigrant minors, it is happening. The federal government is leasing a vacant international boarding school, American Hebrew Academy, in Greensboro for five years to accommodate the influx of migrants, which are classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) by the government though most are adolescents and young adults. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 194 pages of records from District of Columbia Public Schools (DCPS) which show DC officials pushed segregated “Affinity Spaces” on the basis of race and sexual identity. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | July 07, 2022 ---|---|--- | | = = A DCPS memo details events to be held in June 2021 and is titled “Proposed Engagement in Response to Recent Racial Incidents” begins: “These are troubling times. I imagine that we all are struggling to make sense of the murder of George Floyd and the continued racial violence and racism that people of color, but black people specifically, endure at the hands of the police, other systems and individuals.” A table of proposed events in the memo includes an “Affinity Group Brown Bag” that is described as a “Moderated space for CO [Central Office] staff to reflect, connect, feel, share, strategize in smaller, affinity (Black, White, Latinx, Asian) space: Focus on self-awareness, identity and cultural awareness.” = | | | Judicial Watch In the Biden administration’s latest racial equity project, American taxpayers will spend $195 million to help connect minority communities that are cut off from economic opportunities by racist transportation infrastructure. The costly plan is known as Reconnecting Communities Pilot (RCP) and it is part of the Department of Transportation’s (DOT) “Equity Strategy Goal to reduce inequities” across the nation’s transportation systems and the communities they effect. Fox News According to documents obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request and provided to Fox News Digital, DCPS has hosted a number of affinity groups for school staff at least once a month, including those for employees who identify as Asian American Pacific Islander, Black/African American, Hispanic/Latinx, Indigenous/Native American, LGBTQIA+, multi-racial, or White. Judicial Watch A year after Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Xavier Becerra denied in a congressional hearing the Biden administration’s plan to open a North Carolina facility for illegal immigrant minors, it is happening. The federal government is leasing a vacant international boarding school, American Hebrew Academy, in Greensboro for five years to accommodate the influx of migrants, which are classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) by the government though most are adolescents and young adults. | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

**I truly understand the issues our communities are facing right now, and I need your help to continue fighting for you.**

So Peter, I’m asking you to chip in $1 — I know it doesn’t seem like much. _But when 100 or 1,000 grassroots donors step up and chip in just $1, it really adds up!_

body:
| |

| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4627f1682844e8da9d28b5ef3fc63a3&_e=N2BjuJQaVQoSeDYnzGF4bQFiC3lr8PmyhA_ho3e4iD9i9eAhWn0Gwk1fW3jOjTunyj3FDniiMYpIHA93HHC36ZNsSuBS88pRadYwTZFy7_detwOO7icJCKlCqBshh-B5TEhJwnICPkk_YeR27J09FO0-GBAVCLhv4RWETbr_R7OGBwOTNjeMay3iKChYFW7Bk7CTvTh1zyPbXbDbqvCRzW0LfTZ6POTm880IijP-FM3G9qWg1mjLdXL1iFOh2Heo_6BdeGaESo2V8q1O5jcOttAycOd9mkp3LxrYufbkvc3aNR2bZfT3QE-95_7sL0fXSxS9I8cRaDkisMCikBX6-sHembSfYUTanEe76YCzwfUtjd0GUFGmSTBFPZCqcKeQ)

I'm devastated Friend. Pelosi has mobilized millions to stop me.

My name is Ryan Zinke, I am a former Commander at SEAL Team 6, a member of Trump's Cabinet, and I'm on a mission to Drain the Swamp, and restore Trump's vision to Make America Great Again.

Pelosi and her peons know that I'm a threat. That's why they're trying to stop me before I make it to Congress.

---
| | [HELP ME DRAIN THE SWAMP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4627f1682844e8da9d28b5ef3fc63a3&_e=N2BjuJQaVQoSeDYnzGF4bQFiC3lr8PmyhA_ho3e4iD9i9eAhWn0Gwk1fW3jOjTunyj3FDniiMYpIHA93HHC36ZNsSuBS88pRadYwTZFy7_detwOO7icJCKlCqBshh-B5TEhJwnICPkk_YeR27J09FO0-GBAVCLhv4RWETbr_R7M04_4CADn4nds1o1cRXESD65SgnHHxAqFlVyfGANefn5KuAxSd823chMCVj5WcDNeJ4mcaXKusf1ARhho4QwE2PgGbdPQt3wSun5Lg3T5HZ0WUErQrYEKxiWXaGQy8_B9ylujl66SIr5slVGIFGVaA4RbXoyf6ryW_917BxsnBOprs-g0mC4uL0Uu6mjK11-URgFJRn-GgtJmCbNDyDHZY)
---
The SEALs made me tough.Tougher than almost any other candidate running for Congress. If Pelosi can bury me with her cash onslaught, she can take out anyone.

It is not easy for me to ask for help. It is not easy for me to plead with strangers for money. But this mission is too important.

Democratic leadership is failing Americans across the country. We must restore Trump's agenda and start serving real Americans again.

That's why I'm begging you for support. If every person reading this message right now chips in just $5, we break a fundraising record and my campaign has what it needs to beat Pelosi's flood of cash and win.

---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b4627f1682844e8da9d28b5ef3fc63a3&_e=N2BjuJQaVQoSeDYnzGF4bQFiC3lr8PmyhA_ho3e4iD9i9eAhWn0Gwk1fW3jOjTunyj3FDniiMYpIHA93HHC36ZNsSuBS88pRadYwTZFy7_detwOO7icJCKlCqBshh-B5TEhJwnICPkk_YeR27J09FO0-GBAVCLhv4RWETbr_R7OOzT0zb6Mju62hH1KI435WiHu70WfSHCsl1dqjSHzV4zs9LXZ_Dg06xVXtnx6o3K5SHmiRiBvYIF500OgZhHnTtdGzj090Y9AfFWlMGjclJQnM4IsEcyfbQw5_ac1zys8_VqEnujhqmlezer3CHfcqgSk_ggXOX-8HPjr0IPcEXtrGZhU1o850MlAEBxMRe6jXHHmiOKuG9f0p0f--d51M)

Thank you for your time,
Ryan Zinke,
Former Commander at SEAL Team 6
Congressional Candidate
