name: Team Benson
subject: Michiganders are enthusiastic and engaged about voting
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Democracy thrives when voters are enthusiastic and able to participate in elections. The good news,friend, is that with less than a month to go until polls close in Michigan’s August Primary, Michiganders are taking advantage of their constitutional right to vote by absentee ballot - a right they didn’t have across the board four years ago.

Local clerks have been hard at work processing these requests, issuing over 300,000 more absentee ballots than in 2018.
It’s always great to see Michiganders enthusiastic about participating in our democracy, but we want to know, friend. What’s your plan to vote this fall? What questions do you have about the election process? What do you think voters need to know heading into November?

Take our newest survey today and let us know what you think about the process. We hope you’re as fired up as we are! Take the survey>> https://secure.ngpvan.com/Eq7VtH0blEaDM78loFLtLA2]

Thanks for making your voice heard, friend!
-Team Benson
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

clean_body: Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. | Peter, There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news. We're down. Peter, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race. Let's show Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden that we're in this fight. We are not going to back down. Peter, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary. We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air. That's why I am emailing today. I'm counting on you to help us catch up before it's too late, Peter. Thanks for standing with me, Herschel Walker P.S. The new polling average in our race shows Senator Warnock is now winning by 1.6%. We can catch up quickly, but we've got to get on the air with our ads ASAP. Thanks! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team NDRC
subject: Most Americans support abortion rights. But that won’t be enough to stop abortion bans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
Gerrymandering gives Republicans power to pass deeply unpopular laws.
|
---

---
Team, **despite the fact that most voters in most states support reproductive freedom,** more than half of all states have either _already banned_ abortion or are poised to _severely limit_ abortion access: | "[A] majority of the public in about 40 states supports legal abortion rights. ... [But] analysis of polling data suggests that **more Americans will live under an abortion policy that is out of step with their preferences, with consequences for democratic representation**.”
_– The Washington Post_
---
You might be wondering how lawmakers in so many states can get away with passing draconian laws most of their constituents don’t want. **Unfortunately, the answer is simple: Gerrymandering.**

**At the NDRC, we’re working to return power to voters by fighting for fair maps and electing leaders who will defend democracy. Will you pitch in now to support our work to end GOP gerrymandering?**

Because of gerrymandering, Republicans in swing states have been able to win a _majority_ of state legislative seats while earning only a _minority_ of votes. This gives the GOP power to pass far-right legislation while shielding them from consequences at the ballot box.

**That’s why the NDRC is fighting back to defend our democracy.** We’ve targeted races in 17 states across the country that will have an impact on the future of fair maps. If we can win these races, we can achieve a future where a majority of voters once again have the power to shape policy in their states – including policy on abortion rights.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: 9 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
❗Urgent❗ | | | Hi there, Voting starts in just 9 days. Seniors tend to vote as soon as they get their ballots, so it’s critical that we reach them NOW. We need to let them know that, unlike my corporate opponent, I will never flip-flop on Social Security. I will never support Medicare privatization. [**Can you donate $5 now to help me pay for texting and calling Seniors? Every text we send costs $0.022 (2.2 cents), so your $5 donation will buy us 227 texts to voters. That's 227 voters who will hear about this campaign, thanks to YOU.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47488628/354510798/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzM5MjBhNS05NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYfqB-1ueDLo6k4pCcVgUHOUtam5rO0reR8yPLLQPXo=) My opponent is sitting on millions of dollars in corporate cash, including from DC lobbyists who want him to protect corporations and the status quo. He’s using that money to claim he’s fighting for Seniors even though he wants to privatize their Medicare. I need to counteract his spending blitz with my own message to voters: the real story. I am the only Democrat in this race who has never flip-flopped on Social Security, who opposes Medicare privatization, and who supports Medicare for All. We need to raise $10,000 for our Textbanking Fund ASAP. [**Can you donate $5 to our Textbanking Fund, so we can text more voters before voting starts in just 9 days?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47488629/354510799/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzM5MjBhNS05NWZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYfqB-1ueDLo6k4pCcVgUHOUtam5rO0reR8yPLLQPXo=) It will only take you one minute to donate. name: Dalila Epperson
subject: The Cali Fix For Our Republican Party
body:
Want To Fix Our Republican Party? Central Committees! There is one in each county. They consist of representatives (YOU!) for each Superviso
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=rkOScoLFklwheXoMfY-8oEKqS1BBEmhxSYYxkqWpuG4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzU4TzdLbW91RD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Your Central Committee:The Key To Cali's Republican Party Woes From Dalila Eppersonemail me: Sunflowers67@pm.meif you have more questions
---
| |
---
| | Want To Fix Our Republican Party? Central Committees! There is one in each county. They consist of representatives (YOU!) for each Supervisor district. Click link in blue lettering to find your Supervisor and your district number here: [FIND MY SUPERVISOR](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=-a51z_ThbTqIwXfefayTn_HaZzu5QEdKzdOLoK5jsBM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXJjZ2lzLmNvbS9hcHBzL0luZm9ybWF0aW9uTG9va3VwL2luZGV4Lmh0bWw_YXBwaWQ9YjE5YzQzMmYyZGJhNGI3MDhjMGZlMDM0NDgwNzMwOWMiLCJyIjoiZTA3N2MzMDQtOTU2OC00N2VmLWIwNzYtMTllM2JlOTU0ZmY0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjEzNWZkNDYtOTkyYS00MjhiLWE5YzAtMmYwNGQ5ODA1NWNlIn0) That is the district number you'll represent. Now- Do you qualify to be on a Republican Central Committee? Are you a Republican? Yes? That's the only qualification you need. All Republican Central Committees are open to all Republicans. Now what? GO to the next Central Committee meeting in your county. They are typically once monthly and also in the evenings after work. Not a big ask. Especially because after you get voted in, you will have a voice in your local party and you will be voting on issues to effect real change like endorsements and action subcommittees for your community! We need to continue to wake up the sleeping Republicans and the Democrats. Have you heard that over 1 million have re-registered as Republicans?? This is an exciting time to get in on the ground floor, plus, THERE ARE OPENINGS NOW! How do I find out where and when for the meeting? Contact them! For July I've listed out the info to get you started. For the location of each meeting you must contact them directly and that info is on their website as well. If you cannot find their location, contact me: sunflowers67@pm.me Below: Central Committee meetings including their website links in blue lettering. Simply call or email them and let them know you're interested in knowing more about your Republican Central Committee and how you can help.
County of Monterey: [Website Info](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=r5RoslqwBxr9vLvY5MZcbSLe3e-5qZtStPXSSPs3dZ8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9udGVyZXlyZXB1YmxpY2Fucy5vcmcvIiwiciI6ImUwNzdjMzA0LTk1NjgtNDdlZi1iMDc2LTE5ZTNiZTk1NGZmNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9) (next meeting July 18 at 6pm)Scroll to the bottom of the website page for the email and phone number for location or contact me if you cannot find it, sunflowers67@pm.me County of Santa Cruz: [Website Info](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=rClYkeYaHfJr9pWGpZfjgW5zDPqWM-o1pc07bpibu1g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zYW50YWNydXpyZXB1YmxpY2Fucy5jb20vY2VudHJhbC1jb21taXR0ZWUvIiwiciI6ImUwNzdjMzA0LTk1NjgtNDdlZi1iMDc2LTE5ZTNiZTk1NGZmNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9) (next meeting July 27 at 7pm) Call for location or contact me if you cannot find it, sunflowers67@pm.me Atascadero/San Luis Obispo: [Central Committee Meeting in Atascadero](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=-OqkJXvSL4gwwXfChVMlqCKgExFLL0GVbNPqbd4aBuY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ycHNsb2Mub3JnLyIsInIiOiJlMDc3YzMwNC05NTY4LTQ3ZWYtYjA3Ni0xOWUzYmU5NTRmZjQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ) (next meeting July 20, 6pm) Scroll to the bottom for all info plus location or contact me if you cannot find it, sunflowers67@pm.me Santa Clara/Silicon Valley: [Central Committee Link](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=jGIQlVKDzN2PKyhaxe4DIZeWVtTwUutV_xaQjPl5IEs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3Znb3AuY29tL2NlbnRyYWwtY29tbWl0dGVlLyIsInIiOiJlMDc3YzMwNC05NTY4LTQ3ZWYtYjA3Ni0xOWUzYmU5NTRmZjQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ) and email: secretary@svgop.com for location, (next meeting July 13 at 7pm), or contact me if you cannot find it: sunflowers67@pm.me I truly missed the boat on this aspect of our Republican Party, fellow Patriots. So I knew I had to give you all the info as well just in case you are in the same boat. FOOD FOR THOUGHT: PRESIDENT TRUMP chose not to leave the Republican Party after the 2020 "election"- He could have created a new party! He did not and in fact is sticking it out to Fix it. And so must we- boots on the ground once again! But we grassroots and mama bears are used to this... California will be the hardest to fix. So lets get to work. You'll see me at the Monterey Republican Central Committee meetings. I hope to see you there as well. Because you know what? It's not a Red Wave coming... It's a RED WHITE & BLUE WAVE = WE THE PEOPLE WAVE COMING THEIR WAY. Communists, Socialists, Marxists, Progressive Dems: we're coming for ya! Dalila
---
| | [**Dalila's Platform** ](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/58O7KmouD/c?w=R5FWY3y_VEDseBqICJsZp9NBMmT3H3_XKhOyOxaPOnw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFsaWxhZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL3BsYXRmb3JtIiwiciI6ImFjOTg4ZDFiLTY5Y2ItNDQzZS1hODA4LTM4YmYyNWY0NWQwYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)

|
---

subject: Nate Silver’s HORRIBLE prediction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=3604%2E878179%2ErDVeE-)._
---
**Look, this expert midterm prediction has us _distraught:_** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote/?source=VPP_20220706_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=3604%2E878179%2ErDVeE-) The only way to stop the GOP from taking over the House and the Senate is to FLOOD the polls with Democrats in November.

So we're asking every Democrat reading this email to pledge to vote in November and stave off the Republican attempt to takeover Congress. [Please, add your signature now to take the pledge »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote/?source=VPP_20220706_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=3604%2E878179%2ErDVeE-) | [SIGN NOW: I PLEDGE TO VOTE IN NOVEMBER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote/?source=VPP_20220706_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=3604%2E878179%2ErDVeE-)
---
Listen, losing the House AND the Senate would be a nightmare scenario.

Just last week, House Republicans revealed a plan to pass a nationwide abortion ban if they take back the House in November.

So we cannot allow Republicans to take over the House or the Senate!
[Please, we need every good Democrat with us today and on November 8th at the polls. Add you name now and pledge to vote »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pledge-to-vote/?source=VPP_20220706_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=3604%2E878179%2ErDVeE-)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Here’s what you can do right now, Derek:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

I want to tell you a story about me and explain why [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220706_B2_story_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb ]I’m asking you to
power our work by making a contribution to our campaign for Georgia.

In high school, I was my school’s valedictorian — and in Georgia, that
meant being invited to a reception at the Governor’s Mansion.

My family didn’t have a car, so that morning, my parents and I took the
bus from DeKalb to Buckhead. We arrived at the Governor’s mansion and
walked up the side of the driveway, next to the cars carrying
valedictorians from across the state.

But when we reached the guard gate, a guard stepped out, looked at us and
said, “You don’t belong here. This is a private event.”

He took one look at us walking up from the bus and assumed I couldn’t
possibly be one of the valedictorians. My parents corrected him — with
some effort — and we were eventually allowed inside. But I don’t remember
meeting the governor that day. What I remember is a man standing in front
of the most powerful place in Georgia, telling me I didn’t belong.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220706_B2_story_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb ]Now, I’m running for Governor to represent all Georgians from that same
powerful place. Will you make a donation now to power our movement for One
Georgia?

For far too long, too many Georgians have felt like they don't belong and
they’ve been ignored by those in power. Recent decisions by the U.S.
Supreme Court — on issues from voting rights to abortion to climate change
— will make the governor’s job even more important.

Together, we can make sure every Georgian, no matter who they are or where
they live, has the opportunity to thrive.

But first, we face a hard fight in this campaign. We know that Brian Kemp
is willing to spend "whatever it takes" to win and that this race won’t be
easy. Like Trump, he gets free media just for opening his mouth,
regardless of what he has to say.

It is imperative that we stay strong with the resources we’ll need to
compete. So I’m asking you to do something right now:

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220706_B2_story_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb ]Can you make a donation now to prove we’re ready for this fight?

Let’s open that gate.

Stacey

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220706_B2_story_S1_T1_SYA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=876%2E1862389%2Edag2gb

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: I’m asking for your help in Oregon.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I’m running for Congress in one of the most competitive seats in the entire country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484826/354469963/-2022851510?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjhiZDZmYS03NmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvzDjzKO02-nwgOuQAqbZY_C9NTXukwnxndUzgY3E8A=)
---
Friend, I’m running for Congress in one of the most competitive seats in the entire country. **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign. But if you don’t have time to read this email right now, can you please chip in before you click away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484827/354469964/-2022851510?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjhiZDZmYS03NmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvzDjzKO02-nwgOuQAqbZY_C9NTXukwnxndUzgY3E8A=)** My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family. While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree. My daughter was born 17 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature. As a legislator, I’ve fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined. With that same level of determination, I’m running for Congress. I’m ready to fight for families just like mine in Congress, but I need your help. **[That’s why I’m asking: Will you please chip in $10 or whatever you can to my campaign? I’m counting on grassroots support from folks like you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484828/354469965/-2022851510?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjhiZDZmYS03NmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvzDjzKO02-nwgOuQAqbZY_C9NTXukwnxndUzgY3E8A=)** | _[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47484830/354469967/-2022851510?refcode=em_fr_2022.07.06_b1_AS_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjhiZDZmYS03NmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvzDjzKO02-nwgOuQAqbZY_C9NTXukwnxndUzgY3E8A=)_

clean_body: I’m running for Congress in one of the most competitive seats in the entire country. = Friend, I’m running for Congress in one of the most competitive seats in the entire country. = My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family. While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree. My daughter was born 17 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature. As a legislator, I’ve fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined. With that same level of determination, I’m running for Congress. I’m ready to fight for families just like mine in Congress, but I need your help. = | = When everyone chips in, even just a little, it all adds up. I can tell you from firsthand experience that when folks give what they can, it has a = on our campaign. I’m asking you to step up and join us today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Andrea Salinas = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

body:
Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. |

Peter,

There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news.

**We're down.**
Peter, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9413596a3f27417f821473198598b76e&_e=XmN6z7hyT5YZs8_ltm2IIpRxBfqawMEFCpdJATCDonHtfh8aUFfs8qcZd9OPW_0w9s4EQhC2R5HagtS7NcJbNjA6WpinKo4TX3RklfvnLvc_ZipE13OiaJ4u4Fw73WCxqeMZ4fhrIbQZ3ZvLjiNWGIt86lJPpW0zrzrsqJlrqRpnp7Duw0gWAmrBm-gL91jvrAuAzlSAxzzNxzTDjd9NuRMewX2h-ke2NkheMgqfoI4Tctrx36wI2CSenCfmAJw3NSUMMBmL2_2EVnMCHvupMskGLBxQvFjjlRpsRtwfQTpKIWJW6NUs7PyGklfjABJ_wOmy37av59v8teI9Qdmow0qzQalonXPXxzv78fv1jdJKXvn3vNLBf28RSNRnVpVab05nPTSt5OmqvFppsj7evLI3JYY91oilLGdE_bJ345g7EOg4REkSy52Tq3iOMByoV0mSNZh0BDekYsOU0QQUdHW2kxnge-QZwBe8fhsQnNNaiwjr8BudF7FTf02h4KvQ)
Let's show Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden that we're in this fight. We are not going to back down.

Peter, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. _**That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary.**_

We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air.

That's why I am emailing today. **[Can you chip in $5, $10, $25, or even $34 in the next hour?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9413596a3f27417f821473198598b76e&_e=XmN6z7hyT5YZs8_ltm2IIpRxBfqawMEFCpdJATCDonHtfh8aUFfs8qcZd9OPW_0w9s4EQhC2R5HagtS7NcJbNjA6WpinKo4TX3RklfvnLvc_ZipE13OiaJ4u4Fw73WCxqeMZ4fhrIbQZ3ZvLjiNWGIt86lJPpW0zrzrsqJlrqRpnp7Duw0gWAmrBm-gL91jvrAuAzlSAxzzNxzTDjd9NuRMewX2h-ke2NkheMgqfoI4Tctrx36wI2CSenCfmAJw3NSUMMBmL2_2EVnMCHvupMskGLBxQvFjjlRpsRtwfQTo_fnB3aQODfocdD9kSO96W_h_al3YJzRdfyMjMS0ASSRP8PDQ5wGxh6PXBmfj30IlqcKXIG4fXILJQjO_GKCU6PMqCDfSQUrBDOcli8Y0bZT5cqPW8xNoN6_3wl6ypMuvA8FAxMSEU1IQ3OyyGQQIdI5WEkNDGq0Q9F0iirmnxaVxmp7fs6OB52zgwiupTQ7ChwmSIFDfwoANx_HQTJIsr)**

I'm counting on you to help us catch up before it's too late, Peter.

Thanks for standing with me,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9413596a3f27417f821473198598b76e&_e=XmN6z7hyT5YZs8_ltm2IIpRxBfqawMEFCpdJATCDonHtfh8aUFfs8qcZd9OPW_0w9s4EQhC2R5HagtS7NcJbNjA6WpinKo4TX3RklfvnLvc_ZipE13OiaJ4u4Fw73WCxqeMZ4fhrIbQZ3ZvLjiNWGIt86lJPpW0zrzrsqJlrqRpnp7Duw0gWAmrBm-gL91jvrAuAzlSAxzzNxzTDjd9NuRMewX2h-ke2NkheMgqfoI4Tctrx36wI2CSenCfmAJw3NSUMMBmL2_2EVnMCHvupMskGLBxQvFjjlRpsRtwfQTrPEeFmeU1HPyw78bhlIkd0r9tvOps38OMR8QmzREOFSiEh_FUxI1rSfmfN9yRVuSP5x4r9vuZarK-J23sBrmtFLshidXv5X6Qg9Y_GAXZYmCE-qxLEigtco9W1E2TWB9AlkZ-ai7IUo4z5Rjy1lZWg41mNM53A6VUyJkZr6Osg8rfHRkQThQQ3se6QNr7fKm5sG3PHmPSMsFrpLfS-QoTm)

Herschel Walker

clean_body: Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. | Peter, There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news. We're down. Peter, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race. Let's show Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden that we're in this fight. We are not going to back down. Peter, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary. We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air. That's why I am emailing today. I'm counting on you to help us catch up before it's too late, Peter. Thanks for standing with me, Herschel Walker P.S. The new polling average in our race shows Senator Warnock is now winning by 1.6%. We can catch up quickly, but we've got to get on the air with our ads ASAP. Thanks! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: Friend, I have something extra special I want to send you. While I was looking through some photos the other day, I was thinking about how grateful I am to have my LOYAL, AMERICA FIRST Patriots like YOU. There is one photo, in particular, that is my absolute favorite. Right when I saw it, I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it. But, I didn't want to send you JUST any photograph of me - I wanted to make it special. I asked my team to make a list of my GREATEST supporters so I could send them a signed photo with their very own personalized message from yours truly. Of course, YOU were at the VERY TOP of that list, Friend. I can only sign and personalize a limited number of photos. You need to act NOW if you want it. ********** Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC. Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 Thank you for joining Team Trump. Thanks to your generous support, we'll win BACK our Republican Majority in the House AND the Senate. To stay up-to-date on our latest efforts, President Trump needs you to sign up to become an TEXT TRUMP to 88022 to start receiving text messages from President Trump. We are emailing you at dpwillis67@gmail.com to update you on critical information regarding President Trump's efforts to SAVE AMERICA. President Trump is calling on YOU to take the next step and activate your . When you do, we'll send you your own PERSONALIZED Gold Card. You can activate your membership by following this link. Please follow this if you would like to opt out of essential campaign updates. If you would like to give feedback to the President, **. Thank you again for your unwavering support.

Team,

Wealth inequality is tearing American society apart.

While most of us struggle -- living paycheck to paycheck while the prices for everyday essentials surge out of control -- elite billionaires like Jeff Bezos, Howard Schultz, and Elon Musk use their billions to crush unions and manipulate our political system to their advantage.

That's why Our Revolution has spent years organizing to strengthen labor -- partnering with budding Starbucks and Amazon union movements.

The Starbucks union just won a big victory, but the company is already threatening workers with the loss of reproductive health benefits if they unionize. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us stand up to American oligarchs and secure decent living conditions for workers? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AOC: "The party needs to change"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, when the
Democratic Party tells folks to vote, it's missing a big part of the
story. AOC is on point here:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110995?refcode=em20220706-24173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]Tweet from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez that reads: FYI: When they tell you
to “vote harder” that should also apply to primary elections, too. The
party needs to change and that’s not going to happen on its own.

We can’t just vote our way out of a broken status quo in November. Because
solving the crises of our day will require organizing, fighting, and
electing BETTER Democrats — not just the same old Democrats.

Nancy Pelosi supported anti-choice Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary
against pro-choice progressive Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros. And in
the face of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the Democratic
establishment did nothing but tell us to vote. We do vote, but we can’t
keep voting for corporate-backed incumbents unwilling to fight for our
rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110995?refcode=em20220706-24173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]Peter, we
need your support to elect a new class of leaders, re-elect the Squad, and
transform the Democratic Party. Are you with us? Make a $3
contribution right now to support our work to upend the political status
quo in this country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110995?refcode=em20220706-24173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]Contribute $3

It wasn’t just Jessica’s race against Cuellar that showed which side the
Democratic establishment is really on. Pelosi and Pres. Biden endorsed
corporate Democrat Danny Davis against Justice Democrat Kina Collins, a
young Black gun violence prevention organizer from Chicago.

How can the Democratic establishment expect us to fight for a party that
tries to stop young progressive women of color from representing the
people and not corporate donors in Congress?

Corporate Democrats will throw millions against us, they’ll throw
high-powered endorsements against us...they’ll do whatever they can to stop
us — even if that means using resources to stop progressive change instead
of focusing those critical resources to stop Republicans from taking the
majority in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110995?refcode=em20220706-24173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]If we want to win more primary challenges and protect the Squad while
we’re up against millions in corporate Super PAC spending and endorsements
from Nancy Pelosi, we need our grassroots supporters to step up. Can you
donate $3 today to help us take on the political
establishment and elect progressive fighters to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110995?refcode=em20220706-24173&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]Contribute

We’ve seen what can happen when we get outspent by corporate Super PACs
with access to unlimited funds. Now, we need to make sure we’re prepared
to protect the Squad in their primaries and build up our fundraising for
the future.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220706-24173-footer&t=1028&refcode2=24173_1203867_CMgZsY&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=24173%2E1203867%2ECMgZsY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: WV v. EPA
body:
| | | | June 30th was a big day for America.
---
[](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMeZuCkxgrkyL2idx15TiUv8g-3D-3DRxqb_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6akUyoDoInlDFJ4jXfsT8K3MTNrveCivE9h8U9j7kGj7ogTIasCYsxD2s9PXy3XJtxgKXKO-2B93VlDhq-2FJ0M0D-2Fq1yoOKh6SZfElmbyBsWU6CBlVUq-2BPit2tfp6OQ5roWIPFZEekioUuhSpvc-2FdDxylygl23HCKXo0oK0SQBLKDThxyHoyahzDnfSXkt94TXQoLDX7txUvWiKHSfVtzhvMFEqTmXHVSN-2FGFWlppJSdiYPu7cPnprforZd1Vru-2BhcRywjpUryb2lHk3XTZlScaYEqHaoDO96zNqs9wQARhx8m1qiVO4Bv4bS5G2F-2FIIyraGC3dLDAjS2cAPSmotnPOWQ6MOnBBzHfBl1sG0n-2FNKBWstpCilZvZ8BJpJKphk6DPBw5AeI-2BXbv8nn5b787Ks8tdSizeKIStFKLXri5tbsu55uGJxt4xJbUYIBOOSgWV7s12gYm9cLqQIf76juOzNTOoLCIqeePSJ9aRUeU-2FVdqW8VUzDJE38k5qbgRi5dTQVtmH8LnVS04wLFH6V3Nkj71S9Kt43CDuJ2B5-2FJ6NA0CEXnUWJ7i8pIrW92UKHaP2EAXNiFp0WRo6mGN-2BPbrxk3ZOJzkUu33KRNvU2wraZ63O0-2FqtN-2Bh1OgF4vGRy1j0DGh-2FeTsR9rlIgWe9XR0l3201zS0ZMLhIQJOPxSrUxbgFqfvBM509ddWhDbq9yiUp4KKXieR0HxPGBq7ICGt2agv4HwnxgQxmqAdOiTTQcnFJQ8Xat7716o99bLsn98pSfLpIOMJzvHG3bkTWxzoB3moPtOSOHG0xD5ynKeP8tKqounH7XVcU4WTZ7l52wWnWPi-2FhOWiUrOml2Rew1qlRDTowg-3D-3D)
---
Dear Peter,

June 30th was a big day for America. We won _West Virginia v. EPA,_ the biggest separation of powers case this decade in a 6-3 decision.
For too long, unelected bureaucrats have engaged in massive federal overreach by seizing power only intended to be used by Congress. Our win sends a loud and clear message: no more!
The Supreme Court agreed that federal agencies cannot make major decisions on matters of vast economic and political importance without clear delegation from Congress.

clean_body: | | | | June 30th was a big day for America. Dear Peter, June 30th was a big day for America. We won West Virginia v. EPA, the biggest separation of powers case this decade in a 6-3 decision. For too long, unelected bureaucrats have engaged in massive federal overreach by seizing power only intended to be used by Congress. Our win sends a loud and clear message: no more! The Supreme Court agreed that federal agencies cannot make major decisions on matters of vast economic and political importance without clear delegation from Congress. In addition to stopping the deep state, this will help limit Biden’s efforts to unilaterally decarbonize our country through regulatory fiat. With this victory, Bloomberg and Soros are going to aggressively come after me. That’s why I need your help! | | | | | | Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 \- =

Team -- A major poll by AARP shows that Americans almost **_universally_** support Social Security!

**But despite its widespread popularity, key Republican senators have hatched a plan to GUT Social Security behind closed doors.**

Millions of Americans depend on the Social Security benefits **_they earned_** through decades of hard work -- so we've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to confirm the AARP’s numbers. **We still need 12 responses from 18326 -- tell us where you stand before the poll expires at MIDNIGHT:**

Friend,

No party, no people, and no nation can defend and perpetuate a Constitutional Republic if they accept a leader who has gone to war with the rule of law, with the democratic process, with the peaceful transition of power, **or with the Constitution itself.**

Republicans cannot both be loyal to Donald Trump and loyal to the Constitution. We must choose.

And as we think about this choice, and as I think about how I come to this choice, the first thing that I think about is that I come to this choice as a mother, committed to ensuring that my children and their children can continue to live in an America where the peaceful transfer of power is guaranteed. We must ensure that we live in a nation that is governed by law and not by men.

I am fighting for the compassion and the love of country that unites us. It is something that is worth fighting for. And it is something that I need your help to preserve.

As I move towards my re-election primary in August, I need your help. **[You can join the fight by donating below:](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=8efb9a99a1a845e6a7b78bde73cc0637&_e=vx3NKjb1XkrJhk6r2oOuHMp00GZ05sI_aSpsfLR3FxELT4NVE8IF8imUN3_LL7kbQg8lHTkLO6kB_0XzL_TWti0qAu54JwVBv1Ht9yVHnqUuCbaIrA6zUAG7W2aPEvlMxJIKpqHPbTnU4SD8sbe8OQRVmZJ4grhNUbUjsEycaD6gZP4mRCkuFse5VpP2sHH4P4VcHqVpVE1Ftfuw7v8bj16cSwlwOg1Md2ACp-EjrXb-3wlzW5tMcgFGcWfR4X_IPzrEqn-l3ELEbyGn91stQNpq4aRbBo67LlmDWnoiDyzRcNq4LXJ75Ed0xLo-b2IDLl6Sr29VdKzCOalt_w7QvvPv1C4eXu3zin6DQKiSrojfeW6Rkbotd_0snl8ipDbGdgYKJlfB7uSMbZvHWVt1_X0TELLl9cPFo4kdJJAw_9wkaLxl1oAY8LFRSDF2Lg3HpP3-phW3o9zYu4DWSacBT1QYpEFNafVivRjyjdQTgR_pBzhoinIS7me0Wq2_moXvAxykg7iGHP4Rr0x4-7ydSZrI6de3-CDcEhHtLB17Wao%3D)**

name: Wesley Britt, Team Britt
subject: A HUGE win for religious freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
It’s Wesley, I need your opinion on this | | | [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2a92b92f925441728c37ea44860e2dc8&_e=vEa-3m9ZlTIORqiVxmxFjNMCecmgEGql_q1w1UIZn-Lbj7mSrqxJPqoJqY6FZozZ_zWnKFweCIanzXzkeSVTLhVH6oC2irynzcPhnHQx5gpmaSEpzAUss0XFcIpQ4Qtf9oK2ovchoUUxXfV8RE_xYW0h6iBsbZR6Ku9oBo31Z6azSjIx8oCoh0JmLi_PUtgE_emSb9cqhfJNzSVJA4oLYm3gTGSPN3H6TqJ4jAD4n5L7JNO40JuewxlthOoatPT9dig8NQlL3YdrkH-JLYIdznXrq0xXvQ30_wS0jiSyMBaK1ACnx8eX5bdyZfSPD_eGwC3F1cgSM9dcTzp55irVnyHF-SelcLxaWk_zXykEMesCbIIt92GCpRfCBHRu-m9oZ1QluP6j8cd5UHE8DDRmBSWwitPSTW1X5s5TSR_USjwE-wb5vBzAuzCbZEtQvFFdtTSWfD6zcFrSwQxO_m1avcjjw5k9sEKWr3iBIFOXc4Obx-Hvqb3GemvHoFlkiCCh)
---
| | Peter, **The Supreme Court of the United States handed down another landmark decision recently defending the First Amendment and our religious liberties**. _SCOTUS declared that government entities, including public schools, should not and cannot erase individuals’ personal rights under the Free Exercise Clause to pray on an athletic field or in a public space._**__** This is a significant ruling for religious liberty and a crucial stand for an inalienable Constitutional right. [**As a former NFL player and a Christian, I believe in the right to have religious freedom on and off the field**.](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2a92b92f925441728c37ea44860e2dc8&_e=vEa-3m9ZlTIORqiVxmxFjNMCecmgEGql_q1w1UIZn-Lbj7mSrqxJPqoJqY6FZozZ_zWnKFweCIanzXzkeSVTLhVH6oC2irynzcPhnHQx5gpmaSEpzAUss0XFcIpQ4Qtf9oK2ovchoUUxXfV8RE_xYW0h6iBsbZR6Ku9oBo31Z6azSjIx8oCoh0JmLi_PUtgE_emSb9cqhfJNzSVJA4oLYm3gTGSPN3H6TqJ4jAD4n5L7JNO40JuewxlthOoatPT9dig8NQlL3YdrkH-JLYIdznXrq0xXvQ30_wS0jiSyMBb_0UCSpcW1bFjFrUl1TLc-1cG3FhJvxj38ydviNaTJnOtvATprmeL9FcDzRET94sS3_0CVZghrfnzxcN0XnaqrvlgaKIYPPcJdmh-o-HTwRnIt2y-2GUe1Apy40O99y4F0snkx84XDmFpb-qqbQ2LYIVIouFEDVx48oH5KH8NPI3vR1hKAnOVfGOVjn-U9toRX1nujjQe-Sw4viRfyy8lO) It was significant to me to be able to pray before I played AND give God the glory afterwards, regardless of the game’s outcome. Being able to pray gave me peace and clarity to focus on the task before me. I’m incredibly grateful that others now have the renewed protection of the Constitution to do so as well without fear of losing their job.
You know where I stand, but we want to know what you think, Peter. What are your thoughts on this issue? Take a quick survey [_**and let us know your thoughts >>>**._](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2a92b92f925441728c37ea44860e2dc8&_e=vEa-3m9ZlTIORqiVxmxFjNMCecmgEGql_q1w1UIZn-Lbj7mSrqxJPqoJqY6FZozZ_zWnKFweCIanzXzkeSVTLhVH6oC2irynzcPhnHQx5gpmaSEpzAUss0XFcIpQ4Qtf9oK2ovchoUUxXfV8RE_xYW0h6iBsbZR6Ku9oBo31Z6azSjIx8oCoh0JmLi_PUtgE_emSb9cqhfJNzSVJA4oLYm3gTGSPN3H6TqJ4jAD4n5L7JNO40JuewxlthOoatPT9dig8NQlL3YdrkH-JLYIdznXrq0xXvQ30_wS0jiSyMBYfGbJyxPiDkjCu0-iwzRA21ppKVg6hvRYiGQn0Oh82pt4k4Sbp8_Sa6zG_wHVHLch5VX2I19LW6tpD5z0Cfsul5vEAYjnNT4s_7koUb3_wBbw-FMwot2HlcdQihld2iLgM6fY3JIWKNfLWu7BkGS39or0oqvV-ZTSlSmmUC-Y113WRcawi9xRx6wTdSy1U0esuTSJfAmaGfq55_c8THrsz)
---
[**Yes, I agree with the SCOTUS on this ruling**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2a92b92f925441728c37ea44860e2dc8&_e=vEa-3m9ZlTIORqiVxmxFjNMCecmgEGql_q1w1UIZn-Lbj7mSrqxJPqoJqY6FZozZ_zWnKFweCIanzXzkeSVTLhVH6oC2irynzcPhnHQx5gpmaSEpzAUss0XFcIpQ4Qtf9oK2ovchoUUxXfV8RE_xYW0h6iBsbZR6Ku9oBo31Z6azSjIx8oCoh0JmLi_PUtgE_emSb9cqhfJNzSVJA4oLYm3gTGSPN3H6TqJ4jAD4n5L7JNO40JuewxlthOoatPT9dig8NQlL3YdrkH-JLYIdznXrq0xXvQ30_wS0jiSyMBbjJUBF_wQBu-FVcPs569MC8Hmr0nfGHyonqRQqscTEwe9LzOH3NUV2mtmicXO8vDG48ktLK0KeTWxy6goRRpVT2QNB2LjOSXCcHYZJDiKYGPd3FGkWi5YKg1TvYfc5rKuBuNA0wSwTPr50PVvDi2CrvF-l0UD3CczRlhIIkd4TE9nT_dlv9DUh6LFJpRJCO4WgD-2y42rNVtpl6XruZAUm)
---
[**No, I think this is an overreach by the Supreme Court**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2a92b92f925441728c37ea44860e2dc8&_e=vEa-3m9ZlTIORqiVxmxFjNMCecmgEGql_q1w1UIZn-Lbj7mSrqxJPqoJqY6FZozZ_zWnKFweCIanzXzkeSVTLhVH6oC2irynzcPhnHQx5gpmaSEpzAUss0XFcIpQ4Qtf9oK2ovchoUUxXfV8RE_xYW0h6iBsbZR6Ku9oBo31Z6azSjIx8oCoh0JmLi_PUtgE_emSb9cqhfJNzSVJA4oLYm3gTGSPN3H6TqJ4jAD4n5L7JNO40JuewxlthOoatPT9dig8NQlL3YdrkH-JLYIdznXrq0xXvQ30_wS0jiSyMBaICZYNa5wKgho4H7X3bp3LFjcLbOHk5COcYeFD-vujklkbhXgMrULi1hTHBzrZ0tGqIXj6se5YQtwaiXdS1OzixaHa0uv8VbvuTgILBv4aYziagu3Tk1qy7EcaYoAUlkZM8V0sHzxqXO22lIVTHOQeTbYiElof1xLwCc06-lK7Pu-PutoXMPu22tI_gFStZehZs39cQnnTS9tWQa-ULsKu)

clean_body: It’s Wesley, I need your opinion on this | | | | | Peter, The Supreme Court of the United States handed down another landmark decision recently defending the First Amendment and our religious liberties. SCOTUS declared that government entities, including public schools, should not and cannot erase individuals’ personal rights under the Free Exercise Clause to pray on an athletic field or in a public space._ This is a significant ruling for religious liberty and a crucial stand for an inalienable Constitutional right. It was significant to me to be able to pray before I played AND give God the glory afterwards, regardless of the game’s outcome. Being able to pray gave me peace and clarity to focus on the task before me. I’m incredibly grateful that others now have the renewed protection of the Constitution to do so as well without fear of losing their job. You know where I stand, but we want to know what you think, Peter. What are your thoughts on this issue? Take a quick survey Thank you, Wesley Britt Team Britt for Alabama | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

subject: The enemy is within
body:
[****](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOsexoUcdpk0y9u4Tf3Qq0VerZ7TrP0hx-nOZrsjbEkeSD3ForqKrVpmEeTdACc1aOXZwjRdzpCRYlzqH9glyAPCIWjt5dPQUmrRurJu197MCMSjaM2XZvOKULO1aa90OcMd294jPwKanpy4UBRxMkhyFQULodOX_Q63BI2Bn5zU4tpzFhyvIjUKf62aOzEXSrELwNijJ5L18C7NAiIKThtA%3D%3D)

Peter,
**Our country is currently facing a great threat.** A new enemy has emerged from the shadows that seeks to destroy and intimidate their way to a transformed state, and country, that you and I would hardly recognize.
This enemy is the radical vigilante woke mob that will steamroll anything and anyone in their way. Their blatant attacks on the American way of life are clear and intensifying: _stifling dissent, public shaming, rampant violence, and a perverted version of history._
A group that will, literally, tear down monuments and buildings but -- perhaps in an even more sinister way -- tear down the American spirit itself. **They go after the family unit, parental rights, traditional moral values, the church, and fact-based education.**
Over the past few years, we've watched horrified as this group has attempted to _**brainwash our children**_ into thinking we live in an evil, racist, irredeemable country.
We listened to them deny science and data to exert political theater all the while _**trampling over personal liberties enshrined in the Constitution.**_
[**> > DONATE NOW TO HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT <<**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOaliG6oFnGyvtc9eTssiKRsmvFl4FBgU671hjqxuKgbGNjDtrcd36AJmtZGRuOu5KKT8AC3pl0c6ZFfj6NCTsjQTy5V1h1WLFC2ip9Vm8GQ9tnztJoG2ucHgKQ7wGC9cOXPos9FXVzT_HOesYHUdVd_TyPWO7jeOF3-CJthfLJObwn4OWfekwSdkQxMT62v0N05Ps7veAg4aO1R0twEeRgg%3D%3D)
We saw them take to the streets for an entire summer like outlaws burning, looting, and destroying everything in sight while being told they were "mostly peaceful" and "passionate."
We watched _**Big Tech moguls in Silicon Valley be the arbiters of truth**_ - deciding who gets to speak and who gets silenced through the digital public square.
We listened to the legacy media muffle legitimately verifiable news stories that didn't align with their preferred narrative, only to watch the truth trickle out months later at a more politically expedient time.
**Well,****Peter****, the time for listening and watching from the sidelines is over.**
[**> >> FIGHT BACK <<<**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOaCZSamIlT9phvdDjUfJN-pGhoL1zb8eqwg5emLtahqZni2wxviIZXgnnHS6mfpq3FLGQoENfSLrN566VjWV8aVmLlLzTE3vzxirHSBK3_A3bFNqqDW7mMdoi7fNQkRtHntAvnIfWuVYxsTn7QXh_m4SVHKIDvhMLbPm8VdJ3V7pufWxDcavL5IkFy-JL76r9ramU4fu1yGjhfQj14dM88Q%3D%3D)
This enemy has taken over media, educational institutions, corporate boards, professional sports, foundations, and professional institutions. They have left no corner of our lives untouched. But all hope is not lost.
**We The People still have a say.** We know the truth, you and I, about America and the country she is and can be. We must fight to defeat these false pretenses and predetermined narratives.
**I am choosing to counter this enemy with faith, with reason, and with freedom. As Governor of the Free State of Florida, I have chosen to lead with a vision that builds America up rather than tears it down.**
Together we can ensure that our children are raised to know they live in the greatest state in the nation, the greatest country in the world and that they have an opportunity to continue making them even greater.
[**If you 've been waiting for the right time to get off the sidelines and fight for the rights you know were given to man by God Himself - the time is NOW.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOXoFggVaUn0b3B4ASQHyIZyeam1UUYaZlBlXFkXaib_IQRAz2jF120yuiLZnNMfYvadW3XH0HevxJxBcuTBv2cn_v7oxn_wHqRRFkjiZVjbJZcpfy4vYUwfg5XzxCdRQiHCc025zPoF4falTFZJz7EhjJWKaHrruypHSalP0zvxB-piMnxNuY_NKv75g1QCoiUMR9r06ZVvBRhsbOgHAcog%3D%3D)
[**If you 're with me, **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOaTspNFt4e7Zu4ODHs0s8OJB8OAIEkF8xveJDxuSN75H2OPN_C0ZZ0stX7lbou80LZOznCP5tu0f-anfKJJM74WMzx9litAM904DeOFh8ah5ACdsGzbBhyhK2X6hA_Hb7ppcGcApqFHrpGrPeb5TjYCfoulg8inCYyRmLxwWYqePlrBAIrmcghNHvYIQN03sXHuZrxu373dwpZBZkvMFdFg%3D%3D)[**Peter****, chip in any amount to help me defeat this enemy.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOln2MxyfrjNYfFlxnzmPw6rFkb_GAk1pZMBwyzzp1mWMbSXj6ivsJqQslbg1o2NmWm09DI-W2PPIdOQ0xVp8rCofq5E2zFdCeEAaFF9B73YoVAGoUs_TXOpwaAJ50l98d30NSie936PmFXP-lw5Vj-ZLvqFOax7oVIMeN5fTpf60bHK9NlGm9GdIWiuWw9E_tulN3J4xHDKLDcKJUhBTUJQ%3D%3D) I can't do it without you. I promise you; I will _**never**_ stop fighting.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOQtPMW2FjU1NLM_BlTDJJIFT1Q6yOwaPnFNxHfDyBJkVrBCrgy-vWmfPSbbSnvCqQWNFYEBNpXqCFLwhJuX7Ofi14wX4qjNnLO6pbnGndWqZ1xzQsNt6xLE_53pvktbSY6JLkI8fqR2_O2FlELo2KIiAUgTqhlgUt-_0PAw07vOqwQQfRVrhSXoe0uuJ3UVNI6mqJTwheG9CYzKVSJpelyw%3D%3D "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ce60ec310a2b47a9b5b42601c375cae7&_e=IgJRzmw4JZv_S-kad9i-yHjrqqrGtj7f4m0iRONKQFcd6v5pDbLvL2DvMqGxD1UR17XZOUrAmDpNBIyx_te_uOLlbvOWONhKaCSkSgnIvByuLS2pKyYcVeJ_x4KeQXOU967SHyESFhuXcDMyMTEJqLemKjd0kkSeRGlLQP6Tf6oQPV39Qtht41WFetAtOPDOgMEFhjFtkOcxt_gk40CI2u0MMm9UOkxOVbLoNLGLdxrMax3Nn0xKtGCG7XD20UCC1boTRvPZaClgU6-_Qmn0gUYSbHn5hgwtJtynB55ty5WGXarQ1ozqVyUWWLzVCWQ0Ab2FgIPjWzcxdKIExGFfgojo8cIn3kNTq8sVwKeuIIQYRvKCu1YFF7mzuDTl94DE1eQQpYFJifciy0xJZrEH7g%3D%3D)

name: DrAnnieAndrews.com
subject: While people are being shot, Mace does nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| There’s been a lot of news for gun violence prevention activists to focus on over the last few weeks and we here at Team Annie wanted to make sure you didn’t miss them.

**FIRST:** The Republican Supreme Court overturned a New York gun law, making it easier to carry a gun even as the gun violence crisis worsens.

**THEN:** The House voted to pass the first meaningful gun violence prevention measure in around 30 years. Nancy Mace, a self-proclaimed “second amendment girl”, voted against the bipartisanly supported bill that is now law.

**NOW:** We’re facing more and more gun violence everyday—with yet another mass shooting happening at a Fourth of July parade on Monday.

[This is a crisis, and we need leaders who will actually respond, not cater to the NRA. So we’re asking you to sign our petition this week if you agree: Enough is enough. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486115/354475783/42056648?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_20220706_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=B1SgDB5vLpmj02Wmz8vKbI4SGpHTn83nkAOgEkCwtjiz+G+eQf/CO/RaOCp+UFeR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2Y5MzU2MC03ZmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5uzdMzhJomwrMq7BSrRP9BiMIBWyhDkmUorDlTm9tc=&emci=d0f8d40c-3bfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=47f93560-7ffd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529) | | [Add Your Name→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47486116/354475784/42056648?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_20220706_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=B1SgDB5vLpmj02Wmz8vKbI4SGpHTn83nkAOgEkCwtjiz+G+eQf/CO/RaOCp+UFeR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2Y5MzU2MC03ZmZkLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5uzdMzhJomwrMq7BSrRP9BiMIBWyhDkmUorDlTm9tc=&emci=d0f8d40c-3bfd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=47f93560-7ffd-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)
---
While children are being shot to death in their classrooms and families are being gunned down at grocery stores, concerts, local parades, and basically anywhere in America, the Supreme Court ruled to make carrying guns _easier_ and Nancy Mace voted against taking _any_ action to stop the bloodshed.

As a pediatrician who has cared for far too many children with bullet holes, Annie doesn’t have the luxury of looking away from the public health crisis of gun violence. She’s outraged by the “leaders” who refuse to take action as people die.

clean_body: | There’s been a lot of news for gun violence prevention activists to focus on over the last few weeks and we here at Team Annie wanted to make sure you didn’t miss them. FIRST: The Republican Supreme Court overturned a New York gun law, making it easier to carry a gun even as the gun violence crisis worsens. THEN: The House voted to pass the first meaningful gun violence prevention measure in around 30 years. Nancy Mace, a self-proclaimed “second amendment girl”, voted against the bipartisanly supported bill that is now law. NOW: We’re facing more and more gun violence everyday—with yet another mass shooting happening at a Fourth of July parade on Monday. | | While children are being shot to death in their classrooms and families are being gunned down at grocery stores, concerts, local parades, and basically anywhere in America, the Supreme Court ruled to make carrying guns easier and Nancy Mace voted against taking any action to stop the bloodshed. As a pediatrician who has cared for far too many children with bullet holes, Annie doesn’t have the luxury of looking away from the public health crisis of gun violence. She’s outraged by the “leaders” who refuse to take action as people die. — Team Annie | = | = Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress PO BOX 1431 Johns Island, SC 29457 United States **

body:
So much is at stake
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eEfX-thyzDsnRzlcm9fPs4kd1b3QuDn4fJKv5oMxLa_DrBWW4fOKE9a4FcnVnDhjwnk8jQRWoPu032LomHXUy3EKLTH8PPZan5Sgv0dO4dXJ-LvYFWbnXZOS3qD3XFCxtZqFhOFI93MfhaJH3j86dQ==&c=IMbWK10hBczx20vNXxIO_VkXPIgGXMcCOVnyIgZMjkMt2Q--kpxs5Q==&ch=x60TLqybAPUB4cFees7XSR6Ij-5ZEzmN5nQNBmPagtB4iUfUv7em0Q==)
---
| What Does Freedom Mean to You
---
| Dear Peter,
As we watch the partisan majority of the United States Supreme Court strip our freedoms, we must ask ourselves, "What does freedom mean to me?"
What does it mean to my children's future?
What does it mean to our environment?
Our religious/non-religious belief systems?
Our ability to marry the person we love?
And so much more.
With the current U.S. Supreme Court, winning Democrats to the U.S. House of Representatives and the Montana State Legislature has never been more important.
THIS is the time to dig down deep and give your all to this fight for our democracy and our freedom.
Contact your local Democratic Central Committee and volunteer for candidates in your area. Donate to their campaigns.
If you do not know how to contact the Democratic Central Committee in your county, reply to this email or contact Carmelita Dominguez at the email address below. Our campaign will connect you.
Every election is won at the LOCAL level. Please, volunteer, donate, and get involved! Our freedoms and our democracy are being threatened and taken. We cannot sit by and let this happen. Too much is at stake and make no mistake - they are coming for more than what they've already taken.
On this 4th of July weekend, think about what freedom means to you and then make a plan to help one or more Democratic candidates in your area to get elected.
Thank you! Together we rise.
PLEASE DONATE $3, $5, $10 or More TODAY!

subject: We are down in the polls

body:
Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. |

---
Peter,

There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news.

**We're down.**
Peter, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race.

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b7d959f64ecc40de96e7688ece45221e&_e=AzMqJi8A2PS0N6SjkeFycHNNiazgoHDDmF38AWW29HBqwqoT0w-uNaBDDSk3fVOX1idKdSvjVYtyUXZIxnfuOLa9qUvn8eg8bFArPob4MnVqP1zf5CJxFwwYHjQGcxvAqzvx4sxlF29KOijCcb570u29ODQJVbfzO_13eUuk5zxOkDCNjgr662xC_3fYV3d0qx9YgEwJz5UwOEQNerKocGpjjNmVxa3BeTUj_fg7f_Mj1pyidK0NQ6BkLDu30n9tq4B_SzwA4eXitgtCbkYGdzpUoBFFI-UQO6_p_hSYeii3fGwgawdPiVZoYjip1d1T_ejMgV0B7pba3b2OXlDZtTol3T9Z-G1t4_NUddJ80V6nZ6Iv_-DhpaDPojirzoMep9xDIlqOb4hpLvlsbMMDXrEv9UrpBCoxC2ZrOlmZvnGD0o8Va4OviVYCqIq94W0cDwmqaIIo5Y_FHkBu9kN6w_wHnEIAjZuGBQmqJucsJwoW5fFzIQ3Skaq7vNJHiW-3)
Let's show Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden that we're in this fight. We are not going to back down.

Peter, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. _**That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary.**_

We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air.

That's why I am emailing today. **[Can you chip in $5, $10, $25, or even $34 in the next hour?](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b7d959f64ecc40de96e7688ece45221e&_e=AzMqJi8A2PS0N6SjkeFycHNNiazgoHDDmF38AWW29HBqwqoT0w-uNaBDDSk3fVOX1idKdSvjVYtyUXZIxnfuOLa9qUvn8eg8bFArPob4MnVqP1zf5CJxFwwYHjQGcxvAqzvx4sxlF29KOijCcb570u29ODQJVbfzO_13eUuk5zxOkDCNjgr662xC_3fYV3d0qx9YgEwJz5UwOEQNerKocGpjjNmVxa3BeTUj_fg7f_Mj1pyidK0NQ6BkLDu30n9tq4B_SzwA4eXitgtCbkYGdzpUoBFFI-UQO6_p_hSYeihMXcORUveEXcBRfAGQCnwVlVYoiHWpv5_y6W_lJMSZNt-iotD0eIKb_0APwseNELAYrMeYDgATs8d6ouaILMeDnucDtYqzDSFeb2RyZcCVfHN7pM86B36lfiewp2-B8GTbPW19MuJftrVUtAeddnSE4BkhEmbIs5MY1SGc5IvMXGPJGuazdzdylAmJiyvL2l1gJ1qyfXADRAB4bN1_u00C)**

I'm counting on you to help us catch up before it's too late, Peter.

Thanks for standing with me,

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=b7d959f64ecc40de96e7688ece45221e&_e=AzMqJi8A2PS0N6SjkeFycHNNiazgoHDDmF38AWW29HBqwqoT0w-uNaBDDSk3fVOX1idKdSvjVYtyUXZIxnfuOLa9qUvn8eg8bFArPob4MnVqP1zf5CJxFwwYHjQGcxvAqzvx4sxlF29KOijCcb570u29ODQJVbfzO_13eUuk5zxOkDCNjgr662xC_3fYV3d0qx9YgEwJz5UwOEQNerKocGpjjNmVxa3BeTUj_fg7f_Mj1pyidK0NQ6BkLDu30n9tq4B_SzwA4eXitgtCbkYGdzpUoBFFI-UQO6_p_hSYeiiMAN-bHrpEele9GoRri452nH-4956W-RznJ81OqGOFbg_RBAbuNckzg1_Ln29IivYf-KJzkSq-YkJuR_TSn_Re0O6X-P38UbT6eU0e4UE_J_DIE6MoNh3qeWA-lBWXlEyTn3u_J02fZ44KT_SASBp-zBfSrcbVnlgGVjiMmCyaB6NmnWlpwAZ6jnM0ceKHliurh-_BEHpqyq0n3224Rmw4)

Herschel Walker

clean_body: Let’s show the Left that we’re in this fight. | Peter, There's some new polling in our Georgia Senate race, and I have some bad news. We're down. Peter, I'm going to need your help right now to change the momentum of this race. Let's show Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden that we're in this fight. We are not going to back down. Peter, that's where you can help today. The Democrats are scared that we'll win. That's why they started attacking me the moment we won the Republican Primary. We haven't had the money to run our own ads, so it's no wonder the Democrats' millions in attack ads have had an impact on the polling. We can turn things around quickly if grassroots leaders like you will step up and give to our Media Fund so we can get on the air. That's why I am emailing today. I'm counting on you to help us catch up before it's too late, Peter. Thanks for standing with me, Herschel Walker P.S. The new polling average in our race shows Senator Warnock is now winning by 1.6%. We can catch up quickly, but we've got to get on the air with our ads ASAP. Thanks! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Bob is the right man for the job. Read more >>

https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/pg_e_resume_yo2_20220627_a?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_PG-e-resume-yo2-20220627-a_20220705&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-resume-yo2-20220627-a&utm_agency=PG&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=05c03d37b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_07_05_09_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-05c03d37b4-252807809
Peter,

New Hampshire’s 2^nd Congressional District needs a proven conservative leader who will FIGHT for our Granite State values.

Bob Burns has the experience and the dedication to stand up to the Radical Left in Congress and get our country back on track!

Bob is a lifelong New Hampshire resident, who has served his community as a local business owner, Republican activist, and public servant.

He attended Bedford public schools and earned a degree in Business Management from Keene State College. Today, he runs a successful quality control and pharmaceutical safety business – and he’s previously served as a Selectman, Deputy Treasurer, and Treasurer of Hillsborough County.

His background in local government and as a small business owner will be a big asset in Congress. Balancing a budget and managing payroll is exactly the kind of real-world experience we need in Washington right now.

Will you please support Bob’s campaign to flip NH-2 red with a generous donation today?
DONATE NOW (https://secure.winred.com/burnsfornh/pg_e_resume_yo2_20220627_a?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=BurnsB_PG-e-resume-yo2-20220627-a_20220705&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-resume-yo2-20220627-a&utm_agency=PG&utm_source=Burns+for+Congress&utm_campaign=05c03d37b4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_07_05_09_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7e3d774d02-05c03d37b4-252807809)
With your help, we can win this critical battleground seat, take back the House, and SAVE AMERICA.

Thanks in advance for your support,

Team Burns

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf725df6a634/announcing-watermen-for-kelly-11818323?e=64ac72257a)
---
| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=ae7f1b4e9f&e=64ac72257a)
---
| |
# Dear Peter,

Early voting in Maryland starts TOMORROW and I need your help.

**I am humbly asking for your support today and asking you to vote EARLY! **

Early voting in Maryland runs from July 7 - July 14 from 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM (including Saturday and Sunday).

[**Early voting locations are located in every county and can be found online here**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=cced571342&e=64ac72257a).

You know we're fighting the DGA interference in the Republican primary and EVERY SINGLE VOTE COUNTS.

We're up statewide on TV with our new ad "Count on It". I hope you've had a chance to see the ad and share with friends and family.

[**Will you help me today by contributing $25, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 to keep this ad on TV until Election Day?**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=a61c7dce4d&e=64ac72257a)

Together, I know we can beat the DGA and make history this year in Maryland.

Thank you,

---
|

| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor

body:
Things are falling apart before our eyes

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f3a1416cd31c4597acffdd2ca0aaee23&_e=3ggO6yP9-mIT8Ka5-yJquoJpb-Bn2FaHXYFM_U0rssv64zgRjPEKmwporqWNTGJ7sC4IRONAZ0jDt1_IJLD3GlOa63y2ysVXXrVNOFYooymwpj0psQ3CYWUeFXz81bmlQDJyz_dRm0p9TMUG3pO4wAuxhJaT3P8Mi9OP3aCOPeRWXXImF0-RIoft-NBVx6sW3OMUPfjTcii1LJAXlLtfSpOJHvuh_6bw1TgFkmqiEBZqdJgLf-0BazggKWtjhjZWmHuiXkbXR58mWHEfJ5-i935e0JQTllix616w-s92wqDEyOWSIA4aljtMt-y-T-jcOVubZjpguIR6q6faDjVyvySS_6IYkQXq2HhqRFFkv9ulYXenE0ATar84Um7qmxxF-q-XFQ-kCK3_o-pccSLlWlfQ5mScp7iBW4DmR2Jqr2RpfsmfnG2cjAh2zxdjl5SxfTYHp0cNHZoLkGXvrxy344ICWsRTl8UfgWLT38U0jHoapO9Dxe6_O_EGdrq5Yq89AjgZzenp-ifSM091slMm29U-k0qKsZ0FMZJNGW1yVic%3D)

Hey Peter, JD checking in here.

**I wanted to drop you a quick note to share some thoughts while I’m in between events.** I usually send these emails from Cincinnati, so please pardon my lack of sophistication. [**Can you click on this sentence to ensure that the links are working?**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f3a1416cd31c4597acffdd2ca0aaee23&_e=3ggO6yP9-mIT8Ka5-yJquoJpb-Bn2FaHXYFM_U0rssv64zgRjPEKmwporqWNTGJ7sC4IRONAZ0jDt1_IJLD3GlOa63y2ysVXXrVNOFYooymwpj0psQ3CYWUeFXz81bmlQDJyz_dRm0p9TMUG3pO4wAuxhJaT3P8Mi9OP3aCOPeRWXXImF0-RIoft-NBVx6sW3OMUPfjTcii1LJAXlLtfSpOJHvuh_6bw1TgFkmqiEBZqdJgLf-0BazggKWtjhjZWmHuiXkbXR58mWHEfJ5-i935e0JQTllix616w-s92wqDEyOWSIA4aljtMt-y-T-jcOVubZjpguIR6q6faDjVyv8uJXUQDx-ynMbPY6z-ii8D36DlkmzGQEtd0ivqSuzAMRNjJQAv9t2nEV3WtNnV7RHxm_-m1Sj3MA0sCLnwKl74B1U9a7tm6tJl2Hf9efb0eruHGN7fF2S5VHGSNHQg23Z0HLeGtDFw2yaN4Ox7NHJwUZ8HMrKqZE9Sf1WQJyjmgQrEqRZG3hxhVn-GyeOTnRfnyi-lLaDcSG58wwatLgKI%3D) _Nevertheless,_ I am eager to share some thoughts from my travels across the GREAT State of Ohio.

**The Opioid Crisis is as alive as it has ever been.** Last year alone, 107,000 Americans, mostly between 18-45, passed away due to Fentanyl overdoses. Lockdowns, worsening economic conditions, and a sense of hopelessness are claiming a generation of Americans, and [**we have to do something to reverse course.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f3a1416cd31c4597acffdd2ca0aaee23&_e=3ggO6yP9-mIT8Ka5-yJquoJpb-Bn2FaHXYFM_U0rssv64zgRjPEKmwporqWNTGJ7sC4IRONAZ0jDt1_IJLD3GlOa63y2ysVXXrVNOFYooymwpj0psQ3CYWUeFXz81bmlQDJyz_dRm0p9TMUG3pO4wAuxhJaT3P8Mi9OP3aCOPeRWXXImF0-RIoft-NBVx6sW3OMUPfjTcii1LJAXlLtfSpOJHvuh_6bw1TgFkmqiEBZqdJgLf-0BazggKWtjhjZWmHuiXkbXR58mWHEfJ5-i935e0JQTllix616w-s92wqDEyOWSIA4aljtMt-y-T-jcOVubZjpguIR6q6faDjVyv3cRtYlUftrCdZ-ujQUgAHnCRVn4HhHr3GTOafUigF_v98MBU3n_nI89L_as1dQ0NrSckKXvdTap3_NVBYrrGxGl9ZBrlhokhh8O4IYNJf_Krc1HZirFWxqzGVXzeOzN4MfaurhKR-rBF1JlU0P9ZTf7NgEDOuYpprBjxjyVv08BCwwkYJhZEAVgIwqmacLX3-LJf3yr7IyQibUqI5_WP0o%3D)

[**Chip in $5 here →→→**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f3a1416cd31c4597acffdd2ca0aaee23&_e=3ggO6yP9-mIT8Ka5-yJquoJpb-Bn2FaHXYFM_U0rssv64zgRjPEKmwporqWNTGJ7sC4IRONAZ0jDt1_IJLD3GlOa63y2ysVXXrVNOFYooymwpj0psQ3CYWUeFXz81bmlQDJyz_dRm0p9TMUG3pO4wAuxhJaT3P8Mi9OP3aCOPeRWXXImF0-RIoft-NBVx6sW3OMUPfjTcii1LJAXlLtfSpOJHvuh_6bw1TgFkmqiEBZqdJgLf-0BazggKWtjhjZWmHuiXkbXR58mWHEfJ5-i935e0JQTllix616w-s92wqDEyOWSIA4aljtMt-y-T-jc4e3PtNFmvkpCKaPGG6wGp013F2JixGVJ7VfnYC1QN3ZePQXFpdQLGtiSAlE7lXsYZws7LX0tZJ1E9WYC3BAX5kbDj-OpvSfmKrQKbMZXv8G5unzrR8-BHc3r7iJaKoOAcMF5mRsX37RXZn-dMOg2Zq2nQDcZgYj2aG0xSdn2uWe9dWZi5vySlqINIna72nmjD4HwfCQsEdqt1NvLiMipb2P8DxI3KC_GenqG-5qYIZY%3D)

**Crime is genuinely out of control.** Soros-funded District Attorneys across the country are emptying out prisons, leaving innocent Americans at risk. We must reprioritize securing American cities.

**Ohioans are desperate for relief at the pump.** Joe Biden has made it his mission to cripple domestic American energy production. clean_body: Things are falling apart before our eyes | Hey Peter, JD checking in here. I wanted to drop you a quick note to share some thoughts while I’m in between events. I usually send these emails from Cincinnati, so please pardon my lack of sophistication. Nevertheless, I am eager to share some thoughts from my travels across the GREAT State of Ohio. The Opioid Crisis is as alive as it has ever been. Last year alone, 107,000 Americans, mostly between 18-45, passed away due to Fentanyl overdoses. Lockdowns, worsening economic conditions, and a sense of hopelessness are claiming a generation of Americans, and Crime is genuinely out of control. Soros-funded District Attorneys across the country are emptying out prisons, leaving innocent Americans at risk. We must reprioritize securing American cities. Ohioans are desperate for relief at the pump. Joe Biden has made it his mission to cripple domestic American energy production. This is being done on behalf of the most extreme elements of the Climate Lobby, and Tim Ryan has been right in the fold as Biden’s Climate Footsoldier in Congress (Tim Ryan has voted with Biden 100% of the time and Pelosi 97% of the time). I’m running for the US Senate to clean up this mess liberal politicians have left us, but I can’t do it alone. If you chip in, it’ll come at a critical moment as we ramp up our efforts going into the Fall. Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Did you see John’s tweets?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Check out these tweets.
#
Derek, today our digital team was going to write you an email about Big Oil’s price gouging, but we thought John’s tweets on the issue summed it up pretty well. ⬇️
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | Paying 18 cents more a gallon might be a drop in the bucket for someone as absurdly wealthy as Dr. Oz. But for a single mother with two kids making a shitty minimum wage of $7.25/hr, it *really* matters.
---
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | PRICE GOUGING IS IMMORAL!!!!! That’s the tweet
---
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | Big Oil greed doesn’t end at the pump. America’s Farmers are getting crushed on the job because they can’t fuel their tractors, + can’t repair broken equipment either. We need to make more sh*t in America to bring down these costs.
---
| **John Fetterman** @John Fetterman
---|---
| | | We can use American energy to drive down prices at the Gas Pump + employ American workers to drive down the price of everything, for everyone. This isn’t a radical proposal. It’s basic common sense. 💯
---
**[Derek, if you’re with John on this, please add your name to our petition today demanding that Big Oil stop their immoral price gouging at the pumps immediately. Working Pennsylvanians cannot afford corporate greed.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-price-gouging/?source=em20220706-2&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)**
**[Add your name»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-price-gouging/?source=em20220706-2&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)**
Not totally convinced? Here are some more tweets that help explain the issue:
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | Gas is over $5 a gallon right now. The last time a barrel of crude oil cost this much was in July 2014. At that point a gallon of gas only cost about $3.54. Let’s be clear: Oil companies don’t need to be charging this much for gas. They’re just doing it to make excess profits.
---
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | If it wasn’t for the greed of oil companies, gas prices wouldn’t be this high. We can use American energy to drive down prices at the pump for American workers, and we can use American workers to drive down the price of everything, for everyone.
---
| **John Fetterman** @JohnFetterman
---|---
| | | Families across Pennsylvania are paying $5 a gallon for gas, while Exxon Mobile, Chevron, and other oil companies are making record profits. It's morally wrong, ESPECIALLY while these massive oil companies and their CEOs are doing better than ever. We need to crack down on this
---
**[If you agree with John, please add your name today to demand that Big Oil stop price gouging immediately. Big Oil should not be able to rob Americans at the pump in the name of excess profit.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-price-gouging/?source=em20220706&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)**
**[Add your name»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-price-gouging/?source=em20220706-2&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)**
In solidarity,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220706-6432-footer&t=1&refcode2=6432_434096_rpkeKT&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6432%2E434096%2ErpkeKT)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
